shows.title: iO Fest '26 Friday 1-Day Pass
shows.excerpt: iO Fest 2026, Chicago's largest improv festival, returns on July 23-26! Four days packed with improv, sketch, performance art, musical improv, music, and more, featuring over 130 acts from all over the world! Purchasing this 1-Day pass grants ac...
shows.description: iO Fest 2026, Chicago's largest improv festival, returns on July 23-26! Four days packed with improv, sketch, performance art, musical improv, music, and more, featuring over 130 acts from all over the world! Purchasing this 1-Day pass grants access to all General Admission performances taking place over the weekend. Space is limited in every performance venue, so seating is first-come, first-served. Shows take place each day approximately from 4 PM to 1 AM. This Friday pass for iO Fest 2026 includes admission to the following acts: A Little Conversation Akash Bajpai Arson Awkward Family Dinner Baby Grand Barbara, a Mother Big Freak Black Star Bridal Darty Calamity Quest Cat and George Are Doing Just Fine Creamboy Dan Burger Danielle Steger Finds a Job Devil's Daughter Facebook Marketplace Live: The Game Show Feast Fever Dream Gale Grace Kilpatrick Grown Man Baby HTH Improvised Housewives Internet Online Jacob Mundell Johnathan Anderson Karan Mehra Kaseria Last Night Was Fun Lauren Frost Lavender Throuple Marquee Michelle Improv Mischief Ms. Biscuit One Woman Car Show Play Time Primetime Quest And... Rat Race Regionals: The Musical The Rose Single Living Slonky Spades Table Stir Friday Night Tipping Point Touch Baseball Trash King Two Bears Blow Up in a Car Wet Pizza What a Year Wheel of Improv Whimsy Lohan Whirled News ***Purchase of this 1-Day GA Pass DOES NOT grant admission to any headliner shows: 3Peat, Armando, Astronomy Club, Baby Wants Candy, Claire + Kim, Comedy Dance Chicago, ¡ESCÁNDALO!, Improvised Shakespeare Co., Jackbox Games, James Conklin Memorial Scholarship Show, Parker Callahan, SAND, The Sloppy Boys, UCB Soundtrack, and Unmuted. Tickets for those specific shows much be purchased separately.*** 1-Day passes are non-transferable and non-refundable. Purchaser must show up to our box office with an ID identical to the name under which they purchased the tickets to receive their day pass. iO Fest is an all-ages event, but due to the improvised nature of our shows, we cannot guarantee the appropriateness of each show for younger audiences. Follow iO on social media to stay up to date with all information related to iO Fest 2026. Purchase the 4-Day pass here to save money on all shows!

shows.title: Strawberry Jam, hosted by “Ladies Night”
shows.excerpt: An inclusive and FREE jam with a guest standup monologist for womxn, trans, non-binary, and lgbtqia+ performers in our community! Strawberry Jam is open to UCB students, performers, and fans who identify as womxn, trans, non-binary, and lgbtqia+! All you…
shows.description: An inclusive and FREE jam with a guest standup monologist for womxn, trans, non-binary, and lgbtqia+ performers in our community! Strawberry Jam is open to UCB students, performers, and fans who identify as womxn, trans, non-binary, and lgbtqia+! All you have to do is show up and raise your hand if you’d like to play! For our suggestion we will have either a standard request from the audience, monologue, or we’ll have a comic set to inspire us! Totally free show for all skill levels fostering a safe room where we can perform. If you’re not ready to jam yet, that’s okay! You are always invited and, whenever you’re ready, pop on stage! Hosted by Ladies Night: Adri Diaz, Brittany Charlotte Smith, Ella Jenkin, Jessica Damouni, Molly Doan, Miranda Coker, Miranda Hart, Rachel Chapman, Samantha Adler — This show is FREE to attend in-person. No ticket needed! Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre 5919 Franklin Avenue, Los Angeles, CA

shows.title: Great Americans
shows.excerpt: The Definitive Celebration of America’s Greatest Minds Great Americans is the flagship biographical retrospective series of the American Institute of Importance, the nation’s leading nonprofit dedicated to celebrating the figures who shaped this country. Join Henry Block (The Onion)…
shows.description: The Definitive Celebration of America’s Greatest Minds Great Americans is the flagship biographical retrospective series of the American Institute of Importance, the nation’s leading nonprofit dedicated to celebrating the figures who shaped this country. Join Henry Block (The Onion) and some of UCB’s top performers as the Institute inducts a new class of honorees: Scientists. Inventors. Various women in shawls shouting obscenities in public. Through a series of live dramatic presentations, audiences are granted unprecedented access to the lives, legacies, and defining contributions of these essential Americans. Let us be clear: These are the most important people in our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard of them, you’re being hysterical and no one believes you. Featuring: Henry Block, Maggie Carr, Harris Solomon, Joey Welsh, Edson Montenegro, and Maddie Groff Written by Henry Block —- In-person tickets are $15 in advance and $20 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre: 242 East 14th Street, New York, NY 10003
shows.cast: Maggie Carr, Henry Block, Harris Solomon, Edson Montenegro, Joey Welsh

shows.title: Shamilton, the Improvised Hip Hop Musical
shows.excerpt: Baby Wants Candy's improvised hit Hamilton-inspired hip hop homage returns to UCB. New York Times "One of the Top 5 Comedy's to Catch." Ever heard of this show "Hamilton"? Shamilton is just like that, but (ahem) better! Expect the same…
shows.description: Baby Wants Candy’s improvised hit Hamilton-inspired hip hop homage returns to UCB. New York Times “One of the Top 5 Comedy’s to Catch.” Ever heard of this show “Hamilton”? Shamilton is just like that, but (ahem) better! Expect the same level of hip hop, incredible songs, stunning choreography and powerhouse singing… except made up on the spot! Fresh off a month-long fully sold-out run at the Edinburgh Fringe, musical improv ensemble Baby Wants Candy presents “Shamilton!”, the Hamilton inspired hit hip-hop musical created in 2016 at UCB in LA, with an open run at Chicago’s Second City. Join the Shamilton cast as they improvise an epic musical based on a historical figure of your choosing- from Genghis Khan to Mr. Rogers to Kim Kardashian… to basketball playing superdog Air Bud. It’s the show The Guardian calls “Brilliant 4 stars” The New York Times calls “One of the top 5 comedy shows to catch”. and Lin-Manuel Miranda calls, “cease and desist!” Featuring: Chris Grace, Zeke Nicholson, Ross Bryant, Jess McKenna, Zach Reino, Jiavani, Ashley Ward, Shilpa Das, Derek Demkowicz, John Hartman, Joey Bland, Zheryk Badugu — Tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show. Livestream tickets are $10. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one hour before the show. Link will remain accessible for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre 5919 Franklin Avenue, Los Angeles, CA
shows.cast: Chris Grace, Zeke Nicholson, Ross Bryant, Jessica McKenna, Zach Reino, Jiavani, Ashley Ward, Shilpa Das, Derek Demko, John Hartman, Joey Bland, Zheryk Badugu

shows.title: TGIF with Duchovny & Olestra
shows.excerpt: Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But we do know it's improv every Friday @ 7pm! Buy Tickets
shows.description: DOORS: 6:30 PM SHOW: 7:00 PM Eris Deep Space (downstairs) "It's Friday night and the mood is right. Gonna have some fun, show you how it's done, TGIF". BCC is bringing back ABC's TGIF programming block Fridays at 7pm ET / 6 pm CT with Duchovny and Olestra. Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But it will be funny and it will be on Friday and we will thank god for both. Duchovny is a group of elite New York maniacs comprised of veteran improvisers, actors, and comedians who you've probably seen in TV, movies, and even the most coveted work of all, digital-only commercials that air before Youtube videos. Duchovny is fast paced, high energy and filled to the brim with chaos. Olestra is a squad of dangerous Chicago criminals who make out and beat the hell out of each other on stage here in New York. They evaded arrest by racking up credits in the entertainment industry; The Tonight Show, The Second City, UCB Betty, The Improvised Shakespeare Company, to name a few. Duchovny is: Amanda Breen @amanda_breen James Dwyer @jamesbdwyer Lou Gonzalez @angrylou Patrick Keene @pad00d2.0 Yoni Lotan @yonilotan Tami Sagher @tamisagher Akmal Tajihan @akmaltajihan Sarah Grace Welbourn @sgwelbs Duchovny @duchovnyimprov Olestra is: Dan Bazaldua @dannbazz Devin Bockrath @durvinbuttrath Nick Mestad @nick_mestad Micah Sterenberg @micah_humble_blessed Andy Junk @therealandyjunk Fine Print: Must be 21+ to attend. No outside alcohol is allowed in the space. There are 35 seats - first come, first serve - and then standing room up to capacity. All ticket sales are final - no refunds. If you must miss your show, email us at info@brooklyncc.com with at least 24 hours notice and we can transfer your tickets to any upcoming show at the BCC. Answers to most other questions can be found here . If show is sold out, limited tickets will be available at the door. Lineup subject to change. Buy tickets $5 OFF TIX BEFORE DAY OF SHOW

shows.description: SIGN-UPS 6:45 PM JAM: 7:00 PM BCC Pig Pen The Spice Rack is BCC’s improv jam for BIPOC-identifying folks! Our goal is to create a fun, low-stakes space for improvisers of BIPOC experience to get silly and radiate some heckin’ joy. The jam is completely free, and no improv experience is needed. And to all allies, feel free to come and laugh! Come be unapologetically [insert non-white race here] and unapologetically goofy on stage with us on the 4th Friday of each month at 7pm at the BCC Pig Pen! (-sexy whisper- It’ll be our spicy little secret ) Free! Must be 18+ to attend FREE FOr BCC STUDENTS w/ Suggested Donation to Div. Scholarship

shows.description: This ticket admits entry to the Astronomy Club performance at iO Fest, on either July 24 at 7:00 PM and July 25 at 9:00 PM. Astronomy Club at iO Theater! DOORS: 6:30PM | SHOW: 7:00PM | ALL AGES DOORS: 8:30PM | SHOW: 9:00PM | ALL AGES Improv from the team that brought you Netflix’s Astronomy Club: The Sketch Show . Have you ever had a moment or experience that felt like it was destined? A coincidence that was simply too big to be an accident, or so serendipitous that it must have been written… in the stars?? In a show that will reveal the meaning behind it all, Astronomy Club will take these moments from audience stories and create a very funny, (maybe fateful, possibly fortuitous??!!) fully improvised hour of comedy. Cast: James III, Shawtane Bowen, Jonathan Braylock, Ray Cordova, Caroline Martin, Jerah Milligan , Monique Moses , Keisha Zollar _____________________ Additional option to include our monthly cocktail, "Summertime Spritz" , with your ticket. It includes a blend of Lillet Blanc and strawberry purée, lifted with a splash of soda water and topped off with a Prosecco split. Served over ice and garnished with a lemon wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: Improvised Shakespeare Chicago
shows.venue: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
venues: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
shows.excerpt: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William ...
shows.description: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William Shakespeare. Inspired by one audience suggestion (a title for a play that has yet to be written) the dazzling players create a brand-new Shakespearean masterpiece right before your eyes. Nothing has been planned out, rehearsed, or written. The dialogue is said for the first time, the characters are created as you watch, and if ever you're wondering where the story is going...so are they! You've never seen the Bard like this before! “There’s really nothing quite like it in the city of Chicago. Smart, sophisticated, downright hilarious.” -TimeOut Chicago “…the show channels Monty Python as often as the Bard, and frequently with sly-witted results.” -The Chicago Tribune “Consistently Hilarious” -The Chicago Reader “Staggeringly Brilliant” -TimeOut Chicago “Consistently funny…'Tis v'ry, v'ry good.” -The Chicago Tribune “Indisputably great improv, fueled by smart plot development, stage chemistry and recognizable characters.” -Centerstage Chicago “In short, outstanding.” -TimeOut Chicago Find out more at improvisedshakespeare.com _________________________ Additional option to include Improvised Shakespeare's featured cocktail, Hamlet , with your ticket. It includes Nolets Dry Gin, St-Germaine, Campari, orange juice, and garnished with an orange wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.excerpt: Fun in Moderation is a New York City–based sketch comedy team featuring Kendall Bowden, Austin Elias-de Jesus, Syd King, and Nick Ryan. With backgrounds in UCB, stand-up, and character performance, their work focuses on character-first, gam
shows.description: Fun in Moderation is a New York City–based sketch comedy team featuring Kendall Bowden, Austin Elias-de Jesus, Syd King, and Nick Ryan. With backgrounds in UCB, stand-up, and character performance, their work focuses on character-first, game-driven sketches. The group has performed at NY Comedy Festival, SF Sketchfest, Caveat NYC, Asylum NYC, Austin Sketchfest, Philly Sketchfest, and was recently featured in The New Yorker (a surprise to them, too). Past openers include: Adam Conover, Vannessa Jackson, Dan Toomey, Moss Perricone, Maddie Wiener, and many more!

shows.title: ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. shows.excerpt: UCB's weekly improv double header! A night of improv comedy featuring two of LA's top teams performing back-to-back. Get your FIX every FRIDAY. Featuring: Come hang with Leroy as they cook up a fresh improv set full of bold opinions,…
shows.description: UCB’s weekly improv double header! A night of improv comedy featuring two of LA’s top teams performing back-to-back. Get your FIX every FRIDAY. Featuring: Come hang with Leroy as they cook up a fresh improv set full of bold opinions, bad decisions, and bizarre situations! Leroy members have written and performed on Black-ish, Abbott Elementary, Dropout, iCarly, Star Trek: Lower Decks, Grown-ish, Atypical, Comedy Bang! Bang! and more! Cast: Aman Adumer, Mary Anthony, Kimia Behpoornia, Josh Brekhus, Dayna LoBosco, James Mannion, Edgar Momplaisir, Laci Mosley, Mia Schauffler & Sentimental Lady: Deconstructed is bringing you a night of fun, hilarious and even sentimental improv comedy as they deconstruct their own show, right in front of your eyes! And it’ll be funny! We promise, we’ve been performing together for over a decade. With performers from Crazy Ex-Girlfriend, Reno 911!, Parks & Rec, Modern Family, Just Roll With It, Key & Peele, Big Little Lies, Brockmire, Children’s Hospital, Conan, Comedy Bang Bang and more! Cast: Suzi Barrett, Johnny Meeks, Hillary Anne Matthews, Alex Berg, Joel Spence, Todd Fasen, Mel Cowan, Alex Fernie — Tickets are $15 in advance and $20 on the day of the show. shows.title: The Friday Night Sh*w
shows.description: Obnoxious strangers, overbearing bosses and unrequited high school crushes are about to get a piece of your mind… The Friday Night Sh*w invites audience members to offer their repressed rants, cursing-outs and sultry confessions to fuel a fast-paced brawl of hilarity, performed by a fistful of of NYC’s best improvisers and Magnet faculty. Before the show, audience members may anonymously submit written confessions which the improvisers will use onstage. Now, doesn't it feel good to get that off your chest? Magnet Theater 254 West 29th St. New York NY 10001 Tickets The Friday Night Sh*w Fri Jul 24th, 2026 9:00pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Friday Night Sh*w Fri Jul 17th, 2026 9:00pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Friday Night Sh*w Fri Jul 31st, 2026 9:00pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Friday Night Sh*w Fri Aug 14th, 2026 9:00pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Friday Night Sh*w Fri Aug 21st, 2026 9:00pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Friday Night Sh*w Fri Aug 7th, 2026 9:00pm - $17 Buy Ticket Performers Evan Forde Barden Sulaiman Beg Jason Farr Ashley Glicken Fu Goto Chrissie Gruebel Will Jacobs Charlie Nicholson Sam Rogal Ashley Siflinger Michael Stevens Dede Tabak Phoebe Tyers Jeff Wucher

shows.excerpt: This ticket admits entry to the 3Peat performance at iO Fest, on either July 24 at 9:00 PM and July 25 at 7:00 PM. 3Peat at iO Theater! DOORS: 8:30PM | SHOW: 9:00PM | ALL AGES DOORS: 6:30PM | SHOW: 7:00PM | ALL AGES 3Peat is a critically acclaim...
shows.description: This ticket admits entry to the 3Peat performance at iO Fest, on either July 24 at 9:00 PM and July 25 at 7:00 PM. 3Peat at iO Theater! DOORS: 8:30PM | SHOW: 9:00PM | ALL AGES DOORS: 6:30PM | SHOW: 7:00PM | ALL AGES 3Peat is a critically acclaimed group of improv/sketch/standup artists who met while performing and teaching at iO and Second City in Chicago. They have gone on to work on a number of different projects like The Blackening, South Side, The Amber Ruffin Show, The Late Show, The Upshaws, Comedy Central, Tab Time, and much more. The show begins with a suggestion or personal question from the audience. A cast member will perform a monologue inspired by that suggestion. Then the rest of the cast then uses that monologue to do fast-paced and hilarious long form improv piece. _____________________ Additional option to include our monthly cocktail, "Summertime Spritz" , with your ticket. It includes a blend of Lillet Blanc and strawberry purée, lifted with a splash of soda water and topped off with a Prosecco split. Served over ice and garnished with a lemon wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: CLOWN HAUL
shows.excerpt: An immersive night of comedy that just might change your life. Welcome to CLOWN HAUL, hosted by the highly immersive elegant performance art clown troupe, FLWLS (pronounced flawless). A heavenly salon where you can experience the mystical world of clowning.…
shows.description: An immersive night of comedy that just might change your life. Welcome to CLOWN HAUL, hosted by the highly immersive elegant performance art clown troupe, FLWLS (pronounced flawless). A heavenly salon where you can experience the mystical world of clowning. Come play, learn, fail, laugh, cry, watch like a pervert, deepen your artistry or maybe even get an elephant tattoo’d on your body — who knows what the night will bring! What we can guarantee is that the comedy will be effervescent and the evening just might change your life. Starring Chad Damiani, Nalini Sharma, Deidre Lee, Caroline Cummings, Emily Maverick and a rotating guest cast of the best clown stars in town! — All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Annex 1925 N Bronson Ave Los Angeles, CA 90068

shows.title: Badpacks: An Improvised Trip
shows.excerpt: Improvisers swap mystery backpacks and justify bizarre props on a chaotic audience chosen trip! Pack your bags for a no holds barred improvised trip – be it a family reunion, camping trip, or work retreat. Before the show, each comedian…
shows.description: Improvisers swap mystery backpacks and justify bizarre props on a chaotic audience chosen trip! Pack your bags for a no holds barred improvised trip – be it a family reunion, camping trip, or work retreat. Before the show, each comedian secretly packs a backpack full of strange and random props. The improvisers exchange backpacks onstage at the beginning of the show and then must use and justify why ‘they’ brought each of the various props on the “trip.” All edible props must be consumed by the unfortunate soul who pulls it out. Hosted by Joseph Elston & Blake Edwards Featuring: Kel Cripe, Toni Adeyemi, Jack Greenberg, Caroline Cianci — Tickets are $10 in advance and $15 on the day of the show. Livestream tickets are $10. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one hour before the show. Link will remain accessible for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre 5919 Franklin Avenue, Los Angeles, CA

shows.title: clint SLOP
shows.excerpt: Two of NYC’s top indie teams split one hour of longform improv comedy with special guests! The disciples of clint and the bastards of SLOP will merge into one being as they do something no one has ever attempted: split one hour…
shows.description: Two of NYC’s top indie teams split one hour of longform improv comedy with special guests! The disciples of clint and the bastards of SLOP will merge into one being as they do something no one has ever attempted: split one hour of longform improv comedy. Featuring surprise guests! About the teams: Clint – Improv is our prayer, and clint is our god. Your suggestions are wishes granted by god ( clint ). The disciples of clint (Andy Vega, Carly Lant, Dom Finseth, and Emma Campbell) have evangelized at the Steelstacks Improv Festival, conquered the false clint at Fun & Dumb, and embarrassed heretics at UCB’s Cagematch. SLOP – A Brooklyn based comedy creature made out of Grant Cleaveland, Levi Collins, and Joe Harrington. Known for their highly physical, weird ass style, SLOP won 10 rounds of UCB’s Cagematch in 2024. SLOP has performed at iO Fest, Fun & Dumb Improv Festival, and was a Home Team at Brooklyn Comedy Collective in 2024. —- In-person tickets are $10 in advance and $15 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre: 242 East 14th Street, New York, NY 10003
shows.cast: Levi Collins, Grant Cleaveland, Joe Harrington, Andy Vega, Carly Lant, Dominic Finseth, Emma Campbell

Start your day off right with an exciting lineup of special guests, heartfelt stories, useful tips, and FUN! Join us and start your Today off right. Like we always say, "It's a Good Morning at any time of day!" [Amy and Jacob are hosting an improvised morning show (at night). They've invited the guests, but they don't know what they're coming on for. Join them as they find out what this morning has in store for them, live on stage (again, at night).] Magnet Theater 254 West 29th St. New York NY 10001 Tickets Good Morning Magnet Today! The “Holy Fuck Comedy Hour” is a curated hour of eclectic, comedic material written in a week with no rehearsals. shows.title: The Armando Diaz Experience
shows.excerpt: It's the best comedy show in the city. Created in 1995 by iO alum Armando Diaz, Armando is a historic improvisational form where actors improvise a series of interconnected scenes based on the true stories told from a new guest monologist. Featuri...
shows.description: It's the best comedy show in the city. Created in 1995 by iO alum Armando Diaz, Armando is a historic improvisational form where actors improvise a series of interconnected scenes based on the true stories told from a new guest monologist. Featuring new players, surprise celebrity guests, and more each week, come watch the longest running comedy show in Chicago at its home: iO Theater! Still don't know what an Armando is? Learn more here . Doors Open: 6:30pm Show Begins: 7:00 PM Follow us on social media for monologist announcements @armando_show_io

shows.title: iO Fest '26 4-Day Pass
shows.excerpt: iO Fest 2026 -- Chicago's largest improv festival returns on July 23-26! Four days packed full of improv, sketch, performance art, musical improv, music, and more with over 120 acts from all over the world. Purchase of this 4-Day GA Pass grants ...
shows.description: iO Fest 2026 -- Chicago's largest improv festival returns on July 23-26! Four days packed full of improv, sketch, performance art, musical improv, music, and more with over 120 acts from all over the world. Purchase of this 4-Day GA Pass grants access to all of the General Admission performances taking place over the weekend. Space is limited in each of our performing spaces so access is not guaranteed and is based on first come first seated general admission availability. Shows take place each day approximately from 5pm-1am. ***Purchase of this 4-Day GA Pass DOES NOT grant admission to any headliner shows: 3Peat, Armando, Astronomy Club, Baby Wants Candy, Claire + Kim, Comedy Dance Chicago, ¡ESCÁNDALO!, Improvised Shakespeare Co., Jackbox Games, James Conklin Memorial Scholarship Show, Parker Callahan, SAND, The Sloppy Boys, UCB Soundtrack, and Unmuted. Tickets for those specific shows much be purchased separately.*** 4-Day GA Passes are non transferable and non-refundable, no exceptions. Purchaser must show up to our box office with matching ID to receive their 4-Day GA Pass. iO Fest is an all ages event, but due to the improvised nature of our shows, we cannot guarantee the appropriateness of each show for younger audiences. Follow iO on social media to stay up to date with all information related to iO Fest 2026.

shows.description: This ticket admits entry to Baby Wants Candy performance on July 25 at 5:30pm ONLY. Baby Wants Candy at iO Theater! DOORS: 5:00PM | SHOW: 5:30PM | ALL AGES Baby Wants Candy is a completely improvised, full band musical! Having performed over 3,000 improvised musicals to thousands of fans from Chicago to New York to Singapore to Scotland, this group not only performs in Chicago, New York, and LA but also tours internationally, including multiple sold-out runs at the Edinburgh Fringe Festival! BWC cast & alumni include Aidy Bryant (Saturday Night Live), Jack McBrayer (30 Rock), Peter Gwinn (Colbert Report), Thomas Middleditch (HBO’s Silicon Valley), Lauren Conlan Adams (Kimmy Schmidt), Jessica McKenna (Party Over Here), Nicole Parker (Elephaba in Wickedon Broadway) and many more. Hailed as “Critic’s Pick” from the New York Times and “Best Improv Ensemble” from the Chicago Magazine, this is one improv show you don’t want to miss! _____________________ Additional option to include our monthly cocktail, "Summertime Spritz" , with your ticket. They have gone on to work on a number of different projects like The Blackening, South Side, The Amber Ruffin Show, The Late Show, The Upshaws, Comedy Central, Tab Time, and much more. The show begins with a suggestion or personal question from the audience. A cast member will perform a monologue inspired by that suggestion. Then the rest of the cast then uses that monologue to do fast-paced and hilarious long form improv piece. _____________________ Additional option to include our monthly cocktail, "Summertime Spritz" , with your ticket. shows.title: The Armando Diaz Experience
shows.description: The legendary show is reborn! Created in 1995 at the iO Theater in Chicago, The Armando Diaz Experience IS the longest running improv show EVER. A guest monologist takes a suggestion from the audience and shares true stories from their life. These stories are then brought to life by a rotating cast of improv all-stars, which take audiences on a high minded, exhilarating comedic joy ride that will leave mouths tired of smiling. And occasionally, just occasionally, the man with his name on the show will drop by for some fun. "The “Armando,” performed every Saturday, always begins with a monologue, and at a recent show it was about a connection made on the internet that led a decade later to a real-life relationship. The team of improvisers built patient scenes off this moving story, which made daring shifts in perspective, from the real world to secret worlds, inside and outside of bodies. There was a playfulness to the creativity, bold choices that verged on reckless that wouldn’t make the transition to a script." NYTimes Magnet Theater 254 West 29th St. New York NY 10001 Tickets The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Phil Sugar Sat Jul 25th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Rob Penty Sat Jul 18th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Tessa Flannery Sat Aug 1st, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Carson Olshanksky Sat Aug 8th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Suerynn Lee Sat Aug 15th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Kate Jordan Sat Aug 22nd, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Monologist TBA Sat Aug 29th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket Performers Justin Anderson Rick Andrews Christopher Bell Hannah Chase Kevin Cragg Shacottha Fields Elana Fishbein Megan Gray Eleanor Lewis Christine Magee Dennis Pacheco Xavier Padin Jamie R

DOORS: 7:00PM | SHOW: 7:30PM | ALL AGES It's a party, and you're invited! Jackbox Game devs are joining forces with Astronomy Club to bring you a night of head-to-head joke writing battles and hilarious improvised presentations. Hosted by Jackbox game developers and comedians Brooke Breit and CJ Tuor, Jackbox Live features a star-studded panel of comedians from the renowned group, Astronomy Club. Watch as comedians go head-to-head in joke-writing and presentation party games like Quiplash 3 , Talking Points , and Joke Boat . Bring your phone! You'll use it as your controller to influence the games by voting on your favorite jokes and help decide who takes home the win. And you can take cute pics to tag us in <3 @playjackboxgames HOSTED BY: Brooke Breit C.J. shows.title: ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. shows.title: ASSSSCAT LA
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by true stories from a surprise celebrity guest. ASSSSCAT has played to critical acclaim and sold-out audiences across the country. What Is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians taking the stage with a surprise celebrity guest. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our “monologist “ shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestions. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world. Previous celebrity guests include: Will Ferrell, Mark Hamill, Tina Fey, Charles Barkley, Don Cheadle, Elizabeth Banks, Aubrey Plaza, Kumail Nanjiani, Amy Poehler, Robin Williams and more. Why See ASSSSCAT? ASSSSCAT is one of the best improv comedy shows in Los Angeles. Each show is a one-of-a-kind live comedy experience. Whether you’re a longtime fan of UCB or searching for live comedy in LA for the first time, or looking for new exciting date ideas in LA, ASSSSCAT offers a chance to see the best comedians in LA at the top of their game, and don’t forget the surprise celebrity guest at every show! And don’t worry, if you can’t see the show live, we also offer a LIVESTREAM option for all performances! Critics and audiences agree: “Unbelievably funny.” – LA Times • “Best of LA: Best Improv.” – Los Angeles Magazine • “Best of LA: Best Improv Show.” – LA Weekly Readers Poll • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” – Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” – Vice Magazine • “Critics’ Pick” – Time Out Los Angeles About the Venue The Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is one of the most well-known comedy venues in Los Angeles

shows.title: Metal Boy Presents: Your Worst Idea
shows.description: Behind every great idea, there are 50 other terrible ones that came first. Your Worst Idea takes the garbage, shines it up, and gives it a second chance. Each show, we'll invite a guest to offer up a never-before-seen work of art (a poem from 7th grade! A terrible sketch! Pages from a diary!). Metal Boy will perform a live reading, then like a phoenix, spin comedy gold from its ashes. The cast of Your Worst Idea includes comedy vets from all over NYC—credits include: Search Party (HBO), Birdgirl and The Venture Bros. (Adult Swim), the Rude Tales of Magic podcast, Baby Wants Candy, Reductress, The Truth podcast, Story Pirates, Improv Everywhere, and UCB Comedy. They also once performed an improv show before a free screening of a Zack Galifiankis movie. DOORS: 6:30PM | SHOW: 7:00PM | ALL AGES DOORS: 8:30PM | SHOW: 9:00PM | ALL AGES Improv from the team that brought you Netflix’s Astronomy Club: The Sketch Show . Have you ever had a moment or experience that felt like it was destined? A coincidence that was simply too big to be an accident, or so serendipitous that it must have been written… in the stars?? In a show that will reveal the meaning behind it all, Astronomy Club will take these moments from audience stories and create a very funny, (maybe fateful, possibly fortuitous??!!) fully improvised hour of comedy. Cast: James III, Shawtane Bowen, Jonathan Braylock, Ray Cordova, Caroline Martin, Jerah Milligan , Monique Moses , Keisha Zollar _____________________ Additional option to include our monthly cocktail, "Summertime Spritz" , with your ticket. It includes a blend of Lillet Blanc and strawberry purée, lifted with a splash of soda water and topped off with a Prosecco split. Served over ice and garnished with a lemon wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: The Nemeth Bros. Present: Hunkamania
shows.excerpt: A pro wrestling comedy variety show brought to you by TNA wrestlers Ryan & Nic Nemeth and friends! With special appearances by the Midnight Rumble roster! Hunkamania is a wrestling-themed comedy variety show featuring The Nemeth Bros, touring comedians, improvisers,…
shows.description: A pro wrestling comedy variety show brought to you by TNA wrestlers Ryan & Nic Nemeth and friends! With special appearances by the Midnight Rumble roster! Hunkamania is a wrestling-themed comedy variety show featuring The Nemeth Bros, touring comedians, improvisers, and special surprise guests from the world of pro wrestling! Featuring performers from UCB, as well as a special appearances by the Midnight Rumble roster! Nic Nemeth is a multi-time WWE Champion, and a future Hall of Famer. He’s performed on Comedy Central’s Roast Battle , and is in the new film Drugstore June . Ryan Nemeth is an actor & comedian, has wrestled in WWE NXT, AEW, and TNA, and his credits include The Iron Claw , I Think You Should Leave , countless sketches on Jimmy Kimmel Live! and the upcoming film Stranglehold . The Nemeth Bros can be seen together on TNA Impact every Thursday on AMC 9/8 Central! Hosted by Nic & Ryan Nemeth Featuring: Carl Tart, Anna Lore, Claire Sundbye, Alex Fernie, Mel Cowan, PJ McCormick & Emily Mathwich — Tickets are $15 in advance and $20 on the day of the show. Livestream tickets are $10. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one hour before the show. Link will remain accessible for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre 5919 Franklin Avenue, Los Angeles, CA

shows.title: SpotlightCTRL: Unmuted
shows.excerpt: SpotlightCTRL: UNMUTED is a high-energy live experience where the comedy club meets the block party and collides on stage. Created by Chicago producer and creative director Anna Marisol and hosted by nationally recognized radio and television per...
shows.description: SpotlightCTRL: UNMUTED is a high-energy live experience where the comedy club meets the block party and collides on stage. Created by Chicago producer and creative director Anna Marisol and hosted by nationally recognized radio and television personality Headkrack, UNMUTED blends long-form improvisation, live music, comedy, storytelling, and audience interaction into a one-night-only performance experience built entirely in real time. Backed by a dynamic ensemble of improvisers, musicians, comedians, and special guests, every performance unfolds differently, fueled by live collaboration, emotional honesty, crowd energy, and spontaneous moments that can never be recreated twice. The ensemble includes performers with backgrounds spanning Chicago’s renowned improv institutions, independent theaters, and live performance communities, creating an experience that feels both expertly crafted and completely unpredictable. Blending the excitement of a live concert, the intimacy of a comedy club, and the communal energy of a block party, SpotlightCTRL pushes beyond traditional improv formats to create unforgettable live entertainment audiences feel long after the night ends. No scripts. No safety net. No two shows are ever the same. _____________________ Additional option to include our monthly cocktail, "Summertime Spritz" , with your ticket. It includes a blend of Lillet Blanc and strawberry purée, lifted with a splash of soda water and topped off with a Prosecco split. Served over ice and garnished with a lemon wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: Spank: Come See This Show or Your Whole Family Will Die / Mrs. Mayberry Hires a Temporary Literary Secretary
shows.excerpt: See a brand new sketch or solo show birthed right before your eyes that is auditioning for a run at the UCB theater. It's a show where we let sketch teams and solo performers try some shit out! Some will…
shows.description: See a brand new sketch or solo show birthed right before your eyes that is auditioning for a run at the UCB theater. It’s a show where we let sketch teams and solo performers try some shit out! Some will be good, some will be bad but it will all be weird and new and that’s what makes it fun! It’s experimental sketch at its finest! Come on, you know you need a spanking. This Monday, we have… Come See This Show or Your Whole Family Will Die: Growing Up with OCD A comedic take on the absurdities of growing up with OCD (Obsessive Compulsive Disorder). From UCB trained Sketch Writer and Mental Health Advocate Julia Doogan comes a freshly unique take on the absurdities of growing up with Obsessive Compulsive Disorder. The (mostly) true tale follows a childhood Julia ( Claire Wunschel ) as she’s introduced to her own OCD ( Shahriar Ghoudsifar ) for the first time. Will she get through it with the help of her American Girl Doll, ’70s icon Julie Albright? Or will OCD successfully convince her that he is the one true God, all mighty and powerful? Come find out, or as OCD would say, “Your Whole Family Will Die.” Written & directed by Julia Doogan Starring Claire Wunschel & Shahriar Ghoudsifar and Mrs. Mayberry Hires a Temporary Literary Secretary UCBLA Maude and Characters Welcome alum Amanda Walgrove presents a tongue-twisting solo show inside the weird, wacky, and whimsical world of Mrs. Mary Marie Mayberry, an original character born at UCB back in 2018. Amanda’s Mrs. Mayberry short film won the Highest Commendation Laurel at the 2020 London-Worldwide Comedy Short Film Festival. Some years later, Mrs. Mayberry is still seeking an exemplary temporary literary secretary…and you might just be the perfect fit! Written & performed by Amanda Walgrove Directed by Jeremy Guskin — All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Under 17 must be accomp

shows.title: Steamworks The Musical 2026
shows.excerpt: Al's a new gay in Chicago looking for love in the big city when he bumps into the most beautiful man he's ever seen on the streets of Northalsted one night. Desperate to make his acquaintance, Al follows him into the legendary bathhouse Ste
shows.description: Al's a new gay in Chicago looking for love in the big city when he bumps into the most beautiful man he's ever seen on the streets of Northalsted one night. Desperate to make his acquaintance, Al follows him into the legendary bathhouse Steamworks. As he makes his way through the maze of jacuzzis, slings, gloryholes, and fuck benches, Al makes a wild group of friends who help him discover what love might really mean when everyone's covered in cum.

shows.title: ComedySportz
shows.excerpt: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whet...
shows.description: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whether you're bringing your family, your co-workers, or a date - you are welcome, and you will laugh. ComedySportz is two teams of all-star improv comedians going head to head in comedy games, scenes and songs. YOU will vote on which team you liked the best and the teams will score points based on your applause. One of our world-famous referees will guide you through the whole show and may even ask for your help on stage. Every show ends in our incredible 6 THINGS game that is known throughout the world as 'the hardest game in all of improv'. It's fast. It's hilarious. It's appropriate for all ages. It's ComedySportz.

shows.title: iO Fest '26 4-Day Pass
shows.excerpt: iO Fest 2026 -- Chicago's largest improv festival returns on July 23-26! Four days packed full of improv, sketch, performance art, musical improv, music, and more with over 120 acts from all over the world. Purchase of this 4-Day GA Pass grants ...
shows.description: iO Fest 2026 -- Chicago's largest improv festival returns on July 23-26! Four days packed full of improv, sketch, performance art, musical improv, music, and more with over 120 acts from all over the world. Purchase of this 4-Day GA Pass grants access to all of the General Admission performances taking place over the weekend. Space is limited in each of our performing spaces so access is not guaranteed and is based on first come first seated general admission availability. Shows take place each day approximately from 5pm-1am. ***Purchase of this 4-Day GA Pass DOES NOT grant admission to any headliner shows: 3Peat, Armando, Astronomy Club, Baby Wants Candy, Claire + Kim, Comedy Dance Chicago, ¡ESCÁNDALO!, Improvised Shakespeare Co., Jackbox Games, James Conklin Memorial Scholarship Show, Parker Callahan, SAND, The Sloppy Boys, UCB Soundtrack, and Unmuted. Tickets for those specific shows much be purchased separately.*** 4-Day GA Passes are non transferable and non-refundable, no exceptions. Purchaser must show up to our box office with matching ID to receive their 4-Day GA Pass. iO Fest is an all ages event, but due to the improvised nature of our shows, we cannot guarantee the appropriateness of each show for younger audiences. Follow iO on social media to stay up to date with all information related to iO Fest 2026.

shows.description: Magician Jay Collen performs selected tricks covering a century of close-up magic created by Chicago magicians. Audiences are limited to 30 per performance so that everyone can experience the magic up close. Audience members are encouraged to participate in discussion about the each trick and its Chicago history. Jay performs extensively, is the Senior Magic Teacher at Magic, Incorporated, has written acclaimed books on magic, and is a magician member of the famous Magic Castle in Hollywood.

shows.excerpt: A weekly show where anyone can sign up with or without a group to perform improv on the LSI stage! Sign ups start at 5:30pm, show starts right at 6:00pm. If you want to perform at LSI, this is a great place to start! Show up, make some new
shows.description: A weekly show where anyone can sign up with or without a group to perform improv on the LSI stage! Sign ups start at 5:30pm, show starts right at 6:00pm. If you want to perform at LSI, this is a great place to start! Show up, make some new friends, and get some reps! LSI Open Stage has a max of 10 teams plus the mashup teams in order to provide everyone with enough stage time for their set. First come, first serve, doors open at 5:30pm. Free agents (performers who arrive without a team) are always welcome and encouraged to join the mashup teams! Sign ups / Doors Open 5:30 PM Show 6:00 PM - 7:30 PM Cost Free to watch!

shows.description: A bi-weekly improv show where you can bring your own improv team to perform, with a jam after!! Let’s Fucking Go!! Want to bring your team? We’re looking for teams from all levels of experience – A practice group that’s met up a few times? A team that’s been around since the before times? A group that should really make it out of the group chat? We love it all, and we’ll jam right after!! Submit your group here . Your team will be notified when selected! 2nd and 4th Sunday of every month: Show 6:30 – 7:30pm ($5 and free for students) Jam 7:30 – 8:30pm (Free for all, no team needed to jam) Follow us at @letsfuckinggoimprov for show and jam details. Hosted by Alex Yang & Co! —- Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. shows.description: A monthly comedy night with a surprise party feel where anything can happen, featuring special guests, stand-up performances and music. Like a party at your best friend’s house. shows.description: DOORS: 6:30 PM SHOW: 7:00 PM Eris Deep Space (downstairs) New York's favorite book club returns to BCC with an extra dose of cottage core in this month's Read to Filth. shows.description: LA’s funniest take on real life. Living Room Living Room is the premiere long-form improv show held at the World’s Greatest Improv School, where the city’s best comedians turn real stories into hilarious, totally unscripted scenes. Each week features a rotating cast of WGIS’s top performers—plus surprise guests from TV, film, and the national improv scene. Main Cast: Will Hines ( Broad City, Comedy Bang Bang, Brooklyn 99 ) Sarah Claspell ( Brooklyn 99, Jimmy Kimmel Live, Drunk History ) Jim Woods ( The Office, How I Met Your Mother, Reno 911 ) Beth Appel ( Sex Lives of College Girls, Never Have I Ever ) Dave Theune ( St. Denis Medical, Frasier ) Jamie Gaul ( General Hospital, Grey’s Anatomy, Medium ) Surprise guests every week. Past guests include: Colton Dunn ( Superstore, Key & Peele ) Zeke Nicholson ( Dropout TV, The Good Place, A.P. Bio ) Connor Ratliff ( Mean Girls, The George Lucas Talk Show ) + more!! shows.title: *FREE* ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: UCBNY presents a *FREE* ASSSSCAT! Tickets for this show are free, but you must make a reservation online and arrive prior to 8:25pm for a seat. Seating is first come first served so any arrival after 8:25pm is not guaranteed.…
shows.description: UCBNY presents a *FREE* ASSSSCAT! Tickets for this show are free, but you must make a reservation online and arrive prior to 8:25pm for a seat. Seating is first come first served so any arrival after 8:25pm is not guaranteed. Tickets will become available on Friday, July 24th, at 12pm ET. Come back to this page then! If you do not reserve a seat in advance, please still show up anyways and we’ll try to get you in if there are some no-shows! ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are FREE to reserve! Please note: this show will not be live streamed All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre: 242 East 14th Street, New York, NY 10003

shows.title: ASSSSCAT LA
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by true stories from a surprise celebrity guest. ASSSSCAT has played to critical acclaim and sold-out audiences across the country. What Is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians taking the stage with a surprise celebrity guest. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our “monologist “ shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestions. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world. Previous celebrity guests include: Will Ferrell, Mark Hamill, Tina Fey, Charles Barkley, Don Cheadle, Elizabeth Banks, Aubrey Plaza, Kumail Nanjiani, Amy Poehler, Robin Williams and more. Why See ASSSSCAT? ASSSSCAT is one of the best improv comedy shows in Los Angeles. Each show is a one-of-a-kind live comedy experience. Whether you’re a longtime fan of UCB or searching for live comedy in LA for the first time, or looking for new exciting date ideas in LA, ASSSSCAT offers a chance to see the best comedians in LA at the top of their game, and don’t forget the surprise celebrity guest at every show! And don’t worry, if you can’t see the show live, we also offer a LIVESTREAM option for all performances! Critics and audiences agree: “Unbelievably funny.” – LA Times • “Best of LA: Best Improv.” – Los Angeles Magazine • “Best of LA: Best Improv Show.” – LA Weekly Readers Poll • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” – Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” – Vice Magazine • “Critics’ Pick” – Time Out Los Angeles About the Venue The Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is one of the most well-known comedy venues in Los Angeles

shows.title: Matt and Dru: We're Dads Now So We Shouldn't Be Doing This
shows.excerpt: Matt Moskovciak and Dru Johnston have been friends for almost 20 years, doing sketch comedy almost the whole time. Until, that is, they each became a father three years ago. Suddenly they had things far more important than premises and beats and b...
shows.description: Matt Moskovciak and Dru Johnston have been friends for almost 20 years, doing sketch comedy almost the whole time. Until, that is, they each became a father three years ago. Suddenly they had things far more important than premises and beats and buttons to worry about. But the old sketch itch has grabbed them again. They stole time where they could, meeting up in breweries and coffee shops to cobble together a show of brand new sketches. Now, for truly no good reason other then their own joy, they are returning to their old habits: doing a sketch show. Come see! Directed by Will Hines

shows.title: Gravid Water
shows.excerpt: Gravid Water is a theater/improv mash-up featuring the biggest names in comedy, theater, TV, and film. Gravid Water is a theatrical-comedy experiment where actors are given real scenes from real plays that they prepare as they would for a regular…
shows.description: Gravid Water is a theater/improv mash-up featuring the biggest names in comedy, theater, TV, and film. Gravid Water is a theatrical-comedy experiment where actors are given real scenes from real plays that they prepare as they would for a regular play. They are paired with improvisers who have no prior knowledge of the scenes—seeing and reacting to them for the first time on stage. The always surprising results are hilarious, heartbreaking, and everything in between. Gravid Water has played to sold-out houses in New York and Los Angeles for over fifteen years, as well as the Kennedy Center and theaters across the country. Starring the biggest names in comedy, Broadway, television, and movies, Gravid Water is honored to bring this wild experiment back home to the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. shows.title: Ya'll Mic
shows.excerpt: Looking for a Stand-up Comedy Open Mic that’s a supportive room and always a good time? Look no further than the Ya'll Mic. Whether you’re a seasoned comic, an improvisor who’s always wanted to try standup, or you just decided that today’s
shows.description: Looking for a Stand-up Comedy Open Mic that’s a supportive room and always a good time? Look no further than the Ya'll Mic. Whether you’re a seasoned comic, an improvisor who’s always wanted to try standup, or you just decided that today’s the day for your first open mic (kudos) – The Ya'll Mic is a great venue to workshop your bits. The show is every Tuesday from 5:30pm – 7:30pm. Signup is online and the signup sheet is posted on Facebook & IG on Mondays. The list is emailed out a few hours before the show. Comics get 4 minutes of stage time (and a lifetime of memories.) While all are welcome, the room prioritizes BIPOC, LGBTQ+, and Femme comics. Come laugh with us!

shows.title: CLIP SHOW: A Stand-Up Open Mic
shows.excerpt: A low-stakes open mic where comedians have the options of filming their sets and getting constructive feedback from the crowd. Come through to the UCB Annex every 4th Tuesday of the month to get some stage time in a supportive…
shows.description: A low-stakes open mic where comedians have the options of filming their sets and getting constructive feedback from the crowd. Come through to the UCB Annex every 4th Tuesday of the month to get some stage time in a supportive room, practice your routine, and get some clips to feed the ever-hungry Content Machine! This is a fun, low-stakes mic for experienced performers as well as Improv students who have been flirting with the idea of stand-up. You will have the option of doing a regular 5 minutes or to reserve some of your time for positive, constructive feedback. We’ll get as many comics up as we can so we can all create some of that sweet, sweet content for Our Lord And Savior, The Algorithm. Womxn, trans, non-binary, and LGBTQIA+ strongly encouraged. Let’s make a space that feels safe and comfortable for everyone. Hosted by Abbey Perez — This event is FREE! Just walk in. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Annex 1925 N Bronson Ave Los Angeles, CA 90068

shows.title: Experimental Mic
shows.excerpt: An open mic where comedians can push boundaries, try bold new ideas, and embrace the unpredictable. The comedy laboratory where anything can happen! Every Tuesday at the UCB Annex, this isn’t your average open mic. It’s a playground for comedians…
shows.description: An open mic where comedians can push boundaries, try bold new ideas, and embrace the unpredictable. The comedy laboratory where anything can happen! Every Tuesday at the UCB Annex, this isn’t your average open mic. It’s a playground for comedians to push boundaries, try bold new ideas, and embrace the unpredictable. From themed sets and tag-team comedy to audience challenges and heckle-friendly rounds, it brings a fresh lineup of inventive formats designed to keep performers and audiences on their toes. Whether you’re a seasoned comic testing new material or a first-timer stepping into the spotlight, Experimental Mic is the perfect space to get weird, wild, and wonderfully hilarious. Come see comedians experiment, fail gloriously, and maybe create something brilliant. It’s raw, unfiltered, and absolutely hilarious. You don’t want to miss it. Each comic gets 5 minutes. 15 performance spots available. Come put your name in the bucket at 7pm to see if you’re chosen. Hosted by Deric Brown — This show is free! Just walk in. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Annex 1925 N Bronson Avenue, Los Angeles, CA

Each Wednesday at 6pm, a new improv team will open the show, followed by Blue.0 performing their original form, The Wagon. Eligible teams include those borne of New Team Smell, iO Grad Shows, house teams, lab casts, Harolds After Dark, and Kickstart teams! Are you part of a team that was formed at iO? shows.title: Lt. Love Dr's Boot Camp for Lonely People like You
shows.excerpt: Lt. Love Dr. Hotty McTotty has traveled back in time from 2075 on a mission to save human connection.. before it’s too late. Through a series of drills like small talk, eye contact, speed dating, and friendly banter, audiences will rally to
shows.description: Lt. Love Dr. Hotty McTotty has traveled back in time from 2075 on a mission to save human connection.. before it’s too late. Through a series of drills like small talk, eye contact, speed dating, and friendly banter, audiences will rally together to combat the loneliness epidemic and our increasingly isolated reality. This hilarious, heartfelt, and surprisingly impactful show encourages you to make friends, disconnect from the digital world, and rediscover what it means to be human, if only for a night. "The beating heart of Fringe comedy" 4 stars, Broadway Baby "Wonderful" 4 stars, Eat More Art Vegas Fresh off of a four-city tour, and headed to Edinburgh Fringe, catch this show in Chicago for one night only!

shows.excerpt: Comedians compete to perform the jobs of their non-famous relatives, judged by someone with a famous relative! These performers may not have famous parents, but everybody is related to somebody. Join host Claire Downs and our special nepo guest judge,…
shows.description: Comedians compete to perform the jobs of their non-famous relatives, judged by someone with a famous relative! These performers may not have famous parents, but everybody is related to somebody. Join host Claire Downs and our special nepo guest judge, Kristian Moreno (son of Deftones lead singer Chino Moreno) in a hilarious experiment to find out whether DNA plays a role. Can a comedian complete a Rubik’s cube in one minute because their dad taught analytical mathematics? Chop wood because their grandfather was a logger? Perform a sermon in honor of their pastor mother? It’s happened before! shows.title: The FREE WEDNESDAY SHOW feat Dumb John and Birdlady
shows.excerpt: ***This is a free show, but it is highly recommended to reserve your ticket here to guarantee entry.***** Regarded as one of Chicago's funniest and most promising improv groups of the last decade, Dumb John is proud to take the iO Stage with Bird...
shows.description: ***This is a free show, but it is highly recommended to reserve your ticket here to guarantee entry.***** Regarded as one of Chicago's funniest and most promising improv groups of the last decade, Dumb John is proud to take the iO Stage with Birdlady in a new weekly long form improv show. Both teams apply their high energy strain of improvisation to a bizarre cultural harvest of small town Americana influence and ephemera, using a single audience suggestion to inspire a piece of unhinged long form improv that propels diesel-soaked characters through fever dream karaoke scenes and down neon aisles of roadside antique marts; exploring the depravity and brilliance found at the heart of every moment. Take flight with two back to back original iO ensembles, Birdlady and Dumb John! Every Wednesday night at 7:30 (FREE), watch as they migrate toward their ultimate destination: hilarious long-form improvisation! It’ll be a HOOT! They’re so funny this show should be Ill-EAGLE! People can’t stop RAVEN about this show! DOORS: 7:00pm SHOW: 7:30pm Birdlady is: Ali Khan Alonso Ramirez Daryn Robinson Devin Henderson Erin Washington Justin Parlette Lauren Frost Ryan Nolan Dumb John is: Mike Geraghty Steve Plock Linda Orr Traycie Mcbee Follow our teams on Instagram at @birdlady.io & @dumbjohn

shows.title: Dating Dell'Amico
shows.excerpt: Join Sarah Dell'Amico (Second City Mainstage Alum, The Improvised Shakespeare Company) as she "dates" a different friend each week. "Dating Dell'Amico" is a completely improvised show that will take audiences on the journey of couples date night. ...
shows.description: Join Sarah Dell'Amico (Second City Mainstage Alum, The Improvised Shakespeare Company) as she "dates" a different friend each week. "Dating Dell'Amico" is a completely improvised show that will take audiences on the journey of couples date night. Audiences will shout out a number between 1 and 50 and whatever number is given will be the number date the couple will be on. Dating is like wine tasting. The first glass is a hell of a lot different than the 12th. You'll gulp, you'll savor, you'll wish you had more wine. Budget friendly, chemistry heavy, and fully improvised - "Dating Dell'Amico" explores a couple's relationship and all of the other characters the couple might encounter on their date. Fantastic Improv teams from all over Chicago will open the show getting you emotionally committed for the date you are about to see blossom. "My ideal first date? This. You. Wednesday nights in July. 7:30 PM. iO Theatre." - Sarah Dell'Amico and Jenny Aniston.

shows.title: Trigger Finger: Rip Off!
shows.excerpt: Rip Off! is a tear-away clothes improv show! Come with your unique ideas and suggestions, you could get the chance to write it on the back of an improvisor’s undershirt that they will have to incorporate into the show when their over-shirt gets ri...
shows.description: Rip Off! is a tear-away clothes improv show! Come with your unique ideas and suggestions, you could get the chance to write it on the back of an improvisor’s undershirt that they will have to incorporate into the show when their over-shirt gets ripped off! Your hump day just got a little more exciting. _____________________ Additional option to include our monthly cocktail, "Summertime Spritz" , with your ticket. It includes a blend of Lillet Blanc and strawberry purée, lifted with a splash of soda water and topped off with a Prosecco split. Served over ice and garnished with a lemon wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: Bits for Backpacks
shows.excerpt: Homework is optional. Helping kids isn't. Join NYC's funniest comedians for a school-themed variety show benefiting Broadway Serves' Operation Backpack campaign. School's in session—and this time, the only homework is laughing. Join some of NYC's funniest comedians for Bits…
shows.description: Homework is optional. Helping kids isn’t. Join NYC’s funniest comedians for a school-themed variety show benefiting Broadway Serves’ Operation Backpack campaign. School’s in session—and this time, the only homework is laughing. Join some of NYC’s funniest comedians for Bits for Backpacks, a one-night-only comedy variety show benefiting Broadway Serves’ Operation Backpack campaign. Inspired by this year’s theme, School Daze, performers will bring their funniest characters, PowerPoints, songs, stand-up, storytelling, clown pieces, and delightfully unhinged creations celebrating everything from kindergarten to college, theatre kids to teachers, cafeteria politics to commencement speeches. Expect a fast-paced night of original comedy, nostalgic school memories, and wonderfully ridiculous takes on education in all its forms. Best of all, every laugh helps make a difference. Instead of a traditional ticket, audience members are encouraged to bring a new backpack (or make an equivalent donation at the door) to support Operation Backpack, helping provide NYC students experiencing homelessness with the tools they need to start the school year with confidence. For what to include and other information, please review the Backpack Guidelines linked here . Whether you were the class clown, the teacher’s pet, the theatre kid, or someone who spent a little too much time in detention, there’s a seat for you in this classroom. Come laugh. Give back. Help a student start the school year strong. Link to donation page: https://donate.voa-gny.org/-/NQZTPARK?member=SNALLZDX Hosted by Lauren Brickman & Special Emcee JOHN ARTHUR HILL (Radio Andy, Broadway’s Hairspray & Boy from Oz, and so much more!) Featuring: Katy Berry & Adrian Frimpong Caitlin Bitzegaio Laura Canty-Samuel Tim Girrbach Larry Dorsay Jr Tony Harkin and Emily Tarver & Vicci Martinez with more TBA —- This is a fundraiser! Admittance: One NEW backpack or $20 donation (students pay what you can, suggested $10 donation). Payme

shows.title: Pop
shows.excerpt: Chris Gethard (HBO's Career Suicide, Beautiful/Anonymous, The Office) examines his family's immigration journey 100 years after their arrival in America. In 1928, my grandfather left a small village in Northern Ireland and eventually made his way to America. 100…
shows.description: Chris Gethard (HBO’s Career Suicide, Beautiful/Anonymous, The Office) examines his family’s immigration journey 100 years after their arrival in America. In 1928, my grandfather left a small village in Northern Ireland and eventually made his way to America. 100 years later I ask: was it worth it? If he knew America (see Minneapolis, MN and Newark, NJ) was going to wind up looking so much like Northern Ireland (see Belfast, Derry, etc), would he have sacrificed everything? Sub-topics and questions include: Irish-American hypocrisy, “Did I fund the IRA as a small child?”, the under-appreciated cultural impact of 90s hip hop group House of Pain, the strange and strained relationship between Irish people and Irish-Americans, and what it’s like to visit your ancestral village only to find out that it’s segregated to this day and still full of pain. Please keep in mind that this is very much a work-in-progress and the experience of attending will be less of a traditional show and more of a dialogue between performer and audience. This show is being kept extraordinarily cheap as a recognition that it is an evolving experiment and this evening represents its very beginning stages. Your feedback will be welcomed and the hope is that you will find it intriguing, challenging, and exciting to help a thoughtful hour of comedic storytelling rise up from the ooze on its way to becoming something fully formed. Featuring: Chris Gethard —- Tickets are $5 plus fees. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre: 242 East 14th Street, New York, NY 10003

shows.title: Show Me Your Dick: A Lifetime of Dating in a Larger Body
shows.excerpt: A solo show exploring the trials and tribulations of dating while being fat. Told through unsolicited dick pics and gross messages from men online. Yes, you will be seeing dicks. Fun fact, in my 15+ years of dating, I have…
shows.description: A solo show exploring the trials and tribulations of dating while being fat. Told through unsolicited dick pics and gross messages from men online. Yes, you will be seeing dicks. Fun fact, in my 15+ years of dating, I have received over 90 unsolicited dick pics — HOW COULD THIS BE? My whole life has been plagued by men wanting me to see their dicks or hear about their dicks without my permission. They were desperate to sexualize me but not date me. Maybe my face doesn’t necessarily say “show me your dick” but my body says “please disrespect me because you think less of me than you do of thin, conventionally attractive women.” There is an actual science behind sending unsolicited dick pics, and typically it’s a way for men to exert their power over the recipient; especially when the recipient is in a body that society deems as “unattractive”. But also, did you know that BBW (big beautiful women, aka ME) is the most searched category on Pornhub; yet society says fat women are less than and their bodies are wrong. So, is it really a surprise that me as a fat woman gets more unsolicited dick pics than my conventionally attractive female counterparts? NOPE!
