shows.title: Thursday Night Improv Hosted by Creamboy
shows.excerpt: If you’re looking for a date night, girls’ night out, or a mandatory work outing (that your staff will actually like) — Look no further! Fast, funny, and frothy, Thursday Night Improv is entirely improvised and features a different guest opener f...
shows.description: If you’re looking for a date night, girls’ night out, or a mandatory work outing (that your staff will actually like) — Look no further! Fast, funny, and frothy, Thursday Night Improv is entirely improvised and features a different guest opener for veteran iO house team Creamboy every week. Every show is completely different, so you can keep coming back for more! Will you be the lucky audience member to receive the coveted title of Cream of the Week? Creamboy is made up of seasoned Chicago improvisers who play and teach all over the city (and country! And WORLD?!) which means this show is perfect for improv nerds, millennials who love Tina Fey, and even your cousin visiting from Kansas. Comedy so good you'll lick your lips and pat your belly. Mmmm so creamy! Get a taste of Creamboy on Instagram @ creamboy.io

shows.title: Junk Drawer Comedy
shows.excerpt: It’s time to dig deep inside your Junk Drawer and dredge up a blast from the past. This nostalgia-filled comedy show features people showing off real diary entries, class projects, songs, and more from their past. Then, a group of improv comedians...
shows.description: It’s time to dig deep inside your Junk Drawer and dredge up a blast from the past. This nostalgia-filled comedy show features people showing off real diary entries, class projects, songs, and more from their past. Then, a group of improv comedians perform scenes inspired by this material. Put some batteries in the old digital camera and get ready to make some new memories. Don’t forget to tag me in the Facebook album “RaNdOm<3”! (But for real, tag us in pictures and videos on Instagram @junkdrawershow).

shows.title: Improv: The Play
shows.excerpt: With the help of some of Chicago’s best actors, Improv: The Play is a new, hybrid version of long form improv happening only at the iO Theater. Each night, professional actors prepare a scene from a play. Their scene partners, however, are never ...
shows.description: With the help of some of Chicago’s best actors, Improv: The Play is a new, hybrid version of long form improv happening only at the iO Theater. Each night, professional actors prepare a scene from a play. Their scene partners, however, are never given a script, and must improvise their way through the scene. The result is a totally original, never before seen piece of theater. It’s drama, it’s comedy, it’s everything that’s magical about theater and improvisation. Come watch this brand-new show at iO and see something you won’t see anywhere else in the city. Featuring: Alex Beard Heather Mari Elijah Sloan Lexi Putter Lucas Pollitzer Marino Korellis Montrez Hawkins Nikk Tetreault Ryan Bowman Shawna Seals Directed by: James Dugan Produced by: Cory Hardin

shows.title: Duluth: An Improvised Midwest Murder
shows.excerpt: Inspired by the classic movie and hit FX show "Fargo", Duluth takes audiences into the world of true crime in the Midwest. The cast will improvise a story of murder, malfeasance, and general mayhem, all set against the backdrop of an audien
shows.description: Inspired by the classic movie and hit FX show "Fargo", Duluth takes audiences into the world of true crime in the Midwest. The cast will improvise a story of murder, malfeasance, and general mayhem, all set against the backdrop of an audience member's hometown. Complete with cops, criminals, and the everyday townsfolk who get caught in between, this show contrasts horrible crime with "Minnesota nice".

shows.title: Press Start: An Improvised Musical
shows.excerpt: Press Start: An Improvised Musical is a hilarious, high-energy full improvised musical inspired by the games you know and love. Each show, our cast creates a brand-new adventure on the spot using audience suggestions, complete with original
shows.description: Press Start: An Improvised Musical is a hilarious, high-energy full improvised musical inspired by the games you know and love. Each show, our cast creates a brand-new adventure on the spot using audience suggestions, complete with original songs, unforgettable characters, epic quests, and plenty of unexpected twists. From fantasy kingdoms and cozy villages to space battles and chaotic multiplayer mayhem, no two shows are ever the same. Whether you're a hardcore gamer or just love comedy and live theater, Press Start is a one-of-a-kind experience that turns the magic of games into a fully improvised musical adventure. Grab your party and get ready to press start.

shows.title: Not In My Backyard!
shows.excerpt: Comedians, journalists, and politicians debate all the local issues causing drama in your neighborhood’s Facebook group. From bike lanes and outdoor dining to dog poop and rats, our panel of comedians and experts gets to the bottom of how…
shows.description: Comedians, journalists, and politicians debate all the local issues causing drama in your neighborhood’s Facebook group. From bike lanes and outdoor dining to dog poop and rats, our panel of comedians and experts gets to the bottom of how this insane and beautiful city works. We’ll also quiz the audience on their own New York knowledge. Hosted by New York City’s most informed voters, Cody Lindquist (Colbert, Broad City, PTA Executive Board) and Charlie Todd (Improv Everywhere, Pixar In Real Life, Community Board). Not In My Backyard! has featured performers from The Daily Show and Saturday Night Live, journalists from The New York Times, NY1, and MSNOW, as well as Borough Presidents, NYC Council Members, State Senators, and State Assembly Members. This Month’s Panelists: Zhubin Parang (Writer, The Daily Show) Miser (MicromobilityNYC) Carl Wilson (NYC Council Member, District 3) —- In-person tickets are $10 in advance and $15 on the day of the show plus fees. shows.title: Blueprint
shows.excerpt: Blueprint is the kind of improv that keeps audiences AND players on their toes. Each week, a different cast member designs a bold new improv format that their fellow performers will learn about at the same time as the crowd. Expect the unexpected ...
shows.description: Blueprint is the kind of improv that keeps audiences AND players on their toes. Each week, a different cast member designs a bold new improv format that their fellow performers will learn about at the same time as the crowd. Expect the unexpected as we build something completely original, live, right before your eyes. Past forms have included: Improvised Severance - Guided by two internal "staff members," three performers are physically out of the room, while three others perform as their innies, and every 5 minutes, the two swapped. Can they make sense of their outies? and versa? Understudies - In a longform narrative, each player on stage knows that they will eventually understudy another player in the show. The lights change and they have to embody a different player, and each time the lights change, they can select another player to embody. Overachiever - Three 2-person monoscenes happen on stage, utilizing the same physical space, but taking place in categorically different spaces. They must navigate space atop of and around one another while keeping connection to their partner. Improvised Heist - Ocean's Eleven, eat your heart out! Our players hit the major plot points of a heist and improvise their way through - initial idea, building the team, planning the heist, executing, and the aftermath Blueprint is joined each week by a lab cast opening for the show with their own unique, original form. Directed by James Dugan Cast: James Dugan Avery Ford Molly Jones Allen Lucas Janelle Soulliere Ryan Bowman

shows.title: Blue Velvet Lounge
shows.excerpt: Step into the one glamorous but now lovingly frayed Blue Velvet Lounge, where the only thing not improvised are the jazz standards crooned by lounge singer Seth Lowry. As Seth’s velvet voice fades, the ensemble sweeps in, spinning spontaneo
shows.description: Step into the one glamorous but now lovingly frayed Blue Velvet Lounge, where the only thing not improvised are the jazz standards crooned by lounge singer Seth Lowry. As Seth’s velvet voice fades, the ensemble sweeps in, spinning spontaneous scenes inspired directly by the songs just performed. One moment, you’re eavesdropping on the eccentric regulars tucked into the lounge’s candlelit corners; the next, you’re whisked far beyond the club to follow the unexpected lives of the characters you just met—bartenders with secret ambitions, mysterious strangers with tangled pasts, and dreamers who stepped into the Blue Velvet for reasons they can’t quite explain. Playful, surprising, and steeped in a retro-cool vibe, this show blends live music and improvised storytelling into a one-of-a-kind night where every note inspires a new twist—and every visit to the Blue Velvet reveals something you’ve never seen before.

shows.title: TGIF with Duchovny & Olestra
shows.excerpt: Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But we do know it's improv every Friday @ 7pm! Buy Tickets
shows.description: DOORS: 6:30 PM SHOW: 7:00 PM Eris Deep Space (downstairs) "It's Friday night and the mood is right. Gonna have some fun, show you how it's done, TGIF". BCC is bringing back ABC's TGIF programming block Fridays at 7pm ET / 6 pm CT with Duchovny and Olestra. Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But it will be funny and it will be on Friday and we will thank god for both. Duchovny is a group of elite New York maniacs comprised of veteran improvisers, actors, and comedians who you've probably seen in TV, movies, and even the most coveted work of all, digital-only commercials that air before Youtube videos. Duchovny is fast paced, high energy and filled to the brim with chaos. Olestra is a squad of dangerous Chicago criminals who make out and beat the hell out of each other on stage here in New York. They evaded arrest by racking up credits in the entertainment industry; The Tonight Show, The Second City, UCB Betty, The Improvised Shakespeare Company, to name a few. shows.title: ComedySportz
shows.excerpt: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whet...
shows.description: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whether you're bringing your family, your co-workers, or a date - you are welcome, and you will laugh. ComedySportz is two teams of all-star improv comedians going head to head in comedy games, scenes and songs. YOU will vote on which team you liked the best and the teams will score points based on your applause. One of our world-famous referees will guide you through the whole show and may even ask for your help on stage. Every show ends in our incredible 6 THINGS game that is known throughout the world as 'the hardest game in all of improv'. It's fast. It's hilarious. It's appropriate for all ages. It's ComedySportz.

shows.title: The Last Word
shows.excerpt: The Last Word is the ONLY craft cocktail progression paired with a screenplay. Experience a high action comedy script complete with lights, sound, music, and other fun surprises throughout the night - including 4 cocktails crafted specifically fo...
shows.description: The Last Word is the ONLY craft cocktail progression paired with a screenplay. Experience a high action comedy script complete with lights, sound, music, and other fun surprises throughout the night - including 4 cocktails crafted specifically for each act of the show! STORY: Chartreuse is a real-life liqueur that sells millions of bottles every year, but only two people in the world know how to make it. When Mike finds one dying in the woods and is given the only known copy of the recipe, he has to decide if he can return it to the monastery that keeps it safe or die trying. DRINK PACKAGE: Select "GA + Drink Package" to have our 4 specialty cocktails brought to your table at key moments during the show. Server gratuity is included in the price. Not feeling a drink? No problem! The Last Word can be enjoyed entirely on its own. We believe the cocktails enhance the show, not make it. Select "General Admission" for a ticket without cocktails. Content Warning: Flashing lights, loud sounds, profanity, depictions of violence. Run Time: 2.5hrs including intermission The Last Friday of the month at the iO Theater thelastwordshow.com

shows.excerpt: Hundreds of miles offshore, a luxury cruise liner cuts through the Atlantic at double speed. At the helm? A megalomaniac captain in love with his own reflection & exploiting his beleaguered crew past their breaking point. As rebellion brews
shows.description: Hundreds of miles offshore, a luxury cruise liner cuts through the Atlantic at double speed. At the helm? A megalomaniac captain in love with his own reflection & exploiting his beleaguered crew past their breaking point. As rebellion brews below, things are also heating up above deck! Love blossoms among thrill-seeking women, a heavy metal band grapples with their past & present, and a council of walruses issues a prophecy for destruction. Rudder Bullshit is a new play from the masterminds that brought you Docked and Loaded. Featuring original rock ballads that are guaranteed to make you put your lighters up! Hop aboard and strap in for what critics are calling "an edge in your seat adventure"! It's some Rudder Bullshit!

shows.title: Devil's Daughter
shows.excerpt: The hottest show in town, Devil’s Daughter, features a cast of seasoned comedians who have performed together in Chicago and around the country for over a decade. This award-winning team has their own unique spin on a classic improv form, The Har...
shows.description: The hottest show in town, Devil’s Daughter , features a cast of seasoned comedians who have performed together in Chicago and around the country for over a decade. This award-winning team has their own unique spin on a classic improv form, The Harold , and is known for their solo scenes, artistic style, and dastardly sense of humor. Find them Friday nights performing alongside their favorite opening team - Hellmash ! Duration: 1.5 hrs Devil's Daughter Cast: Lisa Burton Gretchen Eng Max Ganet Adonis Holmes Garrett Kelly TJ King Harrison Lott Scott Piebenga Brad Pike May Regan Annie Sullivan Mary Tilden Follow us on social media: Instagram: @devilsdaughterimprov Facebook: DevilsDaughterImprov Twitter: @devilsdaugh

shows.title: Improvised Shakespeare Chicago
shows.venue: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
venues: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
shows.excerpt: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William ...
shows.description: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William Shakespeare. Inspired by one audience suggestion (a title for a play that has yet to be written) the dazzling players create a brand-new Shakespearean masterpiece right before your eyes. Nothing has been planned out, rehearsed, or written. The dialogue is said for the first time, the characters are created as you watch, and if ever you're wondering where the story is going...so are they! You've never seen the Bard like this before! “There’s really nothing quite like it in the city of Chicago. Smart, sophisticated, downright hilarious.” -TimeOut Chicago “…the show channels Monty Python as often as the Bard, and frequently with sly-witted results.” -The Chicago Tribune “Consistently Hilarious” -The Chicago Reader “Staggeringly Brilliant” -TimeOut Chicago “Consistently funny…'Tis v'ry, v'ry good.” -The Chicago Tribune “Indisputably great improv, fueled by smart plot development, stage chemistry and recognizable characters.” -Centerstage Chicago “In short, outstanding.” -TimeOut Chicago Find out more at improvisedshakespeare.com _________________________ Additional option to include Improvised Shakespeare's featured cocktail, Hamlet , with your ticket. It includes Nolets Dry Gin, St-Germaine, Campari, orange juice, and garnished with an orange wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: CLOWN BOSS
shows.excerpt: A live directed jam and show from Clown Boss Chad Damiani. CLOWN BOSS is a free jam and show — moderated and live directed by the Clown Boss himself, Chad Damiani. Total newcomers are welcome to play — as well…
shows.description: A live directed jam and show from Clown Boss Chad Damiani. CLOWN BOSS is a free jam and show — moderated and live directed by the Clown Boss himself, Chad Damiani . Total newcomers are welcome to play — as well as students who’ve taken one or both of Chad’s UCB DISRUPTOR classes. Take the stage and play simple games designed to illustrate the nature of modern clown work. The jam takes place from 7:30-9:30pm — and is followed by a short show, featuring clowns at all levels presenting work (the show is also FREE). NOTE : Clown work can be physical and plays with elements of risk. Chad often teases students to create a sense of danger. In order to explore these elements safely and joyfully, newcomers must be present for Chad’s safety speech. This will happen after the initial warm-up, then again around the halfway point of the jam. — Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Annex 1925 N Bronson Ave Los Angeles, CA 90068

shows.title: ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. shows.title: Improvised Survivor: Abridged
shows.excerpt: Improvised Survivor brings Chicago’s most talented improvisers as they fight for the title of Sole Improvised Survivor. In this high-paced show, these castaways will compete for immunities granted by the audience and then vote each other out until...
shows.description: Improvised Survivor brings Chicago’s most talented improvisers as they fight for the title of Sole Improvised Survivor. In this high-paced show, these castaways will compete for immunities granted by the audience and then vote each other out until one remains. The audience will also potentially get an opportunity to be a part of the drama by obtaining the audience idol. Each show will have a new cast, a new winner, and a new theme. Who will be the next winner of Improvised Survivor? Only you can help decide. April 18th: Improvised SurvHIGHvor: All-Stars The best of Improvised Survivor compete against the best of Improvised Survivor: Abridged, but this time … everyone is HIGH! May 15th: Improvised Survivor: Study Hall The next generation of improvisers compete for the title of Sole Improvised Survivor. June 26th: Improvised Survivor: Drag Race Edition Improvisers have to lip-sync for their lives for the title of Sole Improvised Survivor.

shows.description: An all-ages improv show for kids AND adults featuring UCB’s best improvisers plus a chance for kids to get onstage themselves! Come join some of UCB’s best improvisers as they put on an all-ages comedy show so deeply appropriate, you can bring your kids to it! In fact, you SHOULD bring your kids to it! But wait… there’s more! Not only will you get to see a great improv set from some of Los Angeles’s best performers, kids in the audience 5 and up will also get the opportunity to hop on the UCB stage and do some improv themselves (while the adults just try to hold on) in a fun, funny and supportive environment. What’s more wildly appropriate than that? Hosted by Mae Tarica Fernie (age 7) as well as Deborah Tarica and Alex Fernie (who are much older). With special guests: Jeremy Culhane, Aman Adumer, Alex Berg and more TBA! — All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. shows.description: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whether you're bringing your family, your co-workers, or a date - you are welcome, and you will laugh. ComedySportz is two teams of all-star improv comedians going head to head in comedy games, scenes and songs. YOU will vote on which team you liked the best and the teams will score points based on your applause. One of our world-famous referees will guide you through the whole show and may even ask for your help on stage. Every show ends in our incredible 6 THINGS game that is known throughout the world as 'the hardest game in all of improv'. It's fast. It's hilarious. It's appropriate for all ages. It's ComedySportz.

shows.title: Improvised Jane Austen
shows.excerpt: "...countless laughs...whimsical homage to the illustrious author." -- Chicago Reader Improvised Jane Austen continues its entirely improvised tales of love and laughter this summer. Audiences will enjoy an evening with wit and heart in equal me...
shows.description: "...countless laughs...whimsical homage to the illustrious author." -- Chicago Reader Improvised Jane Austen continues its entirely improvised tales of love and laughter this summer. Audiences will enjoy an evening with wit and heart in equal measure with an improvised rom-com for everyone, whether you love Austen or just like to laugh! Improvised Jane Austen currently performs Saturday nights at 6:00 pm at iO Theater and tickets are $20. "...[They] took it, owned it and created some really funny and touching moments....an evening of silliness and indulgence....make running amok look like delicious fun." -- PerformInk Chicago Join Improvised Jane Austen for the signature romantic comedy and social satire of the beloved author, improvised by Chicago's top comedic talent. Celebrate all things love, friendship, and Austen this Summer. “...Improvised Jane Austen is one of the strongest improv troupes in the city. They have the ability to use Austen’s 19th century wit and sarcasm and make it recognizable for a 21st-century audience." --Scapi Magazine Improvised Jane Austen is a comedic ensemble that creates unscripted performances using Jane Austen's tropes, themes, and language to create a satirical romantic comedy set in Regency-era England. Playing in Austen’s world, Improvised Jane Austen’s stories delight 21st century audiences with a modern sense and sensibility. The current cast of 20+ performers rotate weekly, creating a new ensemble for every show. Come for the humor, stay for the heart! Throughout the show’s run, Improvised Jane Austen has been Chicago Reader Recommended , named a PerformInk Critics’ Pick , voted Best sketch/improv troupe 2019 in the Reader’s Best of Chicago , and was featured on WTTW playlist , in Time Out , the Chicago Tribune and on a their list of what to do on Valentine’s Day , on WGN’s Daytime Chicago in 2024 and 2026 and on CBS News Chicago . Learn more: https://improvisedjaneausten.com/

Hosted by The Craft, this show brings together students, indie performers, and UCB legends! Each show features four teams: The Craft, two invited improv teams, and a student mash-up team made up of performers who sign up at the show (names pulled from a bucket!). Two rotating UCB performers (teachers, alumni, house team members) join each month as the monologist and guest players! Whether you’re a student looking to jump into the mash-up or a comedy fan who loves to laugh, come join us for a show that celebrates the awesome talent in the UCB community! shows.title: The Armando Diaz Experience
shows.description: The legendary show is reborn! Created in 1995 at the iO Theater in Chicago, The Armando Diaz Experience IS the longest running improv show EVER. A guest monologist takes a suggestion from the audience and shares true stories from their life. These stories are then brought to life by a rotating cast of improv all-stars, which take audiences on a high minded, exhilarating comedic joy ride that will leave mouths tired of smiling. And occasionally, just occasionally, the man with his name on the show will drop by for some fun. "The “Armando,” performed every Saturday, always begins with a monologue, and at a recent show it was about a connection made on the internet that led a decade later to a real-life relationship. The team of improvisers built patient scenes off this moving story, which made daring shifts in perspective, from the real world to secret worlds, inside and outside of bodies. There was a playfulness to the creativity, bold choices that verged on reckless that wouldn’t make the transition to a script." NYTimes Magnet Theater 254 West 29th St. New York NY 10001 Tickets The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Tessa Flannery Sat Aug 1st, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Rob Penty Sat Jul 18th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Phil Sugar Sat Jul 25th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Carson Olshanksky Sat Aug 8th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Suerynn Lee Sat Aug 15th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Kate Jordan Sat Aug 22nd, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Monologist TBA Sat Aug 29th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket Performers Justin Anderson Rick Andrews Christopher Bell Hannah Chase Kevin Cragg Shacottha Fields Elana Fishbein Megan Gray Eleanor Lewis Christine Magee Dennis Pacheco Xavier Padin Jamie R

shows.excerpt: Infamous improv trio, Gunk, and beloved indie powerhouse, Shag, combine forces for this hour long improv show! Gunk is an infamous improv trio known for their chaotic, irreverent play style. "It felt like I was in a k-hole," one audience member sa...
shows.description: Infamous improv trio, Gunk, and beloved indie powerhouse, Shag, combine forces for this hour long improv show! Gunk is an infamous improv trio known for their chaotic, irreverent play style. "It felt like I was in a k-hole," one audience member said of a performance. You may have caught Gunk during their impressive win streaks in improv competition shows such as UCB's Cagematch and the Shared Experience Showdown. Shag is a beloved indie improv team made up of of seven women with thirteen outstanding parking tickets between them. You may have seen Shag on Fridays at WE, their UCB show or the 2022 Edinburgh Improv Festival.

shows.title: Improvised Shakespeare Chicago
shows.venue: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
venues: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
shows.excerpt: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William ...
shows.description: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William Shakespeare. Inspired by one audience suggestion (a title for a play that has yet to be written) the dazzling players create a brand-new Shakespearean masterpiece right before your eyes. Nothing has been planned out, rehearsed, or written. The dialogue is said for the first time, the characters are created as you watch, and if ever you're wondering where the story is going...so are they! You've never seen the Bard like this before! “There’s really nothing quite like it in the city of Chicago. Smart, sophisticated, downright hilarious.” -TimeOut Chicago “…the show channels Monty Python as often as the Bard, and frequently with sly-witted results.” -The Chicago Tribune “Consistently Hilarious” -The Chicago Reader “Staggeringly Brilliant” -TimeOut Chicago “Consistently funny…'Tis v'ry, v'ry good.” -The Chicago Tribune “Indisputably great improv, fueled by smart plot development, stage chemistry and recognizable characters.” -Centerstage Chicago “In short, outstanding.” -TimeOut Chicago Find out more at improvisedshakespeare.com _________________________ Additional option to include Improvised Shakespeare's featured cocktail, Hamlet , with your ticket. It includes Nolets Dry Gin, St-Germaine, Campari, orange juice, and garnished with an orange wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.excerpt: Celebrate 45 years of improvisational excellence with the Best of iO Improv. This show brings together two teams of our very best improvisers, each delivering a high energy, hilarious set in classic iO forms like the Living Room, Weirdass, Shotgun...
shows.description: Celebrate 45 years of improvisational excellence with the Best of iO Improv. This show brings together two teams of our very best improvisers, each delivering a high energy, hilarious set in classic iO forms like the Living Room, Weirdass, Shotgun, and more. Between sets, the show drops into The Dream, a surreal, mind bending journey through one day based on an interview with an audience member. Fast, fearless, and funny, this is iO improvisation at its highest level.

shows.title: ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. shows.title: ASSSSCAT LA
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by true stories from a surprise celebrity guest. ASSSSCAT has played to critical acclaim and sold-out audiences across the country. What Is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians taking the stage with a surprise celebrity guest. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our “monologist “ shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestions. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world. Previous celebrity guests include: Will Ferrell, Mark Hamill, Tina Fey, Charles Barkley, Don Cheadle, Elizabeth Banks, Aubrey Plaza, Kumail Nanjiani, Amy Poehler, Robin Williams and more. Why See ASSSSCAT? ASSSSCAT is one of the best improv comedy shows in Los Angeles. Each show is a one-of-a-kind live comedy experience. Whether you’re a longtime fan of UCB or searching for live comedy in LA for the first time, or looking for new exciting date ideas in LA, ASSSSCAT offers a chance to see the best comedians in LA at the top of their game, and don’t forget the surprise celebrity guest at every show! And don’t worry, if you can’t see the show live, we also offer a LIVESTREAM option for all performances! Critics and audiences agree: “Unbelievably funny.” – LA Times • “Best of LA: Best Improv.” – Los Angeles Magazine • “Best of LA: Best Improv Show.” – LA Weekly Readers Poll • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” – Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” – Vice Magazine • “Critics’ Pick” – Time Out Los Angeles About the Venue The Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is one of the most well-known comedy venues in Los Angeles

shows.description: The final bell just rang! You better get out of the classroom and get your ass to the iO Theater for After School Special brought to you by iO's first all-POC house team, D.A.R.E. Dropouts . This show brings you something new every week, featuring a variety of local acts by performers of color and an improv set from the Dropouts themselves. The coolest kids in school, no one does a Harold (iO's signature form) quite like D.A.R.E. Dropouts. We're bringing you comedy in color; you're gonna want to tune in. THE DROPOUTS: AJ Regalado Alexi Bolden Avery Ford Emefa Dzodzomenyo Grace Goze Jazmin Robinson Juliana Zepeta Kelton Neals Michael Elluru Montrez Hawkins Rudy Fajardo You can get the drop on D.A.R.E. Dropouts by following @daredropouts.io on Instagram! ______________________________ Additional option to include our featured cocktail, "The D.A.R.E. Special" with your ticket. It includes Tito's, club soda, grenadine, and pineapple juice. Best part? A portion of each sale supports scholarships for POC improvisers to take classes at iO. Gratuity is included with the listed price. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: Spank: Poundcakes / Thank Yao
shows.excerpt: See a brand new sketch or solo show birthed right before your eyes that is auditioning for a run at the UCB theater. It's a show where we let sketch teams and solo performers try some shit out! Some will…
shows.description: See a brand new sketch or solo show birthed right before your eyes that is auditioning for a run at the UCB theater. It’s a show where we let sketch teams and solo performers try some shit out! Some will be good, some will be bad but it will all be weird and new and that’s what makes it fun! It’s experimental sketch at its finest! Come on, you know you need a spanking. This Monday, we have… Poundcakes: A Sketch Show Poundcakes is a sketch duo featuring Isa Moon and Lauren Raff. We believe in outrageous, bold characters that mirror the world we find ourselves- there is no need for the “straight man”. In fact, get rid of him. Isa and Lauren have been performing together for six plus years in multiple theaters throughout LA including the Elysian, the Stray, the Lyric, and WeImprov. Lauren’s comedy experience includes being on UCB’s character team, Betty, and Isa’s experience in multiple comedy writers rooms. We have been waiting for the right time to do a Spank show, and we feel the time is now! Both past students of UCB, we learned to focus on the word-building elements and allow our characters to come from a grounded place. This show has been a dream for a very long time and we plan to give our audience the show of a lifetime. Written & performed by Isa Moon and Lauren Raff and Thank Yao A healing moment of sketch comedy. Thank Yao is a two-woman sketch show by Katie Balen and Maia Kazin and directed by John Milhiser. Join us for the Awakened Wellness and Conscious Dimensional Communication Expo : but you only have to go for half an hour, and you don’t have to drive to San Diego. A psychic will be exposed, children of wellness influencers will wellness mog each other, the girl working the cafe will take 45 minutes to make your coffee, and the Uber driver taking all these ladies to the airport might just be the most healed one of all. Thank Yao will reduce your cortisol, relax your 11 lines, teach you to read energy, and make you live longer. Not FDA approved. Written
shows.cast: Lauren Raff, John Milhiser

shows.description: Veteran comedy TV writers take the audience’s suggestion of a show title, and, on the spot, develop a pilot for a brand new show. In UCB’s Pilot Season, veteran comedy TV writers take the audience’s suggestion of a show title, and, on the spot, develop a pilot for a brand new show. It could be a sitcom, a prestige drama, or any number of different genres. Talented improvisers then take that pitch and bring it to life on stage. In solidarity with ongoing efforts to improve diversity and representation in the industry, all proceeds from the show will go to the Entertainment Community Fund, which provides emergency financial assistance and supports underrepresented writers and actors. Produced by Saleh Karaman & Chris De La Cruz Featuring: TBD — Livestream tickets are $10. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one hour before the show. shows.excerpt: Join us for Comedian Cabaret: Show Tunes with Comedy Flair! It's a night of talented comedians cosplaying as Broadway singers! Chicago is just overflowing with talent, and there's not nearly enough stage time to see it all. That's why Comed
shows.description: Join us for Comedian Cabaret: Show Tunes with Comedy Flair! It's a night of talented comedians cosplaying as Broadway singers! Chicago is just overflowing with talent, and there's not nearly enough stage time to see it all. That's why Comedian Cabaret began: to give comedians a chance to flex more than their improv and stand up chops. Love showtunes? Then this is the show for you!

shows.description: Each week, the talented teams of iO come together to create characters, discover alternate realities, and play hilarious bits all inspired by one word from you, the audience! Using the Harold, an improvised story-telling format, iO's elite house teams will showcase the wonderful, strange, and thrilling art of improv, making you second-guess if what you're seeing is truly made up on-the-spot. Two teams will perform their individual sets and then end the show with The Dream, performing a near accurate depiction of an audience member's dreams! Featuring rotating performances from: Baby Grand BL!MP Morning Glory Chariot Mischief Feast The Wretched Fever Dream

shows.title: Deep Schwa
shows.excerpt: Chicago's longest-running Harold team returns to iO to bring their unique blend of chaos and creativity to iO's signature form The Harold melding games, songs, and scenes for singular, edge-of-your-seat improv comedy. Formed in 1996 Deep Schwa h...
shows.description: Chicago's longest-running Harold team returns to iO to bring their unique blend of chaos and creativity to iO's signature form The Harold melding games, songs, and scenes for singular, edge-of-your-seat improv comedy. Formed in 1996 Deep Schwa has over 50 members, has done over 1,000 shows, performed in theaters all over Chicago and beyond. Made up of a cast of Chicago's most seasoned and eclectic players and teachers it's a show perfect for the improv initiate and those just looking to chase away the Sunday scaries. Every Sunday, 29 years and counting. "Top-tier!" - AV Club "Legitimate." - Guy on Yelp "The most chaotic 'pro' team." - Redditor Cast: Jill Fenstermaker Liz Kirkwood Steve Nelson Eddie Piña Megan Redfearn Cassidy Russell Andy Stegmeyer Craig Uhlir Anthony LeBlanc IG: @deepschwa

shows.title: ASSSSCAT LA
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by true stories from a surprise celebrity guest. ASSSSCAT has played to critical acclaim and sold-out audiences across the country. What Is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians taking the stage with a surprise celebrity guest. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our “monologist “ shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestions. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world. Previous celebrity guests include: Will Ferrell, Mark Hamill, Tina Fey, Charles Barkley, Don Cheadle, Elizabeth Banks, Aubrey Plaza, Kumail Nanjiani, Amy Poehler, Robin Williams and more. Why See ASSSSCAT? ASSSSCAT is one of the best improv comedy shows in Los Angeles. Each show is a one-of-a-kind live comedy experience. Whether you’re a longtime fan of UCB or searching for live comedy in LA for the first time, or looking for new exciting date ideas in LA, ASSSSCAT offers a chance to see the best comedians in LA at the top of their game, and don’t forget the surprise celebrity guest at every show! And don’t worry, if you can’t see the show live, we also offer a LIVESTREAM option for all performances! Critics and audiences agree: “Unbelievably funny.” – LA Times • “Best of LA: Best Improv.” – Los Angeles Magazine • “Best of LA: Best Improv Show.” – LA Weekly Readers Poll • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” – Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” – Vice Magazine • “Critics’ Pick” – Time Out Los Angeles About the Venue The Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is one of the most well-known comedy venues in Los Angeles

shows.description: Looking for the best live improv comedy in Los Angeles? The Incubator at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is a must-see monthly show featuring the next generation of performers alongside some of UCB’s most exciting veteran teams—all on one stage. This unique double-bill improv show brings together two distinct voices in long-form improv: a rising Lloyd team and a graduated Harold team. This cycle, catch LOHAN as they workshop an entirely new show over a 12-week run. It’s a rare opportunity to see top-tier improvisers experiment, refine, and build something brand new in real time. The Incubator delivers an unforgettable night of live comedy, featuring both emerging talent and established UCB performers. —— Featuring: PTO & The Fantasy — The Fantasy DarylJim Diaz, Avery Girion, Lucy Porter, Tucker Reynolds, Bri Rodebaugh, Stephen Sanow, Artin Sarkisyan, Brittany Charlotte Smith Complete List of Lloyd Teams: Freak Trap Hanna Barlow, Prerika Chawla, Nicolette DeMarco, Jon Durnell, Charlie Fay, Nate Lawler, Talia Lefkowitz, Yaki Margulies Jinx Abby Blanchard, Sam Bodenstein, Catt Crawford, Andrew Farmer, Celia Gurney, Balint Hancz, Dorshae Middleton, Jasmine Wattar PTO Alfred Aquino II, Koschka Bahr, Justin Carty, Olivia Connolly, Sean Coyle, Molly Doan, Joe Kady, Justin Page — All sales are final. shows.title: The Armando Diaz Experience
shows.excerpt: It's the best comedy show in the city. Created in 1995 by iO alum Armando Diaz, Armando is a historic improvisational form where actors improvise a series of interconnected scenes based on the true stories told from a new guest monologist. Featuri...
shows.description: It's the best comedy show in the city. Created in 1995 by iO alum Armando Diaz, Armando is a historic improvisational form where actors improvise a series of interconnected scenes based on the true stories told from a new guest monologist. Featuring new players, surprise celebrity guests, and more each week, come watch the longest running comedy show in Chicago at its home: iO Theater! Still don't know what an Armando is? Learn more here . Doors Open: 6:30pm Show Begins: 7:00 PM Follow us on social media for monologist announcements @armando_show_io

shows.title: The Punch-up with Beth Stelling
shows.excerpt: A good-natured stand-up open mic where Beth Stelling punches your jokes up (when possible) Hi! I'm comedian Beth Stelling. I headlined Omaha Comedy Festival a few years ago and they asked me to lead a stand-up workshop, which I don't…
shows.description: A good-natured stand-up open mic where Beth Stelling punches your jokes up (when possible) Hi! I’m comedian Beth Stelling . I headlined Omaha Comedy Festival a few years ago and they asked me to lead a stand-up workshop, which I don’t really [know how to] do. When considering what I could offer fellow comedians (novice or otherwise), I figured it was to listen and offer feedback in the form of a tag or punchline. So we did that on a Sunday morning with a really great group of varying levels of comedians and it was so fun! Right now, I think things are feeling dark and roasting one another isn’t helping… therefore I offer you The Punch-up Mic! It’s a stand-up open mic where you can bring: a bit that works and you love but want to make better a late night set you’re perfecting an idea you want to workout you want to try stand-up for the first time! All ages that are over 18 and experience levels welcome! Let’s get loose. I, Beth Stelling, have credits if you feel like you need that. I started stand-up in Chicago eighteen years ago and have been in mostly L.A. (Improv and Comedy Store Paid Regular) but a little bit of NYC (passed at The Cellar) as well. I’ve got specials on HBO Max, Netflix, Showtime and Comedy Central but I feel like a good amount of my stuff is ending up on YouTube. I’ve performed late night sets on Conan , Jimmy Kimmel Live , The Pete Holmes Show and Last Call with Carson Daly (I’m 40). I’ve done punch-up on countless comedy movies like Good Boys and some where I signed my right to a credit away for cold hard cash. I’ve written on television shows like Crashing , I Love You America with Sarah Silverman , The Last O.G. , Rick and Morty , Another Period and Strange Planet . — This show is FREE! Just show up on the day at the UCB Annex if you’d like to perform or join the audience. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Upright Citizens
shows.cast: Beth Stelling

shows.description: Looking for a Stand-up Comedy Open Mic that’s a supportive room and always a good time? Look no further than the Ya'll Mic. Whether you’re a seasoned comic, an improvisor who’s always wanted to try standup, or you just decided that today’s the day for your first open mic (kudos) – The Ya'll Mic is a great venue to workshop your bits. The show is every Tuesday from 5:30pm – 7:30pm. Signup is online and the signup sheet is posted on Facebook & IG on Mondays. The list is emailed out a few hours before the show. Comics get 4 minutes of stage time (and a lifetime of memories.) While all are welcome, the room prioritizes BIPOC, LGBTQ+, and Femme comics. Come laugh with us!

shows.description: Tomorrow’s headliners, tonight! Mic Drop is a stand-up comedy open mic and showcase at the UCB Annex featuring rising comics, new material, and surprise sets from some of LA’s funniest performers. Built around a supportive, comedy-first atmosphere, Mic Drop is a space where comics can take big swings, sharpen their material, and perform in front of a real audience, not just a room full of other comics. Each show features a mix of up-and-coming stand-ups and the unpredictable energy that makes live comedy exciting. Whether you’re working on your next five minutes or just looking to discover new talent, Mic Drop is where LA comics level up. shows.title: Experimental Mic
shows.excerpt: An open mic where comedians can push boundaries, try bold new ideas, and embrace the unpredictable. The comedy laboratory where anything can happen! Every Tuesday at the UCB Annex, this isn’t your average open mic. It’s a playground for comedians…
shows.description: An open mic where comedians can push boundaries, try bold new ideas, and embrace the unpredictable. The comedy laboratory where anything can happen! Every Tuesday at the UCB Annex, this isn’t your average open mic. It’s a playground for comedians to push boundaries, try bold new ideas, and embrace the unpredictable. From themed sets and tag-team comedy to audience challenges and heckle-friendly rounds, it brings a fresh lineup of inventive formats designed to keep performers and audiences on their toes. Whether you’re a seasoned comic testing new material or a first-timer stepping into the spotlight, Experimental Mic is the perfect space to get weird, wild, and wonderfully hilarious. Come see comedians experiment, fail gloriously, and maybe create something brilliant. It’s raw, unfiltered, and absolutely hilarious. You don’t want to miss it. Each comic gets 5 minutes. 15 performance spots available. Come put your name in the bucket at 7pm to see if you’re chosen. Hosted by Deric Brown — This show is free! Just walk in. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Annex 1925 N Bronson Avenue, Los Angeles, CA

Each Wednesday at 6pm, a new improv team will open the show, followed by Blue.0 performing their original form, The Wagon. Eligible teams include those borne of New Team Smell, iO Grad Shows, house teams, lab casts, Harolds After Dark, and Kickstart teams! Are you part of a team that was formed at iO? Well, we want to hitch The Wagon™ to YOU! Follow us @blue.0improv on Instagram and Apply Today ! shows.title: Convoy & Hebecky Drysbell
shows.excerpt: A night of improv comedy featuring veteran improvisers Convoy and Hebecky Drysbell. Convoy was described by Time Out LA as “what can happen when a few players know each other’s brains so well that they function as a very funny…
shows.description: A night of improv comedy featuring veteran improvisers Convoy and Hebecky Drysbell. Convoy was described by Time Out LA as “what can happen when a few players know each other’s brains so well that they function as a very funny one” and was named by LA Weekly as “Best Improv Show” in LA more than once! Collectively, they’ve worked on shows like Reno 911! , Childrens Hospital , Terriers , Key & Peele , Last Week Tonight with Jon Oliver , Drive Share , Billion Dollar Propertie$ , The Goldbergs and more. They love squids. Featuring: Alex Berg, Alex Fernie and Todd Fasen Hebecky Drysbell are the improv duo best known for their all-time UCB Cagematch record (78-0). They have headlined the Edinburgh Improv Festival, and have been described as sharing an “uncanny chemistry” onstage by LA Weekly . Collectively, they’ve written for SNL , The Tonight Show , Rick and Morty , Key & Peele , and appeared on Whose Line is it Anyway? , Arrested Development , and Orange is the New Black . Cast: Becky Drysdale and Heather Anne Campbell — Tickets are $15 in advance and $20 on the day of the show. Livestream tickets are $10. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one hour before the show. Link will remain accessible for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre 5919 Franklin Avenue, Los Angeles, CA
shows.cast: Alex Berg, Alex Fernie, Todd Fasen, Rebecca Drysdale, Heather Anne Campbell

shows.title: The FREE WEDNESDAY SHOW feat Dumb John and Birdlady
shows.excerpt: ***This is a free show, but it is highly recommended to reserve your ticket here to guarantee entry.***** Regarded as one of Chicago's funniest and most promising improv groups of the last decade, Dumb John is proud to take the iO Stage with Bird...
shows.description: ***This is a free show, but it is highly recommended to reserve your ticket here to guarantee entry.***** Regarded as one of Chicago's funniest and most promising improv groups of the last decade, Dumb John is proud to take the iO Stage with Birdlady in a new weekly long form improv show. Both teams apply their high energy strain of improvisation to a bizarre cultural harvest of small town Americana influence and ephemera, using a single audience suggestion to inspire a piece of unhinged long form improv that propels diesel-soaked characters through fever dream karaoke scenes and down neon aisles of roadside antique marts; exploring the depravity and brilliance found at the heart of every moment. Take flight with two back to back original iO ensembles, Birdlady and Dumb John! Every Wednesday night at 7:30 (FREE), watch as they migrate toward their ultimate destination: hilarious long-form improvisation! It’ll be a HOOT! They’re so funny this show should be Ill-EAGLE! People can’t stop RAVEN about this show! DOORS: 7:00pm SHOW: 7:30pm Birdlady is: Ali Khan Alonso Ramirez Daryn Robinson Devin Henderson Erin Washington Justin Parlette Lauren Frost Ryan Nolan Dumb John is: Mike Geraghty Steve Plock Linda Orr Traycie Mcbee Follow our teams on Instagram at @birdlady.io & @dumbjohn

shows.excerpt: This Year in Music is back, and this time we are celebrating all the groovy hits of 1971! We’re welcoming performers from all over the city to celebrate one iconic year through singing, dancing, and radical sketch comedy. Grab your bell-bottoms an...
shows.description: This Year in Music is back, and this time we are celebrating all the groovy hits of 1971 ! We’re welcoming performers from all over the city to celebrate one iconic year through singing, dancing, and radical sketch comedy. Grab your bell-bottoms and your flower crowns, and come celebrate one iconic, star-studded year with us! ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Additional option to include our monthly cocktail, "Summertime Spritz" , with your ticket. It includes a blend of Lillet Blanc and strawberry purée, lifted with a splash of soda water and topped off with a Prosecco split. Served over ice and garnished with a lemon wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: Stress Dream: LIVE
shows.excerpt: Stress Dream do an improv-set inspired by your week’s anxieties. Come to laugh, cry, squeeze your stress ball, or all of the above! Ihea Inyama, Charlotte Polk, and Rebecca Salzhauer, makers of the web series i’m so happy for you!!!!!!,…
shows.description: Stress Dream do an improv-set inspired by your week’s anxieties. Come to laugh, cry, squeeze your stress ball, or all of the above! Ihea Inyama, Charlotte Polk, and Rebecca Salzhauer, makers of the web series i’m so happy for you!!!!!!, do a set inspired by the anxieties of the audience’s lives. Each show, the team invites one audience member to share what’s been stressing them this week – the intern at work, the new kitten with IBS, that super successful college frenemy that is ALL over your feed – whatever your stressors are, we welcome you to vent, and we’ll turn it into a funny (or at least cathartic???) 3prov scene. With improv team openers from across the city! Featuring: Ihea Inyama, Charlotte Polk, Rebecca Salzhauer, and special guests TBA! —- In-person tickets are $10 in advance and $15 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. shows.description: The Orbit is Chicago’s only improv show performed in the round. This 45-minute avant-garde experience takes the audience on a full-circle journey, showcasing a bold new form designed for 360-degree play. Rooted in classic iO techniques yet pushing toward the future, The Orbit offers a fresh perspective—inviting audiences to see improv from entirely new angles." shows.description: Get a chance to perform with a rotating cast of your favorite UCB teachers, or just sit back and enjoy the lesson. Night School is in session, but we swear it’ll be fun this time. Come watch a rotating cast of UCB teachers perform improv. If you’re feeling like you want extra credit, drop your name in the bucket for a chance to perform with teachers during the show! Anyone who is a current or former UCB student (improv, sketch, character, etc. all welcome!) is welcome to drop your name in the bucket. Hosts: Caroline Cotter, Marshall Givens, Sylvie Wang — This show is Free! Everybody get in here. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. shows.title: Jury Duty
shows.excerpt: You've been summoned...to laugh. Jury Duty is a fully improvised courtroom comedy where the only thing on trial is sanity itself. Each night, the cast creates a brand new legal disaster based on audience suggestion, questionable logic, and
shows.description: You've been summoned...to laugh. Jury Duty is a fully improvised courtroom comedy where the only thing on trial is sanity itself. Each night, the cast creates a brand new legal disaster based on audience suggestion, questionable logic, and total chaos. Watch as the foreperson loses their mind, evidence makes things worse, and deliberations go off the rails. No script, no rules, no justice. Just comedy The trial is fake, the laughs are real

shows.description: Join iO house team Fizz for Chicago's most carbonated improv show. Wednesdays at 10 p.m., Fizz cracks open a high-octane, full-sugar set of one-night-only scenes, characters and stories with a special guest opener. Plus: Each week one resident Fizzicist must complete their assigned task or be sentenced to a sip of the foul-flavored FIZZ CUP. Will they Fizz or Flop? Come find out! Cast: Bailey Salicos Hadley Singer Janelle Soulliere Kara Kinsey Lily Kerr-Jung Marino Korellis Max Reichek Traer Schon Veronica Rooney

shows.title: Yard Sale Girls Live
shows.excerpt: Yard Sale Girls LIVE! Fresh off a spring tour and sold out slot at Netflix Is A Joke Festival, and a summer of tanning, they’re coming to you with their BEST OF hour of live sketch. Yard Sale Girls…
shows.description: Yard Sale Girls LIVE! Fresh off a spring tour and sold out slot at Netflix Is A Joke Festival, and a summer of tanning, they’re coming to you with their BEST OF hour of live sketch. Yard Sale Girls is a New York comedy group composed of Serah Bennett, Micaela Fagan, Becca Marcus, and Sam Speedy. They’re popular online and among their younger cousins. Their live shows have been featured at festivals like New York Comedy Festival, Knockouts, Sketchfest NYC, Netflix is a Joke, and more. What to expect? At least one dance number, Becca will get overwhelmed, Serah will mention at least one ex boyfriend, Micaela’s parents will be there, and Sam will talk to you after the show. Featuring: Serah Bennett, Becca Marcus, Micaela Fagan, Sam Speedy, and Keegan Garrant —- Tickets are $15 in advance and $20 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre: 242 East 14th Street, New York, NY 10003
shows.cast: Serah Bennett, Becca Marcus, Micaela Fagan, Sam Speedy, and Keegan Garrant

shows.title: Fresh: A Stand-Up Show
shows.excerpt: FRESH is a high-energy, low-pressure new material live comedy show where the country's best stand-up and sketch comedians bring their newest, funniest, and most experimental work to test in front of a supportive crowd. Hosted by Biniam Bizuneh and Luke…
shows.description: FRESH is a high-energy, low-pressure new material live comedy show where the country’s best stand-up and sketch comedians bring their newest, funniest, and most experimental work to test in front of a supportive crowd. Hosted by Biniam Bizuneh and Luke Mones Featuring: Aida Osman, Ray Lau, and more TBA! FRESH is a high-energy, low-pressure new material live comedy show where the country’s best stand-up and sketch comedians bring their newest, funniest, and most experimental work to test in front of a supportive crowd. Biniam Bizuneh is a comedian, writer, and actor who’s written for the hit FX series DAVE, ALWAYS SUNNY IN PHILADELPHIA, and ABC’s JIMMY KIMMEL LIVE!. As a comedian, he’s appeares on Comedy Central, Viceland, and Don’t Tell Comedy. After getting attention for his webseries series LIEGUYS, he wrote and starred in several originals for Comedy Central including his own digital series, HOW TO BE BROKE. He’s appeared as a panelist on E!’s DATING NO FILTER and most recently, wrote for and appeared in Jordan Peele’s reboot of SCARE TACTICS for USA Network. Luke Mones is a Los Angeles based comedian, actor, and writer. He wrote and starred in the Comedy Central digital series GENIES. He was selected by Netflix for their INTRODUCING showcase at their inaugural comedy festival and was named an UP NEXT comedian by Comedy Central. Luke’s stand up has also been seen on Comedy Central: Stand-Up Featuring and Don’t Tell Comedy. Luke is a regular at The Comedy Cellar in New York City. He also appeared on INSECURE on HBO as well as CONAN on TBS multiple times. Luke has been featured as a panelist on AFTER MIDNIGHT on CBS and THE GREAT AMERICAN JOKE OFF on The CW.” — All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual mat

shows.title: ...& Sometimes Dragons
shows.excerpt: Deep in the Nowhere lies The Lost Tavern, a welcoming bar tucked away in a back alley of Obscurity. It is there that our heroes, dedicated cohorts of the Non-dimensional Paragon Cooperative, begin their quests. Join our valiant mercenaries as they...
shows.description: Deep in the Nowhere lies The Lost Tavern, a welcoming bar tucked away in a back alley of Obscurity. It is there that our heroes, dedicated cohorts of the Non-dimensional Paragon Cooperative, begin their quests. Join our valiant mercenaries as they set out on adventure and help to shape the story as they pursue good, gold, or glory. This real-play D&D adventure will be pursued by incredible improvisers and comedians, weaving a tale that can only happen once! You, as the audience and patrons of The Lost Tavern, can sit back and enjoy watching it unfold or take a more active hand in helping or hindering our heroes through mini games and interactive elements. Knowledge of the role playing game "Dungeons & Dragons" will enhance your experience, but is not required in order to enjoy the rich telling of a story not yet written.

shows.title: Mystery Movie Club
shows.excerpt: Mystery Movie Club presents free screenings of curated, exciting movies from the personal collections of local movie lovers! But here's the catch - the title of the film will not be announced until you are in the room. Follow the breadcrumbs, tr...
shows.description: Mystery Movie Club presents free screenings of curated, exciting movies from the personal collections of local movie lovers! But here's the catch - the title of the film will not be announced until you are in the room. Follow the breadcrumbs, trust your gut, expand your horizons! Come enjoy the weaving narratives, the wide array of emotions, and the joy of community. Stay afterwards for a quick, low stakes, interactive chat about the film. Drinks, food, and snacks available at the bar. There is nothing like watching a movie on the big screen! That's the power of cinema, baby!

shows.title: Thursday Night Improv Hosted by Creamboy
shows.excerpt: If you’re looking for a date night, girls’ night out, or a mandatory work outing (that your staff will actually like) — Look no further! Fast, funny, and frothy, Thursday Night Improv is entirely improvised and features a different guest opener f...
shows.description: If you’re looking for a date night, girls’ night out, or a mandatory work outing (that your staff will actually like) — Look no further! Fast, funny, and frothy, Thursday Night Improv is entirely improvised and features a different guest opener for veteran iO house team Creamboy every week. Every show is completely different, so you can keep coming back for more! Will you be the lucky audience member to receive the coveted title of Cream of the Week? Creamboy is made up of seasoned Chicago improvisers who play and teach all over the city (and country! And WORLD?!) which means this show is perfect for improv nerds, millennials who love Tina Fey, and even your cousin visiting from Kansas. Comedy so good you'll lick your lips and pat your belly. Mmmm so creamy! Get a taste of Creamboy on Instagram @ creamboy.io

shows.title: Improv: The Play
shows.excerpt: With the help of some of Chicago’s best actors, Improv: The Play is a new, hybrid version of long form improv happening only at the iO Theater. Each night, professional actors prepare a scene from a play. Their scene partners, however, are never ...
shows.description: With the help of some of Chicago’s best actors, Improv: The Play is a new, hybrid version of long form improv happening only at the iO Theater. Each night, professional actors prepare a scene from a play. Their scene partners, however, are never given a script, and must improvise their way through the scene. The result is a totally original, never before seen piece of theater. It’s drama, it’s comedy, it’s everything that’s magical about theater and improvisation. Come watch this brand-new show at iO and see something you won’t see anywhere else in the city. Featuring: Alex Beard Heather Mari Elijah Sloan Lexi Putter Lucas Pollitzer Marino Korellis Montrez Hawkins Nikk Tetreault Ryan Bowman Shawna Seals Directed by: James Dugan Produced by: Cory Hardin

shows.title: hark!
shows.excerpt: hark! the voice of god is in this show, and he’s pissed. and relieved. and...scared? 8 disciples of improv gather together to perform what some would call a harold, all under the omnipresent eye of god. if god sees something in a scene that they...
shows.description: hark! the voice of god is in this show, and he’s pissed. and relieved. and...scared? 8 disciples of improv gather together to perform what some would call a harold, all under the omnipresent eye of god. if god sees something in a scene that they want to change, add, or comment on, a divine intervention may occur... opened each week by a different harolds after dark team! _____________________ Additional option to include the hark! cocktail, "The Scream Queen" , with your ticket. It includes tamarind vodka, passion fruit, and lime topped with soda water Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: Press Start: An Improvised Musical
shows.excerpt: Press Start: An Improvised Musical is a hilarious, high-energy full improvised musical inspired by the games you know and love. Each show, our cast creates a brand-new adventure on the spot using audience suggestions, complete with original
shows.description: Press Start: An Improvised Musical is a hilarious, high-energy full improvised musical inspired by the games you know and love. Each show, our cast creates a brand-new adventure on the spot using audience suggestions, complete with original songs, unforgettable characters, epic quests, and plenty of unexpected twists. From fantasy kingdoms and cozy villages to space battles and chaotic multiplayer mayhem, no two shows are ever the same. Whether you're a hardcore gamer or just love comedy and live theater, Press Start is a one-of-a-kind experience that turns the magic of games into a fully improvised musical adventure. Grab your party and get ready to press start.

shows.excerpt: A completely improvised episode of your favorite supernatural teen drama. Monster of the Week improvises a full episode of a classic CW teen drama. Except these teens are constantly being pulled out of class to defeat whatever evil force has…
shows.description: A completely improvised episode of your favorite supernatural teen drama. Monster of the Week improvises a full episode of a classic CW teen drama. Except these teens are constantly being pulled out of class to defeat whatever evil force has just rolled into their idyllic town. Based on popular 2000s era series like Buffy the Vampire Slayer, Teen Wolf, Supernatural, and so many more, expect a nostalgic and hilarious take on the shows that taught us to be afraid of the dark. Unless there’s a hunky vampire lurking out there. By the end of every episode, our heroes will have discovered and (hopefully) defeated the baddie, but there are no guarantees against the greatest monster of all—puberty. Featuring: Aimée Lutkin, Johnny McNulty, and more TBA! —- In-person tickets are $15 plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. shows.description: Teams are drafted the first week, then perform for the rest of the month. Week 1: 3 Coaches host the show and draw their teams RANDOMLY from the chalice of audience submitted names. The newly drafted teams perform short scrimmage sets! Weeks 2-4: Teams perform weekly at Draft Night and get notes from their coach. Wash, Rinse, Repeat! *This is not a competition show* Rules: -You must be at Draft Night to enter the drawing -You must have completed at least two WGIS classes (not counting drop-ins) -People selected will pay $15 for their month of coach notes. Scholarships available upon request to shows@wgimprovschool.com All this same info and a bit more is listed here: https://wgimprovschool.com/draftnight

PROPER GANDER : Brody Gibas, Caroline Storey, Cassi Seifert, Emilio Barajas, Emma Knott, Ethan Evans, Gregory Wagner, Hayley O’Toole, Nudia Hernandez, Rachel Wade, Taylor Meredith, and Willem Jewell (directed by Ronee Goldman) . shows.title: Blueprint
shows.excerpt: Blueprint is the kind of improv that keeps audiences AND players on their toes. Each week, a different cast member designs a bold new improv format that their fellow performers will learn about at the same time as the crowd. Expect the unexpected ...
shows.description: Blueprint is the kind of improv that keeps audiences AND players on their toes. Each week, a different cast member designs a bold new improv format that their fellow performers will learn about at the same time as the crowd. Expect the unexpected as we build something completely original, live, right before your eyes. Past forms have included: Improvised Severance - Guided by two internal "staff members," three performers are physically out of the room, while three others perform as their innies, and every 5 minutes, the two swapped. Can they make sense of their outies? and versa? Understudies - In a longform narrative, each player on stage knows that they will eventually understudy another player in the show. The lights change and they have to embody a different player, and each time the lights change, they can select another player to embody. Overachiever - Three 2-person monoscenes happen on stage, utilizing the same physical space, but taking place in categorically different spaces. They must navigate space atop of and around one another while keeping connection to their partner. Improvised Heist - Ocean's Eleven, eat your heart out! Our players hit the major plot points of a heist and improvise their way through - initial idea, building the team, planning the heist, executing, and the aftermath Blueprint is joined each week by a lab cast opening for the show with their own unique, original form. Directed by James Dugan Cast: James Dugan Avery Ford Molly Jones Allen Lucas Janelle Soulliere Ryan Bowman

shows.description: The Very Best Solo Sketch CABAL combines writer-performers from SNL, The Daily Show, The New Yorker, The Second City, and Just for Laughs into one supergroup delivering the very best in solo sketch comedy. The next big gay pop star? The heroine of the spicy romantasy novel you’re reading? The new Barbie who’s a 6 out of 10? The guy who farts into wine to make it champagne? Any one of them might be in the CABAL. You’ve seen members of CABAL on Dropout, What We Do in the Shadows, The Marvelous Mrs. Maisel, Search Party, The Tonight Show, The Rehearsal, The Problem with Jon Stewart, Stephen Colbert’s Tooning Out the News, Jimmy Kimmel Live!, Unbreakable Kimmy Schmidt, Girls5Eva, High Maintenance, Difficult People, and much more. Now see them live, performing a new 60-minute barrage of original characters every month.
