shows.title: TGIF with Duchovny & Olestra
shows.excerpt: Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But we do know it's improv every Friday @ 7pm! Buy Tickets
shows.description: DOORS: 6:30 PM SHOW: 7:00 PM Eris Deep Space (downstairs) "It's Friday night and the mood is right. Gonna have some fun, show you how it's done, TGIF". BCC is bringing back ABC's TGIF programming block Fridays at 7pm ET / 6 pm CT with Duchovny and Olestra. Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But it will be funny and it will be on Friday and we will thank god for both. Duchovny is a group of elite New York maniacs comprised of veteran improvisers, actors, and comedians who you've probably seen in TV, movies, and even the most coveted work of all, digital-only commercials that air before Youtube videos. Duchovny is fast paced, high energy and filled to the brim with chaos. Olestra is a squad of dangerous Chicago criminals who make out and beat the hell out of each other on stage here in New York. They evaded arrest by racking up credits in the entertainment industry; The Tonight Show, The Second City, UCB Betty, The Improvised Shakespeare Company, to name a few. Duchovny is: Amanda Breen @amanda_breen James Dwyer @jamesbdwyer Lou Gonzalez @angrylou Patrick Keene @pad00d2.0 Yoni Lotan @yonilotan Tami Sagher @tamisagher Akmal Tajihan @akmaltajihan Sarah Grace Welbourn @sgwelbs Duchovny @duchovnyimprov Olestra is: Dan Bazaldua @dannbazz Devin Bockrath @durvinbuttrath Nick Mestad @nick_mestad Micah Sterenberg @micah_humble_blessed Andy Junk @therealandyjunk Fine Print: Must be 21+ to attend. shows.description: SIGN-UPS 6:45 PM JAM: 7:00 PM BCC Pig Pen Gay Fam! Gay Dam! Gay Gam! Gay Jam! Maya and Pearl welcome all queer identifying improvisers to BCC’s monthly queer improv jam! If you are L G B T Q I A or Questioning, you can hop up on the Pig Pen stage and improv with us! And Allies don’t think we forgot about you— we want YOU to come support by clapping and laughing in the audience! We are so excited to play with everyone!!! LETS GAM !! Must be 18+ to attend Donate to our diversity scholarship!

shows.title: ComedySportz
shows.excerpt: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whet...
shows.description: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whether you're bringing your family, your co-workers, or a date - you are welcome, and you will laugh. ComedySportz is two teams of all-star improv comedians going head to head in comedy games, scenes and songs. YOU will vote on which team you liked the best and the teams will score points based on your applause. One of our world-famous referees will guide you through the whole show and may even ask for your help on stage. Every show ends in our incredible 6 THINGS game that is known throughout the world as 'the hardest game in all of improv'. It's fast. It's hilarious. It's appropriate for all ages. It's ComedySportz.

shows.title: Rudder Bullshit
shows.excerpt: Hundreds of miles offshore, a luxury cruise liner cuts through the Atlantic at double speed. At the helm? A megalomaniac captain in love with his own reflection & exploiting his beleaguered crew past their breaking point. As rebellion brews
shows.description: Hundreds of miles offshore, a luxury cruise liner cuts through the Atlantic at double speed. At the helm? A megalomaniac captain in love with his own reflection & exploiting his beleaguered crew past their breaking point. As rebellion brews below, things are also heating up above deck! Love blossoms among thrill-seeking women, a heavy metal band grapples with their past & present, and a council of walruses issues a prophecy for destruction. Rudder Bullshit is a new play from the masterminds that brought you Docked and Loaded. Featuring original rock ballads that are guaranteed to make you put your lighters up! Hop aboard and strap in for what critics are calling "an edge in your seat adventure"! It's some Rudder Bullshit!

shows.description: The hottest show in town, Devil’s Daughter , features a cast of seasoned comedians who have performed together in Chicago and around the country for over a decade. This award-winning team has their own unique spin on a classic improv form, The Harold , and is known for their solo scenes, artistic style, and dastardly sense of humor. Find them Friday nights performing alongside their favorite opening team - Hellmash ! Duration: 1.5 hrs Devil's Daughter Cast: Lisa Burton Gretchen Eng Max Ganet Adonis Holmes Garrett Kelly TJ King Harrison Lott Scott Piebenga Brad Pike May Regan Annie Sullivan Mary Tilden Follow us on social media: Instagram: @devilsdaughterimprov Facebook: DevilsDaughterImprov Twitter: @devilsdaugh

shows.title: Improvised Shakespeare Chicago
shows.venue: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
venues: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
shows.excerpt: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William ...
shows.description: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William Shakespeare. Inspired by one audience suggestion (a title for a play that has yet to be written) the dazzling players create a brand-new Shakespearean masterpiece right before your eyes. Nothing has been planned out, rehearsed, or written. The dialogue is said for the first time, the characters are created as you watch, and if ever you're wondering where the story is going...so are they! You've never seen the Bard like this before! “There’s really nothing quite like it in the city of Chicago. Smart, sophisticated, downright hilarious.” -TimeOut Chicago “…the show channels Monty Python as often as the Bard, and frequently with sly-witted results.” -The Chicago Tribune “Consistently Hilarious” -The Chicago Reader “Staggeringly Brilliant” -TimeOut Chicago “Consistently funny…'Tis v'ry, v'ry good.” -The Chicago Tribune “Indisputably great improv, fueled by smart plot development, stage chemistry and recognizable characters.” -Centerstage Chicago “In short, outstanding.” -TimeOut Chicago Find out more at improvisedshakespeare.com _________________________ Additional option to include Improvised Shakespeare's featured cocktail, Hamlet , with your ticket. It includes Nolets Dry Gin, St-Germaine, Campari, orange juice, and garnished with an orange wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre: 242 East 14th Street, New York, NY 10003

shows.title: FRIDAY FIX! The Smokes & The Big Team
shows.excerpt: UCB's weekly improv double header! A night of improv comedy featuring two of LA's top teams performing back-to-back. Get your FIX every FRIDAY. Featuring: THE SMOKES: No gimmicks, no pyrotechnics – just a single suggestion and these friends of (gulp)…
shows.description: UCB’s weekly improv double header! A night of improv comedy featuring two of LA’s top teams performing back-to-back. Get your FIX every FRIDAY. Featuring: THE SMOKES: No gimmicks, no pyrotechnics – just a single suggestion and these friends of (gulp) twenty years put on an amazing improvised show. Showbiz credits include: screenwriter of The Heat, co-author of the Broadway musical Beetlejuice, star/co-creator of Playing House, staff writer for Big Mouth, series regular of Superstore, founders of at least two improv schools, voice-over artist in a million cartoons, producer of the hit show Makin’ It, but most relevant: having done improv on stage for 20 years. Cast: Neil Casey, Katie Dippold, Colton Dunn, Will Hines, Anthony King, Lennon Parham, Joe Wengert, Jim Woods, Chris Kula THE BIG TEAM (formerly known as White Women) is an improv team of all black men based in Los Angeles. Formed after meeting at the UCB Black History Month Show in 2013, this team has been featured at theaters all over Los Angeles and the country, having headlined festivals in Portland, DC, Austin, NYC, and more. Collectively they have written and produced videos for Comedy Central, College Humor and Funny or Die, and individually they’ve written and acted in a lot of your favorite TV shows. They were named on Vulture’s annual list of “Comedians You Should and Will Know” in 2018. Cast: Ronnie Adrian, Zeke Nicholson, Ify Nwadiwe, Ishmel Sahid, Carl Tart, Lamar Woods — Tickets are $15 in advance and $20 on the day of the show. Livestream tickets are $10. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one hour before the show. Link will remain accessible for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material
shows.cast: Neil Casey, Katie Dippold, Colton Dunn, Will Hines, Anthony King, Lennon Parham, Joe Wengert, Jim Woods, Chris Kula, Ronnie Adrian, Zeke Nicholson, Ify Nwadiwe, Ishmel Sahid, Carl Tart, Lamar Woods

shows.title: Everywhere, People Live
shows.description: Have you ever looked back on your life and wondered how one small moment changed everything? Everywhere, People Live is a storytelling solo show by Xuan Zhao that blends personal narrative, movement, and moments of improvisation to explore identity, belonging, and the unexpected connections that shape who we become. From a piano practice room in China to a London subway entrance, a California dorm, a tiny bookstore in Georgia, an NYU classroom, and a Chinatown bar basement, each story captures an ordinary place where something quietly extraordinary happened. Through spoken word, physical storytelling, humor, and heartfelt reflection, Xuan invites audiences into a journey that is deeply personal yet universally familiar. Whether you've crossed oceans or simply crossed the street, these stories ask the same question: How do we find home in a world that's always changing? Magnet Theater 254 West 29th St. New York NY 10001 Tickets Everywhere, People Live Fri Aug 7th, 2026 10:30pm - $10 Buy Ticket

shows.title: ComedySportz
shows.excerpt: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whet...
shows.description: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whether you're bringing your family, your co-workers, or a date - you are welcome, and you will laugh. ComedySportz is two teams of all-star improv comedians going head to head in comedy games, scenes and songs. YOU will vote on which team you liked the best and the teams will score points based on your applause. One of our world-famous referees will guide you through the whole show and may even ask for your help on stage. Every show ends in our incredible 6 THINGS game that is known throughout the world as 'the hardest game in all of improv'. It's fast. It's hilarious. It's appropriate for all ages. It's ComedySportz.

shows.title: Improvised Jane Austen
shows.excerpt: "...countless laughs...whimsical homage to the illustrious author." -- Chicago Reader Improvised Jane Austen continues its entirely improvised tales of love and laughter this summer. Audiences will enjoy an evening with wit and heart in equal me...
shows.description: "...countless laughs...whimsical homage to the illustrious author." -- Chicago Reader Improvised Jane Austen continues its entirely improvised tales of love and laughter this summer. Audiences will enjoy an evening with wit and heart in equal measure with an improvised rom-com for everyone, whether you love Austen or just like to laugh! Improvised Jane Austen currently performs Saturday nights at 6:00 pm at iO Theater and tickets are $20. "...[They] took it, owned it and created some really funny and touching moments....an evening of silliness and indulgence....make running amok look like delicious fun." -- PerformInk Chicago Join Improvised Jane Austen for the signature romantic comedy and social satire of the beloved author, improvised by Chicago's top comedic talent. Celebrate all things love, friendship, and Austen this Summer. “...Improvised Jane Austen is one of the strongest improv troupes in the city. They have the ability to use Austen’s 19th century wit and sarcasm and make it recognizable for a 21st-century audience." --Scapi Magazine Improvised Jane Austen is a comedic ensemble that creates unscripted performances using Jane Austen's tropes, themes, and language to create a satirical romantic comedy set in Regency-era England. Playing in Austen’s world, Improvised Jane Austen’s stories delight 21st century audiences with a modern sense and sensibility. The current cast of 20+ performers rotate weekly, creating a new ensemble for every show. Come for the humor, stay for the heart! Throughout the show’s run, Improvised Jane Austen has been Chicago Reader Recommended , named a PerformInk Critics’ Pick , voted Best sketch/improv troupe 2019 in the Reader’s Best of Chicago , and was featured on WTTW playlist , in Time Out , the Chicago Tribune and on a their list of what to do on Valentine’s Day , on WGN’s Daytime Chicago in 2024 and 2026 and on CBS News Chicago . Learn more: https://improvisedjaneausten.com/

shows.title: Duchovny
shows.excerpt: NYC’s funniest improv show brought to you by a group of top-tier psychopaths. Have you ever had an encounter with a ghost? An alien? A kid you were babysitting who is maybe just spoiled BUT PERHAPS WAS ACTUALLY POSSESSED?!…
shows.description: NYC’s funniest improv show brought to you by a group of top-tier psychopaths. Have you ever had an encounter with a ghost? An alien? A kid you were babysitting who is maybe just spoiled BUT PERHAPS WAS ACTUALLY POSSESSED?! Each show, we let real audience encounters with the unexplained inspire a completely improvised fever dream, the likes of which has never been seen before, will never be seen again, and perhaps… shouldn’t be seen again because some of that stuff was deeply unwell. I mean don’t get me wrong, it was funny, but I really hope they’re in therapy. This group of elite New York maniacs is composed of veteran improvisers, actors, and comedians who you’ve probably seen in TV, movies, and even the most coveted work of all, digital-only commercials that air before YouTube videos. Their collective credits include Girls, Russian Doll, The Marvelous Mrs. Maisel, What We Do in the Shadows, The Other Two, Dickinson, and getting paid to dress up as a slice of pizza at the New York Stock Exchange. Featuring: Amanda Breen, James Dwyer, Lou Gonzalez, Patrick Keene, Yoni Lotan, Tami Sagher, Akmal Tajihan, and Sarah Grace Welbourn — Tickets are $15 in advance and $20 on the day of the show plus fees Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. shows.title: The Armando Diaz Experience
shows.description: The legendary show is reborn! Created in 1995 at the iO Theater in Chicago, The Armando Diaz Experience IS the longest running improv show EVER. A guest monologist takes a suggestion from the audience and shares true stories from their life. These stories are then brought to life by a rotating cast of improv all-stars, which take audiences on a high minded, exhilarating comedic joy ride that will leave mouths tired of smiling. And occasionally, just occasionally, the man with his name on the show will drop by for some fun. "The “Armando,” performed every Saturday, always begins with a monologue, and at a recent show it was about a connection made on the internet that led a decade later to a real-life relationship. The team of improvisers built patient scenes off this moving story, which made daring shifts in perspective, from the real world to secret worlds, inside and outside of bodies. There was a playfulness to the creativity, bold choices that verged on reckless that wouldn’t make the transition to a script." NYTimes Magnet Theater 254 West 29th St. New York NY 10001 Tickets The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Carson Olshanksky Sat Aug 8th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Rob Penty Sat Jul 18th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Phil Sugar Sat Jul 25th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Tessa Flannery Sat Aug 1st, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Suerynn Lee Sat Aug 15th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Kate Jordan Sat Aug 22nd, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Monologist TBA Sat Aug 29th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket Performers Justin Anderson Rick Andrews Christopher Bell Hannah Chase Kevin Cragg Shacottha Fields Elana Fishbein Megan Gray Eleanor Lewis Christine Magee Dennis Pacheco Xavier Padin Jamie R

shows.title: Improvised Shakespeare Chicago
shows.venue: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
venues: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
shows.excerpt: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William ...
shows.description: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William Shakespeare. Inspired by one audience suggestion (a title for a play that has yet to be written) the dazzling players create a brand-new Shakespearean masterpiece right before your eyes. Nothing has been planned out, rehearsed, or written. The dialogue is said for the first time, the characters are created as you watch, and if ever you're wondering where the story is going...so are they! You've never seen the Bard like this before! “There’s really nothing quite like it in the city of Chicago. Smart, sophisticated, downright hilarious.” -TimeOut Chicago “…the show channels Monty Python as often as the Bard, and frequently with sly-witted results.” -The Chicago Tribune “Consistently Hilarious” -The Chicago Reader “Staggeringly Brilliant” -TimeOut Chicago “Consistently funny…'Tis v'ry, v'ry good.” -The Chicago Tribune “Indisputably great improv, fueled by smart plot development, stage chemistry and recognizable characters.” -Centerstage Chicago “In short, outstanding.” -TimeOut Chicago Find out more at improvisedshakespeare.com _________________________ Additional option to include Improvised Shakespeare's featured cocktail, Hamlet , with your ticket. It includes Nolets Dry Gin, St-Germaine, Campari, orange juice, and garnished with an orange wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: Best of iO Improv
shows.excerpt: Celebrate 45 years of improvisational excellence with the Best of iO Improv. This show brings together two teams of our very best improvisers, each delivering a high energy, hilarious set in classic iO forms like the Living Room, Weirdass, Shotgun...
shows.description: Celebrate 45 years of improvisational excellence with the Best of iO Improv. This show brings together two teams of our very best improvisers, each delivering a high energy, hilarious set in classic iO forms like the Living Room, Weirdass, Shotgun, and more. Between sets, the show drops into The Dream, a surreal, mind bending journey through one day based on an interview with an audience member. Fast, fearless, and funny, this is iO improvisation at its highest level.

shows.title: ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show plus fees. shows.description: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by true stories from a surprise celebrity guest. ASSSSCAT has played to critical acclaim and sold-out audiences across the country. What Is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians taking the stage with a surprise celebrity guest. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our “monologist “ shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestions. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world. Previous celebrity guests include: Will Ferrell, Mark Hamill, Tina Fey, Charles Barkley, Don Cheadle, Elizabeth Banks, Aubrey Plaza, Kumail Nanjiani, Amy Poehler, Robin Williams and more. Why See ASSSSCAT? ASSSSCAT is one of the best improv comedy shows in Los Angeles. Each show is a one-of-a-kind live comedy experience. Whether you’re a longtime fan of UCB or searching for live comedy in LA for the first time, or looking for new exciting date ideas in LA, ASSSSCAT offers a chance to see the best comedians in LA at the top of their game, and don’t forget the surprise celebrity guest at every show! And don’t worry, if you can’t see the show live, we also offer a LIVESTREAM option for all performances! Critics and audiences agree: “Unbelievably funny.” – LA Times • “Best of LA: Best Improv.” – Los Angeles Magazine • “Best of LA: Best Improv Show.” – LA Weekly Readers Poll • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” – Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” – Vice Magazine • “Critics’ Pick” – Time Out Los Angeles About the Venue The Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is one of the most well-known comedy venues in Los Angeles

shows.title: Baby Wants Candy
shows.excerpt: Baby Wants Candy is one of the best known, longest running and most celebrated improv shows in the world. Buy Tickets
shows.description: DOORS: 8:15 PM SHOW: 8:30 PM BCC Mainstage Baby Wants Candy is one of the best known, longest running and most celebrated improv shows in the world. The show is COMPLETELY improvised. Every note the actors sing, every song the band plays, every single character and line of dialogue is created in the moment, based on an audience suggestion.With runs in NYC, Chicago, Los Angeles and an international touring company Baby Wants Candy has worldwide base of rabid fans, has performed over 3,500 completely improvised musicals and has helped spawn the careers of top comedic actors and writers in the US. The BWC show is a roller-coaster ride of spontaneously choreographed dance numbers, rhyming verses and witty, jaw-dropping comedy. Fine Print: Must be 21+ to attend. No outside alcohol is allowed in the space. There are 60 seats - first come, first serve - and then standing room up to capacity. All ticket sales are final - no refunds. If you must miss your show, email us at info@brooklyncc.com with at least 24 hours notice and we can transfer your tickets to any upcoming show at the BCC. Answers to most other questions can be found here . If show is sold out, limited tickets will be available at the door. Lineup is subject to change. Buy tickets $5 OFF TIX BEFORE DAY OF SHOW

shows.title: Windy City Comedy Festival Presents: Headliners Only
shows.excerpt: No openers. No filler. Just killers. Headliners Only is Windy City Comedy Fest’s premier Saturday night showcase featuring a stacked lineup of nationally touring comedians, festival favorites, and performers who know exactly how to command a room....
shows.description: No openers. No filler. Just killers. Headliners Only is Windy City Comedy Fest’s premier Saturday night showcase featuring a stacked lineup of nationally touring comedians, festival favorites, and performers who know exactly how to command a room. These comics don’t need a warm-up—they are the event. Set inside Chicago’s legendary iO Theater, this showcase delivers high-energy stand-up, sharp writing, and the kind of performances that remind you why live comedy hits different. Whether you’re a comedy fan, comic, or just looking for the best Saturday night show of the fest, Headliners Only brings together some of the strongest acts of the weekend for one unforgettable lineup. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Additional option to include our monthly cocktail, "Aperol? Yes-and!" with your ticket. It includes Tanqueray gin, Aperol, lemon juice, and honey syrup, topped with soda water and garnished with a lemon wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: Never Not Murder
shows.excerpt: Never Not Murder steps into 1944 Chicago, where honest detective Frankie King navigates a dangerous world of love, betrayal, and corruption while racing to stop a powerful figure’s rise to mayor. This stylish film noir embraces classic tropes—femm...
shows.description: Never Not Murder steps into 1944 Chicago, where honest detective Frankie King navigates a dangerous world of love, betrayal, and corruption while racing to stop a powerful figure’s rise to mayor. This stylish film noir embraces classic tropes—femme fatales, tangled relationships, and moral dilemmas—while reinventing them for the stage. A sharp, witty narrator breaks the fourth wall, guiding audiences through the twists and secrets of the story. Meanwhile, a visible, ever-moving “crew” interacts with both actors and audience, transforming the entire theater into a dynamic, immersive experience.

shows.description: The final bell just rang! You better get out of the classroom and get your ass to the iO Theater for After School Special brought to you by iO's first all-POC house team, D.A.R.E. Dropouts . This show brings you something new every week, featuring a variety of local acts by performers of color and an improv set from the Dropouts themselves. The coolest kids in school, no one does a Harold (iO's signature form) quite like D.A.R.E. Dropouts. We're bringing you comedy in color; you're gonna want to tune in. THE DROPOUTS: AJ Regalado Alexi Bolden Avery Ford Emefa Dzodzomenyo Grace Goze Jazmin Robinson Juliana Zepeta Kelton Neals Michael Elluru Montrez Hawkins Rudy Fajardo You can get the drop on D.A.R.E. Dropouts by following @daredropouts.io on Instagram! ______________________________ Additional option to include our featured cocktail, "The D.A.R.E. Special" with your ticket. It includes Tito's, club soda, grenadine, and pineapple juice. Best part? A portion of each sale supports scholarships for POC improvisers to take classes at iO. Gratuity is included with the listed price. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.excerpt: Six comedians. One recipe. Stand-up comedy has never tasted so good. Too Many Cooks is a one-of-a-kind live comedy experience where stand-up and cooking collide in real time. Each comedian takes the mic and performs their regular set — but…
shows.description: Six comedians. One recipe. Stand-up comedy has never tasted so good. Too Many Cooks is a one-of-a-kind live comedy experience where stand-up and cooking collide in real time. Each comedian takes the mic and performs their regular set — but while they’re delivering punchlines, they’re also cooking a portion of a full recipe live on stage. Every performer picks up exactly where the last one left off at the stove. At the end of the show, one brave audience volunteer is chosen to take center stage and enjoy the meal. Cast: Caitie Mac, Max Christofferson, and more TBA! — Tickets are $10 in advance and $15 on the day of the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. shows.title: Spank: Stop, Drop & Comedy! / Who’s My Daddy?
shows.excerpt: See a brand new sketch or solo show birthed right before your eyes that is auditioning for a run at the UCB theater. It's a show where we let sketch teams and solo performers try some shit out! Some will…
shows.description: See a brand new sketch or solo show birthed right before your eyes that is auditioning for a run at the UCB theater. It’s a show where we let sketch teams and solo performers try some shit out! Some will be good, some will be bad but it will all be weird and new and that’s what makes it fun! It’s experimental sketch at its finest! Come on, you know you need a spanking. This Monday, we have… Stop, Drop & Comedy! A sketch comedy show that has everything and nothing to do with fire safety. Two award-winning acting coaches are feeling the struggle of finding work. So they will take any job they can, even if they know nothing about it. They play different characters throughout the show and quiz the audience on important fire safety rules like to Stop, Drop and Roll since that’s the only one they know. They aren’t just teaching but also looking for work… acting work, that is. Written & performed by Dave Snook & Libby Wahlmeier Directed by John Milhiser and Who’s My Daddy? Hop aboard an adventure through Andrew Santiago’s life to figure out: Who’s his daddy? Andrew Santiago is a Nuyorican comedian, writer, and actor. Raised in Brooklyn entirely by his Puerto Rican grandmother, who herself was an orphan, Andrew has spent the last several decades trying to figure out all kinds of things about himself, chief among them, who the f*** is his father? In this 30-minute autobiographical comedy solo show, you’ll jump right in on a journey years in the making to find out if he can finally get that elusive answer. Starring Andrew Santiago Directed by Bente Engelstoft — All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. shows.title: Ghost Stories
shows.excerpt: An improv show for anyone who’s ever ghosted or been ghosted! Did that last situationship disappear without a trace? This show provides some much needed catharsis by transforming the universal experience of getting ghosted from humiliating to hilarious!! First, you’ll hear…
shows.description: An improv show for anyone who’s ever ghosted or been ghosted! Did that last situationship disappear without a trace? This show provides some much needed catharsis by transforming the universal experience of getting ghosted from humiliating to hilarious!! First, you’ll hear the iconic John Arthur Hill (Sirius XM) hare a time they were ghosted. Then, a coven of improv mediums will commune with the ghost and reveal their whereabouts! And for the grand finale – we’ll perform a séance just for you. YOU the audience will share a tale of being ghosted, and our improvisers will finally get you some closure! Monologist: John Arthur Hill Improvisers: Alex Kagy, Fu Goto, Josh Ellman, Kalynn Chambers, Lida Darmian, Maddy Lenny, Marcus Hunter, Mark Burns, Nat D’Amico, Shane Nielsen, Tina Vlamis, Tyler Stuart, and Will Stewich —- Tickets are $15 plus fees. shows.description: Your favorite trans/gnc/non binary improvisers perform a set inspired by your tales of joy! We are UCB’s first all trans/gender nonconforming/non binary improv team, and what better way to celebrate than doing some improv based on your most joyful memories?! Trans and gender nonconforming people have had a rough few years… For many in our community, this is a time of anxiety, fear, and fury. It’s now more important than ever to create spaces of pure, unadulterated queer fun where we can rest, relax, and recharge. Come spend an hour laughing with us as we all try to pretend the outside world doesn’t exist! Allies are of course welcome. Cast: Alex Song-Xia (they/them), Charlie James (he/him), Chris Renfro (they/them), D.J. Mausner (they/them), E.R. Fightmaster (they/them), Jiavani (she/him), Jordan Myrick (they/she), Krys Tabujara (they/them), Laser Webber (he/they), Lyndsey Frank (they/them), Nick Tiffany (they/any pronouns), Ruha Taslimi (they/them) — All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre 5919 Franklin Avenue, Los Angeles, CA

shows.description: Each week, the talented teams of iO come together to create characters, discover alternate realities, and play hilarious bits all inspired by one word from you, the audience! Using the Harold, an improvised story-telling format, iO's elite house teams will showcase the wonderful, strange, and thrilling art of improv, making you second-guess if what you're seeing is truly made up on-the-spot. Two teams will perform their individual sets and then end the show with The Dream, performing a near accurate depiction of an audience member's dreams! Featuring rotating performances from: Baby Grand BL!MP Morning Glory Chariot Mischief Feast The Wretched Fever Dream

shows.title: Deep Schwa
shows.excerpt: Chicago's longest-running Harold team returns to iO to bring their unique blend of chaos and creativity to iO's signature form The Harold melding games, songs, and scenes for singular, edge-of-your-seat improv comedy. Formed in 1996 Deep Schwa h...
shows.description: Chicago's longest-running Harold team returns to iO to bring their unique blend of chaos and creativity to iO's signature form The Harold melding games, songs, and scenes for singular, edge-of-your-seat improv comedy. Formed in 1996 Deep Schwa has over 50 members, has done over 1,000 shows, performed in theaters all over Chicago and beyond. Made up of a cast of Chicago's most seasoned and eclectic players and teachers it's a show perfect for the improv initiate and those just looking to chase away the Sunday scaries. Every Sunday, 29 years and counting. "Top-tier!" - AV Club "Legitimate." - Guy on Yelp "The most chaotic 'pro' team." - Redditor Cast: Jill Fenstermaker Liz Kirkwood Steve Nelson Eddie Piña Megan Redfearn Cassidy Russell Andy Stegmeyer Craig Uhlir Anthony LeBlanc IG: @deepschwa

shows.title: ASSSSCAT LA
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by true stories from a surprise celebrity guest. ASSSSCAT has played to critical acclaim and sold-out audiences across the country. What Is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians taking the stage with a surprise celebrity guest. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our “monologist “ shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestions. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world. Previous celebrity guests include: Will Ferrell, Mark Hamill, Tina Fey, Charles Barkley, Don Cheadle, Elizabeth Banks, Aubrey Plaza, Kumail Nanjiani, Amy Poehler, Robin Williams and more. Why See ASSSSCAT? ASSSSCAT is one of the best improv comedy shows in Los Angeles. Each show is a one-of-a-kind live comedy experience. Whether you’re a longtime fan of UCB or searching for live comedy in LA for the first time, or looking for new exciting date ideas in LA, ASSSSCAT offers a chance to see the best comedians in LA at the top of their game, and don’t forget the surprise celebrity guest at every show! And don’t worry, if you can’t see the show live, we also offer a LIVESTREAM option for all performances! Critics and audiences agree: “Unbelievably funny.” – LA Times • “Best of LA: Best Improv.” – Los Angeles Magazine • “Best of LA: Best Improv Show.” – LA Weekly Readers Poll • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” – Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” – Vice Magazine • “Critics’ Pick” – Time Out Los Angeles About the Venue The Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is one of the most well-known comedy venues in Los Angeles

shows.title: CLASS: Annoyance Summer Intensive Part 1: August 10 - 14
shows.excerpt: Annoyance 2026 Summer Intensives 5 day course - 6 hours per day PART 1: The Annoyance Training Center teaches students how to develop and maintain a strong individual voice in their improvisation. These intensives will address the initiatio
shows.description: Annoyance 2026 Summer Intensives 5 day course - 6 hours per day PART 1: The Annoyance Training Center teaches students how to develop and maintain a strong individual voice in their improvisation. These intensives will address the initiation of a scene; developing and maintaining strong characters; learning to hold on to your initial choices while at the same time, expanding on (heightening) the choices you have made; and learning to become deft at creating and weaving unexpected, character-based choices into your work. Annoyance classes challenge the conventional wisdom of the rules of improvisation, examining what’s behind them and how they came to be in the first place. Simply put, we make you the best improviser YOU can be. All of our intensive teachers are ensemble members who have learned and performed with The Annoyance, and thus have first hand experience with the way we approach improvisation. PART 2: Took the Intensive Part 1 and want more? Want to go further with your exploration of our philosophy? This is for you! With this intensive sequel, we go deeper into the teachings of The Annoyance, tackling things like context, group scene work, ensemble and much more. Prerequisite for Part 2: Students must have previously completed an Annoyance Part 1 Intensive or have completed AP5 within The Annoyance Training Center SCHEDULE: Classes: Mon - Fri 10am-5pm with a 1 hour break for lunch (1-2pm) Optional Workshops: Mon - Thu 5-7pm Optional Showcase: Fri 6pm Registration is Non-Refundable: Please be sure about your schedule before you register for class. Here’s why…. Your enrollment HOLDS A SPACE in a class that we are no longer able to offer someone else. Class payments are NON-REFUNDABLE, NON-TRANSFERABLE, and can be applied only to the current term’s class for which you have signed up. This applies if you get cast in a show, get a new job, or other situation, or have other changes to your schedule. So please be sure about your schedule before you register.

shows.title: The Punch-up with Beth Stelling
shows.excerpt: A good-natured stand-up open mic where Beth Stelling punches your jokes up (when possible) Hi! I'm comedian Beth Stelling. I headlined Omaha Comedy Festival a few years ago and they asked me to lead a stand-up workshop, which I don't…
shows.description: A good-natured stand-up open mic where Beth Stelling punches your jokes up (when possible) Hi! I’m comedian Beth Stelling . I headlined Omaha Comedy Festival a few years ago and they asked me to lead a stand-up workshop, which I don’t really [know how to] do. When considering what I could offer fellow comedians (novice or otherwise), I figured it was to listen and offer feedback in the form of a tag or punchline. So we did that on a Sunday morning with a really great group of varying levels of comedians and it was so fun! Right now, I think things are feeling dark and roasting one another isn’t helping… therefore I offer you The Punch-up Mic! It’s a stand-up open mic where you can bring: a bit that works and you love but want to make better a late night set you’re perfecting an idea you want to workout you want to try stand-up for the first time! All ages that are over 18 and experience levels welcome! Let’s get loose. I, Beth Stelling, have credits if you feel like you need that. I started stand-up in Chicago eighteen years ago and have been in mostly L.A. (Improv and Comedy Store Paid Regular) but a little bit of NYC (passed at The Cellar) as well. I’ve got specials on HBO Max, Netflix, Showtime and Comedy Central but I feel like a good amount of my stuff is ending up on YouTube. I’ve performed late night sets on Conan , Jimmy Kimmel Live , The Pete Holmes Show and Last Call with Carson Daly (I’m 40). I’ve done punch-up on countless comedy movies like Good Boys and some where I signed my right to a credit away for cold hard cash. I’ve written on television shows like Crashing , I Love You America with Sarah Silverman , The Last O.G. , Rick and Morty , Another Period and Strange Planet . — This show is FREE! Just show up on the day at the UCB Annex if you’d like to perform or join the audience. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Upright Citizens
shows.cast: Beth Stelling

shows.description: Looking for a Stand-up Comedy Open Mic that’s a supportive room and always a good time? Look no further than the Ya'll Mic. Whether you’re a seasoned comic, an improvisor who’s always wanted to try standup, or you just decided that today’s the day for your first open mic (kudos) – The Ya'll Mic is a great venue to workshop your bits. The show is every Tuesday from 5:30pm – 7:30pm. Signup is online and the signup sheet is posted on Facebook & IG on Mondays. The list is emailed out a few hours before the show. Comics get 4 minutes of stage time (and a lifetime of memories.) While all are welcome, the room prioritizes BIPOC, LGBTQ+, and Femme comics. Come laugh with us!

shows.title: Experimental Mic
shows.excerpt: An open mic where comedians can push boundaries, try bold new ideas, and embrace the unpredictable. The comedy laboratory where anything can happen! Every Tuesday at the UCB Annex, this isn’t your average open mic. It’s a playground for comedians…
shows.description: An open mic where comedians can push boundaries, try bold new ideas, and embrace the unpredictable. The comedy laboratory where anything can happen! Every Tuesday at the UCB Annex, this isn’t your average open mic. It’s a playground for comedians to push boundaries, try bold new ideas, and embrace the unpredictable. From themed sets and tag-team comedy to audience challenges and heckle-friendly rounds, it brings a fresh lineup of inventive formats designed to keep performers and audiences on their toes. Whether you’re a seasoned comic testing new material or a first-timer stepping into the spotlight, Experimental Mic is the perfect space to get weird, wild, and wonderfully hilarious. Come see comedians experiment, fail gloriously, and maybe create something brilliant. It’s raw, unfiltered, and absolutely hilarious. You don’t want to miss it. Each comic gets 5 minutes. 15 performance spots available. Come put your name in the bucket at 7pm to see if you’re chosen. Hosted by Deric Brown — This show is free! Just walk in. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Annex 1925 N Bronson Avenue, Los Angeles, CA

shows.title: The FREE WEDNESDAY SHOW feat Dumb John and Birdlady
shows.excerpt: ***This is a free show, but it is highly recommended to reserve your ticket here to guarantee entry.***** Regarded as one of Chicago's funniest and most promising improv groups of the last decade, Dumb John is proud to take the iO Stage with Bird...
shows.description: ***This is a free show, but it is highly recommended to reserve your ticket here to guarantee entry.***** Regarded as one of Chicago's funniest and most promising improv groups of the last decade, Dumb John is proud to take the iO Stage with Birdlady in a new weekly long form improv show. Both teams apply their high energy strain of improvisation to a bizarre cultural harvest of small town Americana influence and ephemera, using a single audience suggestion to inspire a piece of unhinged long form improv that propels diesel-soaked characters through fever dream karaoke scenes and down neon aisles of roadside antique marts; exploring the depravity and brilliance found at the heart of every moment. Take flight with two back to back original iO ensembles, Birdlady and Dumb John! Every Wednesday night at 7:30 (FREE), watch as they migrate toward their ultimate destination: hilarious long-form improvisation! It’ll be a HOOT! They’re so funny this show should be Ill-EAGLE! People can’t stop RAVEN about this show! DOORS: 7:00pm SHOW: 7:30pm Birdlady is: Ali Khan Alonso Ramirez Daryn Robinson Devin Henderson Erin Washington Justin Parlette Lauren Frost Ryan Nolan Dumb John is: Mike Geraghty Steve Plock Linda Orr Traycie Mcbee Follow our teams on Instagram at @birdlady.io & @dumbjohn

shows.title: Junk Drawer Comedy
shows.excerpt: It’s time to dig deep inside your Junk Drawer and dredge up a blast from the past. This nostalgia-filled comedy show features people showing off real diary entries, class projects, songs, and more from their past. Then, a group of improv comedians...
shows.description: It’s time to dig deep inside your Junk Drawer and dredge up a blast from the past. This nostalgia-filled comedy show features people showing off real diary entries, class projects, songs, and more from their past. Then, a group of improv comedians perform scenes inspired by this material. Put some batteries in the old digital camera and get ready to make some new memories. Don’t forget to tag me in the Facebook album “RaNdOm<3”! (But for real, tag us in pictures and videos on Instagram @junkdrawershow).

shows.title: Baby Wants Candy, The Fully Improvised Musical
shows.excerpt: World famous, fully improvised musical. “TRULY AMAZING! CRITICS’ PICK” – The New York Times The world’s most popular completely improvised musical! Baby Wants Candy is a critically acclaimed comedy ensemble with casts in Chicago, LA, NY and an international…
shows.description: World famous, fully improvised musical. “TRULY AMAZING! CRITICS’ PICK” – The New York Times The world’s most popular completely improvised musical! Baby Wants Candy is a critically acclaimed comedy ensemble with casts in Chicago, LA, NY and an international touring company. The audience shouts out the title of a musical that has never been performed before. Baby Wants Candy then creates that musical on the spot. Everything is improvised- the story, the characters, the music played by the band and what we loving refer to as “choreography”- all made up on the spot. Some of our favorite recent title- Kidz Boppenheimer, Dune Where’s My Car and Hotuncle.com, the Musical. Start thinking of your title now! “TRULY AMAZING! CRITICS’ PICK” – The New York Times https://www.babywantscandy.com/ LINEUP TBA! —- In-person tickets are $15 in advance and $20 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. shows.excerpt: You've been summoned...to laugh. Jury Duty is a fully improvised courtroom comedy where the only thing on trial is sanity itself. Each night, the cast creates a brand new legal disaster based on audience suggestion, questionable logic, and
shows.description: You've been summoned...to laugh. Jury Duty is a fully improvised courtroom comedy where the only thing on trial is sanity itself. Each night, the cast creates a brand new legal disaster based on audience suggestion, questionable logic, and total chaos. Watch as the foreperson loses their mind, evidence makes things worse, and deliberations go off the rails. No script, no rules, no justice. Just comedy The trial is fake, the laughs are real

shows.description: Join iO house team Fizz for Chicago's most carbonated improv show. Wednesdays at 10 p.m., Fizz cracks open a high-octane, full-sugar set of one-night-only scenes, characters and stories with a special guest opener. Plus: Each week one resident Fizzicist must complete their assigned task or be sentenced to a sip of the foul-flavored FIZZ CUP. Will they Fizz or Flop? Come find out! shows.title: Thursday Night Improv Hosted by Creamboy
shows.excerpt: If you’re looking for a date night, girls’ night out, or a mandatory work outing (that your staff will actually like) — Look no further! Fast, funny, and frothy, Thursday Night Improv is entirely improvised and features a different guest opener f...
shows.description: If you’re looking for a date night, girls’ night out, or a mandatory work outing (that your staff will actually like) — Look no further! Fast, funny, and frothy, Thursday Night Improv is entirely improvised and features a different guest opener for veteran iO house team Creamboy every week. Every show is completely different, so you can keep coming back for more! Will you be the lucky audience member to receive the coveted title of Cream of the Week? Creamboy is made up of seasoned Chicago improvisers who play and teach all over the city (and country! And WORLD?!) which means this show is perfect for improv nerds, millennials who love Tina Fey, and even your cousin visiting from Kansas. Comedy so good you'll lick your lips and pat your belly. Mmmm so creamy! Get a taste of Creamboy on Instagram @ creamboy.io

shows.title: Improv: The Play
shows.excerpt: With the help of some of Chicago’s best actors, Improv: The Play is a new, hybrid version of long form improv happening only at the iO Theater. Each night, professional actors prepare a scene from a play. Their scene partners, however, are never ...
shows.description: With the help of some of Chicago’s best actors, Improv: The Play is a new, hybrid version of long form improv happening only at the iO Theater. Each night, professional actors prepare a scene from a play. Their scene partners, however, are never given a script, and must improvise their way through the scene. The result is a totally original, never before seen piece of theater. It’s drama, it’s comedy, it’s everything that’s magical about theater and improvisation. Come watch this brand-new show at iO and see something you won’t see anywhere else in the city. Featuring: Alex Beard Heather Mari Elijah Sloan Lexi Putter Lucas Pollitzer Marino Korellis Montrez Hawkins Nikk Tetreault Ryan Bowman Shawna Seals Directed by: James Dugan Produced by: Cory Hardin

shows.title: hark!
shows.excerpt: hark! the voice of god is in this show, and he’s pissed. and relieved. and...scared? 8 disciples of improv gather together to perform what some would call a harold, all under the omnipresent eye of god. if god sees something in a scene that they...
shows.description: hark! the voice of god is in this show, and he’s pissed. and relieved. and...scared? 8 disciples of improv gather together to perform what some would call a harold, all under the omnipresent eye of god. if god sees something in a scene that they want to change, add, or comment on, a divine intervention may occur... opened each week by a different harolds after dark team! _____________________ Additional option to include the hark! cocktail, "The Scream Queen" , with your ticket. It includes tamarind vodka, passion fruit, and lime topped with soda water Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: Press Start: An Improvised Musical
shows.excerpt: Press Start: An Improvised Musical is a hilarious, high-energy full improvised musical inspired by the games you know and love. Each show, our cast creates a brand-new adventure on the spot using audience suggestions, complete with original
shows.description: Press Start: An Improvised Musical is a hilarious, high-energy full improvised musical inspired by the games you know and love. Each show, our cast creates a brand-new adventure on the spot using audience suggestions, complete with original songs, unforgettable characters, epic quests, and plenty of unexpected twists. From fantasy kingdoms and cozy villages to space battles and chaotic multiplayer mayhem, no two shows are ever the same. Whether you're a hardcore gamer or just love comedy and live theater, Press Start is a one-of-a-kind experience that turns the magic of games into a fully improvised musical adventure. Grab your party and get ready to press start.

shows.description: Improv comedy based on your shitty month! Let’s face it; this month was trash. We’re here to help! Come to the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre and watch the best comedians in Los Angeles turn your misery into comedy. Featuring some of your favorite comedians from TV, film, Dropout, Smosh, podcasts, and more! Toast this garbage month off by throwing up your middle finger and sharing what made it suck so royally. A cast of veteran comedians will take your stories of woe and spin them into comedy gold. Therapy through laughter! Get your tickets and join us in sending this stupid month back to hell where it belongs. shows.title: The Saga of the Skeeter Stevenson Variety Hour
shows.excerpt: Skeeter Stevenson is an amateur slam poet and a professional activist who has traveled the world spreading a message of peace and love (not in a religious way). Skeeter is a passionate protester and a complicated character who, through his work, h...
shows.description: Skeeter Stevenson is an amateur slam poet and a professional activist who has traveled the world spreading a message of peace and love (not in a religious way). Skeeter is a passionate protester and a complicated character who, through his work, has changed tens of minds to date. Kevin is his best friend. The Saga of the Shining Emblem is a one-of-a-kind improvised story-telling experience. One lucky audience member will be selected to be the hero of their own epic quest and given the opportunity to have their name forever engraved upon the walls of the Hall of Heroes. Separately, these shows have changed the world. Together, they are an unstoppable force of comedy. The Saga of the Skeeter Stevenson Variety Hour is a combo show unlike any other. This show WILL change your heart and mind. Featuring special surprise guests!

shows.title: Draft Night
shows.excerpt: Teams are drafted the first week, then perform for the rest of the month. Week 1: 3 Coaches host the show and draw their teams RANDOMLY from the chalice of audience submitted names. The newly drafted teams perform short scrimmage sets! Weeks 2-4:...
shows.description: Teams are drafted the first week, then perform for the rest of the month. Week 1: 3 Coaches host the show and draw their teams RANDOMLY from the chalice of audience submitted names. The newly drafted teams perform short scrimmage sets! Weeks 2-4: Teams perform weekly at Draft Night and get notes from their coach. Wash, Rinse, Repeat! *This is not a competition show* Rules: -You must be at Draft Night to enter the drawing -You must have completed at least two WGIS classes (not counting drop-ins) -People selected will pay $15 for their month of coach notes. Scholarships available upon request to shows@wgimprovschool.com All this same info and a bit more is listed here: https://wgimprovschool.com/draftnight

shows.title: Blueprint
shows.excerpt: Blueprint is the kind of improv that keeps audiences AND players on their toes. Each week, a different cast member designs a bold new improv format that their fellow performers will learn about at the same time as the crowd. Expect the unexpected ...
shows.description: Blueprint is the kind of improv that keeps audiences AND players on their toes. Each week, a different cast member designs a bold new improv format that their fellow performers will learn about at the same time as the crowd. Expect the unexpected as we build something completely original, live, right before your eyes. Past forms have included: Improvised Severance - Guided by two internal "staff members," three performers are physically out of the room, while three others perform as their innies, and every 5 minutes, the two swapped. Can they make sense of their outies? and versa? Understudies - In a longform narrative, each player on stage knows that they will eventually understudy another player in the show. The lights change and they have to embody a different player, and each time the lights change, they can select another player to embody. Overachiever - Three 2-person monoscenes happen on stage, utilizing the same physical space, but taking place in categorically different spaces. They must navigate space atop of and around one another while keeping connection to their partner. Improvised Heist - Ocean's Eleven, eat your heart out! Our players hit the major plot points of a heist and improvise their way through - initial idea, building the team, planning the heist, executing, and the aftermath Blueprint is joined each week by a lab cast opening for the show with their own unique, original form. Directed by James Dugan Cast: James Dugan Avery Ford Molly Jones Allen Lucas Janelle Soulliere Ryan Bowman

shows.title: Musical Improv Jam
shows.excerpt: A free musical improv jam. Musical improv is improv with the added conventions of musical theatre, meaning that your improvised scenes turn to songs, and you make up all the sung lyrics and choreography along with the scene. Whether you've…
shows.description: A free musical improv jam. Musical improv is improv with the added conventions of musical theatre, meaning that your improvised scenes turn to songs, and you make up all the sung lyrics and choreography along with the scene. Whether you’ve never tried musical improv before, are a student studying musical improv, or are an established improviser who wants to try something new, this jam is a low-pressure FREE opportunity to do musical improv, joined by veterans of the form. Please note, this is a jam, NOT a class, meaning we won’t be teaching the conventions of the form, we’ll just be playing sets! You are totally welcome to jump in regardless, but if that feels scary, Musical Improv 101 is a great place to start learning about this form! Hosted by: Ryan Brookshire, Tara Copeland, Philip Labes, Greg Smith, Ashley Ward and Andrew Young No reservations needed – just show up and jam! — Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre 5919 Franklin Avenue, Los Angeles, CA
shows.cast: Tara Copeland, Philip Labes, Greg L. Smith, Ashley Ward, Andrew Young, Ryan Brookshire

shows.description: UCB comedy powerhouse, The Prophecy, does an hour of improv based on your futures. Come watch the long-running, critically-acclaimed UCB improv team, The Prophecy, do an hour of improv based on your futures. Will the trip be a disaster? Will the crush say yes? shows.description: The world’s most popular completely improvised full band musical! Baby Wants Candy is a critically acclaimed comedy ensemble with casts in Chicago, LA, NY and an international touring company. The audience shouts out a title of a musical that has never been performed before. Accompanied by a full band, the first title the group hears becomes the title and theme for that evening’s completely improvised musical. shows.title: TGIF with Duchovny & Olestra
shows.excerpt: Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But we do know it's improv every Friday @ 7pm! Buy Tickets
shows.description: DOORS: 6:30 PM SHOW: 7:00 PM Eris Deep Space (downstairs) "It's Friday night and the mood is right. Gonna have some fun, show you how it's done, TGIF". BCC is bringing back ABC's TGIF programming block Fridays at 7pm ET / 6 pm CT with Duchovny and Olestra. Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But it will be funny and it will be on Friday and we will thank god for both. Duchovny is a group of elite New York maniacs comprised of veteran improvisers, actors, and comedians who you've probably seen in TV, movies, and even the most coveted work of all, digital-only commercials that air before Youtube videos. Duchovny is fast paced, high energy and filled to the brim with chaos. Olestra is a squad of dangerous Chicago criminals who make out and beat the hell out of each other on stage here in New York. They evaded arrest by racking up credits in the entertainment industry; The Tonight Show, The Second City, UCB Betty, The Improvised Shakespeare Company, to name a few. Duchovny is: Amanda Breen @amanda_breen James Dwyer @jamesbdwyer Lou Gonzalez @angrylou Patrick Keene @pad00d2.0 Yoni Lotan @yonilotan Tami Sagher @tamisagher Akmal Tajihan @akmaltajihan Sarah Grace Welbourn @sgwelbs Duchovny @duchovnyimprov Olestra is: Dan Bazaldua @dannbazz Devin Bockrath @durvinbuttrath Nick Mestad @nick_mestad Micah Sterenberg @micah_humble_blessed Andy Junk @therealandyjunk Fine Print: Must be 21+ to attend. No outside alcohol is allowed in the space. There are 35 seats - first come, first serve - and then standing room up to capacity. All ticket sales are final - no refunds. If you must miss your show, email us at info@brooklyncc.com with at least 24 hours notice and we can transfer your tickets to any upcoming show at the BCC. Answers to most other questions can be found here . If show is sold out, limited tickets will be available at the door. Lineup subject to change. Buy tickets $5 OFF TIX BEFORE DAY OF SHOW

shows.title: ComedySportz
shows.excerpt: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whet...
shows.description: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whether you're bringing your family, your co-workers, or a date - you are welcome, and you will laugh. ComedySportz is two teams of all-star improv comedians going head to head in comedy games, scenes and songs. YOU will vote on which team you liked the best and the teams will score points based on your applause. One of our world-famous referees will guide you through the whole show and may even ask for your help on stage. Every show ends in our incredible 6 THINGS game that is known throughout the world as 'the hardest game in all of improv'. It's fast. It's hilarious. It's appropriate for all ages. It's ComedySportz.

shows.title: Rudder Bullshit
shows.excerpt: Hundreds of miles offshore, a luxury cruise liner cuts through the Atlantic at double speed. At the helm? A megalomaniac captain in love with his own reflection & exploiting his beleaguered crew past their breaking point. As rebellion brews
shows.description: Hundreds of miles offshore, a luxury cruise liner cuts through the Atlantic at double speed. At the helm? A megalomaniac captain in love with his own reflection & exploiting his beleaguered crew past their breaking point. As rebellion brews below, things are also heating up above deck! Love blossoms among thrill-seeking women, a heavy metal band grapples with their past & present, and a council of walruses issues a prophecy for destruction. Rudder Bullshit is a new play from the masterminds that brought you Docked and Loaded. Featuring original rock ballads that are guaranteed to make you put your lighters up! Hop aboard and strap in for what critics are calling "an edge in your seat adventure"! It's some Rudder Bullshit!

This award-winning team has their own unique spin on a classic improv form, The Harold , and is known for their solo scenes, artistic style, and dastardly sense of humor. shows.title: Improvised Shakespeare Chicago
shows.venue: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
venues: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
shows.excerpt: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William ...
shows.description: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William Shakespeare. Inspired by one audience suggestion (a title for a play that has yet to be written) the dazzling players create a brand-new Shakespearean masterpiece right before your eyes. Nothing has been planned out, rehearsed, or written. The dialogue is said for the first time, the characters are created as you watch, and if ever you're wondering where the story is going...so are they! You've never seen the Bard like this before! “There’s really nothing quite like it in the city of Chicago. Smart, sophisticated, downright hilarious.” -TimeOut Chicago “…the show channels Monty Python as often as the Bard, and frequently with sly-witted results.” -The Chicago Tribune “Consistently Hilarious” -The Chicago Reader “Staggeringly Brilliant” -TimeOut Chicago “Consistently funny…'Tis v'ry, v'ry good.” -The Chicago Tribune “Indisputably great improv, fueled by smart plot development, stage chemistry and recognizable characters.” -Centerstage Chicago “In short, outstanding.” -TimeOut Chicago Find out more at improvisedshakespeare.com _________________________ Additional option to include Improvised Shakespeare's featured cocktail, Hamlet , with your ticket. It includes Nolets Dry Gin, St-Germaine, Campari, orange juice, and garnished with an orange wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. shows.description: Andrew Sulfsted and Wyatt Menci felt the higher calling to be an Alderboy, a position in local politics that resides at the very bottom of influence. In order to build their way to the top, the two recruit talent from their ward to boost political sway and community swagger. Can the Alderboys save Lakeview East? Only if their constituents have the gumption they require. Or it may just save itself. Either way, the Alderboys are here to stay.

shows.description: Bitchin’ does improv based off your text messages while Rita Repulsa goes straight to the audience for some juicy DMs. PUT DOWN YOUR PHONE AND GET OUT YOUR PHONE! We all send those beautiful, well-worded, grammatically perfect texts we regret the moment we wake up the next day, and we all love a DM, so we decided to turn your best bad messages into improv comedy chaos! Join us for an hour of non-stop laughs all fueled by YOUR IDEAS. Bitchin’ performs a set based on your most outlandish text messages while Rita Repulsa looks for inspiration in your most brazen DM slides. So what are you waiting for, text or DM someone a link to this show and get your tickets today! Featuring: Bitchin’: Brace yourself for Bitchin’! Their fast-paced, physical, and overly supportive style is guaranteed to make you cream your jeans. So get a ticket or get a life! Cast: Lisa Gilroy, Rekha Shankar, Colin McGurk, Jake Jabbour, Rachel Van Nes, Allyn Pintal, Mikey Stephens, Wayland McQueen & Rita Repulsa: Much like our namesake, Rita Repulsa is pure wicked bitch chaos. This is not a normal improv show, it’s WORSE! This is a queer calamity of fast-paced nonsense, off-the-rails character “choices”, and aggressive stupidity. Come watch Rita perform fast, loose and fabulously Cast: Mano Agapion, Oscar Montoya, Ryan Barton, Chad Westbrook — Livestream tickets are $10. shows.title: ComedySportz
shows.excerpt: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whet...
shows.description: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whether you're bringing your family, your co-workers, or a date - you are welcome, and you will laugh. ComedySportz is two teams of all-star improv comedians going head to head in comedy games, scenes and songs. YOU will vote on which team you liked the best and the teams will score points based on your applause. One of our world-famous referees will guide you through the whole show and may even ask for your help on stage. Every show ends in our incredible 6 THINGS game that is known throughout the world as 'the hardest game in all of improv'. It's fast. It's hilarious. It's appropriate for all ages. It's ComedySportz.

shows.title: Improvised Jane Austen
shows.excerpt: "...countless laughs...whimsical homage to the illustrious author." -- Chicago Reader Improvised Jane Austen continues its entirely improvised tales of love and laughter this summer. Audiences will enjoy an evening with wit and heart in equal me...
shows.description: "...countless laughs...whimsical homage to the illustrious author." -- Chicago Reader Improvised Jane Austen continues its entirely improvised tales of love and laughter this summer. Audiences will enjoy an evening with wit and heart in equal measure with an improvised rom-com for everyone, whether you love Austen or just like to laugh! Improvised Jane Austen currently performs Saturday nights at 6:00 pm at iO Theater and tickets are $20. "...[They] took it, owned it and created some really funny and touching moments....an evening of silliness and indulgence....make running amok look like delicious fun." -- PerformInk Chicago Join Improvised Jane Austen for the signature romantic comedy and social satire of the beloved author, improvised by Chicago's top comedic talent. Celebrate all things love, friendship, and Austen this Summer. “...Improvised Jane Austen is one of the strongest improv troupes in the city. They have the ability to use Austen’s 19th century wit and sarcasm and make it recognizable for a 21st-century audience." --Scapi Magazine Improvised Jane Austen is a comedic ensemble that creates unscripted performances using Jane Austen's tropes, themes, and language to create a satirical romantic comedy set in Regency-era England. Playing in Austen’s world, Improvised Jane Austen’s stories delight 21st century audiences with a modern sense and sensibility. The current cast of 20+ performers rotate weekly, creating a new ensemble for every show. Come for the humor, stay for the heart! Throughout the show’s run, Improvised Jane Austen has been Chicago Reader Recommended , named a PerformInk Critics’ Pick , voted Best sketch/improv troupe 2019 in the Reader’s Best of Chicago , and was featured on WTTW playlist , in Time Out , the Chicago Tribune and on a their list of what to do on Valentine’s Day , on WGN’s Daytime Chicago in 2024 and 2026 and on CBS News Chicago . Learn more: https://improvisedjaneausten.com/
