shows.description: ASIAN AF (Asian As F**k) is the premier Asian American comedy variety show in the nation, and is thrilled to be back in New York City at UCB! The show spotlights some of the funniest Asian American actors, stand-up comedians, improvisers, sketch performers, musicians, storytellers and more… from TV, film, and stages across the U.S. The show has been featured on several news sites such as The New York Times, LA Times, NBC News, ABC News, Vulture, SoCal Public Radio (KPCC), and more. Featured performers: TBA Featuring Improv From The Joy F*ck Club (rotating cast): Nicole Asava (HBO), Donald Chang (HBO), Sean Chang (Magnet, UCB), Alex Cheng (NPR), Ryan Chittaphong (Story Pirates), Jenny Arimoto (Asian Not Asian), Kurt Cruz (kukomusic), Florence Friebe (Karmila Music), Fu Goto (RaaaatScraps), Risa Harms (McSweeney’s), Aakash Kesavarapu (NY Comedy Festival), Kendra Singh (Reductress), Achilles Stamatelaky (Audible), Akmal Tajihan (Duchovny), Alex Yang (UCB), and Angel Yau (HBO)! Asian AF has been the headlining act for several comedy festivals, including SF Sketchfest, The New York Comedy Festival, Asian Comedy Fest, Clusterfest (SF), The Del Close Marathon (NYC/LA), Austin Sketchfest (TX), Baltimore Comedy Festival (MD), The OC Improv Festival (CA), Hartford Improv Fest (CT), The Hawaii Comedy Festival (HI), SteelStacks Improv Comedy Festival (PA), 2nd Best Fest (Richmond, VA), the District Improv Festival (Washington, D.C), Das Improv Fest (Germany), the Edinburgh International Improv Festival (Scotland), and many more! Asian AF was selected as part of the 2023 and 2024 Comedy Seasons at The Kennedy Center in Washington, D.C. shows.title: The Armando Diaz Experience
shows.description: The legendary show is reborn! Created in 1995 at the iO Theater in Chicago, The Armando Diaz Experience IS the longest running improv show EVER. A guest monologist takes a suggestion from the audience and shares true stories from their life. These stories are then brought to life by a rotating cast of improv all-stars, which take audiences on a high minded, exhilarating comedic joy ride that will leave mouths tired of smiling. And occasionally, just occasionally, the man with his name on the show will drop by for some fun. "The “Armando,” performed every Saturday, always begins with a monologue, and at a recent show it was about a connection made on the internet that led a decade later to a real-life relationship. The team of improvisers built patient scenes off this moving story, which made daring shifts in perspective, from the real world to secret worlds, inside and outside of bodies. There was a playfulness to the creativity, bold choices that verged on reckless that wouldn’t make the transition to a script." NYTimes Magnet Theater 254 West 29th St. New York NY 10001 Tickets The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Suerynn Lee Sat Aug 15th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Rob Penty Sat Jul 18th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Phil Sugar Sat Jul 25th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Tessa Flannery Sat Aug 1st, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Carson Olshanksky Sat Aug 8th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Kate Jordan Sat Aug 22nd, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Monologist TBA Sat Aug 29th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket Performers Justin Anderson Rick Andrews Christopher Bell Hannah Chase Kevin Cragg Shacottha Fields Elana Fishbein Megan Gray Eleanor Lewis Christine Magee Dennis Pacheco Xavier Padin Jamie R

shows.title: Improvised Shakespeare Chicago
shows.venue: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
venues: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
shows.excerpt: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William ...
shows.description: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William Shakespeare. Inspired by one audience suggestion (a title for a play that has yet to be written) the dazzling players create a brand-new Shakespearean masterpiece right before your eyes. Nothing has been planned out, rehearsed, or written. The dialogue is said for the first time, the characters are created as you watch, and if ever you're wondering where the story is going...so are they! You've never seen the Bard like this before! “There’s really nothing quite like it in the city of Chicago. Smart, sophisticated, downright hilarious.” -TimeOut Chicago “…the show channels Monty Python as often as the Bard, and frequently with sly-witted results.” -The Chicago Tribune “Consistently Hilarious” -The Chicago Reader “Staggeringly Brilliant” -TimeOut Chicago “Consistently funny…'Tis v'ry, v'ry good.” -The Chicago Tribune “Indisputably great improv, fueled by smart plot development, stage chemistry and recognizable characters.” -Centerstage Chicago “In short, outstanding.” -TimeOut Chicago Find out more at improvisedshakespeare.com _________________________ Additional option to include Improvised Shakespeare's featured cocktail, Hamlet , with your ticket. It includes Nolets Dry Gin, St-Germaine, Campari, orange juice, and garnished with an orange wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: Best of iO Improv
shows.excerpt: Celebrate 45 years of improvisational excellence with the Best of iO Improv. This show brings together two teams of our very best improvisers, each delivering a high energy, hilarious set in classic iO forms like the Living Room, Weirdass, Shotgun...
shows.description: Celebrate 45 years of improvisational excellence with the Best of iO Improv. This show brings together two teams of our very best improvisers, each delivering a high energy, hilarious set in classic iO forms like the Living Room, Weirdass, Shotgun, and more. Between sets, the show drops into The Dream, a surreal, mind bending journey through one day based on an interview with an audience member. Fast, fearless, and funny, this is iO improvisation at its highest level.

shows.title: The Midsummer Masquerade: Scandal-Inspired Improv, Incognito
shows.excerpt: An evening of elegant buffoonery. Comics don masks and evening dress to improvise scenes inspired by scandalous stories. You are cordially invited. We have the distinct honor of inviting you to The Midsummer Masquerade, a night of live comedy unlike…
shows.description: An evening of elegant buffoonery. Comics don masks and evening dress to improvise scenes inspired by scandalous stories. You are cordially invited. We have the distinct honor of inviting you to The Midsummer Masquerade, a night of live comedy unlike anything in Los Angeles. Join us not just for an improv comedy show, but for a night of unparalleled sophistication and unmatched imbecility. This evening is entirely unscripted and created on the spot by the best comedians in LA with the help of your most scandalous stories. Upon entering, you will be provided with a masquerade mask. Throughout the show we will ask three audience members to share their most salacious stories of scandal. (Fear not, this doesn’t have to be a scandalous story involving you, personally, and the storytellers are free to anonymize the story’s characters however they’d like.) Should you be so kind as to share a story, we will use it as the inspiration for the show. You are more than welcome to join in the fun and attend in whatever evening dress means to you—but this of course optional—as simply by attending you’ve already proven yourself the most elegant revel-goer in Los Angeles. See LA’s most talented improvisers put on a night of immersive, interactive comedy arrayed in their finest vestments and free from inhibitions so often brought on by the embarrassment of an unclothed face. So whether you’re looking for date night ideas in LA that involve mystery, elegance, and snorting through your nose so hard that you black out, or you just need things to do in LA this weekend, come to a night of comedy like you’ve never seen before, never to be seen again. Bring your friends. Bring your enemies. Who cares? You won’t know who’s who. Featuring: Lily Du, Griffin Kelly, Artoun Nazareth, Nnamdi Ngwe, Tucker Reynolds, Monika Smith, Ruha Taslimi, and Luke Wink-Moran Follow us @masqueradecomedy Show art by Hot Metal Playground — All sales are final. shows.title: ComedySportz
shows.excerpt: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whet...
shows.description: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whether you're bringing your family, your co-workers, or a date - you are welcome, and you will laugh. ComedySportz is two teams of all-star improv comedians going head to head in comedy games, scenes and songs. YOU will vote on which team you liked the best and the teams will score points based on your applause. One of our world-famous referees will guide you through the whole show and may even ask for your help on stage. Every show ends in our incredible 6 THINGS game that is known throughout the world as 'the hardest game in all of improv'. It's fast. It's hilarious. It's appropriate for all ages. It's ComedySportz.

shows.title: ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. shows.title: ASSSSCAT LA
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by true stories from a surprise celebrity guest. ASSSSCAT has played to critical acclaim and sold-out audiences across the country. What Is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians taking the stage with a surprise celebrity guest. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our “monologist “ shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestions. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world. Previous celebrity guests include: Will Ferrell, Mark Hamill, Tina Fey, Charles Barkley, Don Cheadle, Elizabeth Banks, Aubrey Plaza, Kumail Nanjiani, Amy Poehler, Robin Williams and more. Why See ASSSSCAT? ASSSSCAT is one of the best improv comedy shows in Los Angeles. Each show is a one-of-a-kind live comedy experience. Whether you’re a longtime fan of UCB or searching for live comedy in LA for the first time, or looking for new exciting date ideas in LA, ASSSSCAT offers a chance to see the best comedians in LA at the top of their game, and don’t forget the surprise celebrity guest at every show! And don’t worry, if you can’t see the show live, we also offer a LIVESTREAM option for all performances! Critics and audiences agree: “Unbelievably funny.” – LA Times • “Best of LA: Best Improv.” – Los Angeles Magazine • “Best of LA: Best Improv Show.” – LA Weekly Readers Poll • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” – Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” – Vice Magazine • “Critics’ Pick” – Time Out Los Angeles About the Venue The Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is one of the most well-known comedy venues in Los Angeles

shows.title: Never Not Murder
shows.excerpt: Never Not Murder steps into 1944 Chicago, where honest detective Frankie King navigates a dangerous world of love, betrayal, and corruption while racing to stop a powerful figure’s rise to mayor. This stylish film noir embraces classic tropes—femm...
shows.description: Never Not Murder steps into 1944 Chicago, where honest detective Frankie King navigates a dangerous world of love, betrayal, and corruption while racing to stop a powerful figure’s rise to mayor. This stylish film noir embraces classic tropes—femme fatales, tangled relationships, and moral dilemmas—while reinventing them for the stage. A sharp, witty narrator breaks the fourth wall, guiding audiences through the twists and secrets of the story. Meanwhile, a visible, ever-moving “crew” interacts with both actors and audience, transforming the entire theater into a dynamic, immersive experience.

shows.title: D.A.R.E. Dropouts Presents: After School Special
shows.excerpt: The final bell just rang! You better get out of the classroom and get your ass to the iO Theater for After School Special brought to you by iO's first all-POC house team, D.A.R.E. Dropouts. This show brings you something new every week, featuring...
shows.description: The final bell just rang! You better get out of the classroom and get your ass to the iO Theater for After School Special brought to you by iO's first all-POC house team, D.A.R.E. Dropouts . This show brings you something new every week, featuring a variety of local acts by performers of color and an improv set from the Dropouts themselves. The coolest kids in school, no one does a Harold (iO's signature form) quite like D.A.R.E. Dropouts. We're bringing you comedy in color; you're gonna want to tune in. THE DROPOUTS: AJ Regalado Alexi Bolden Avery Ford Emefa Dzodzomenyo Grace Goze Jazmin Robinson Juliana Zepeta Kelton Neals Michael Elluru Montrez Hawkins Rudy Fajardo You can get the drop on D.A.R.E. Dropouts by following @daredropouts.io on Instagram! ______________________________ Additional option to include our featured cocktail, "The D.A.R.E. Special" with your ticket. It includes Tito's, club soda, grenadine, and pineapple juice. Best part? A portion of each sale supports scholarships for POC improvisers to take classes at iO. Gratuity is included with the listed price. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: Sketch Cram
shows.excerpt: A sketch comedy show made in ONE day, featuring New York’s best comedy writers and performers! Once a month, we cram together New York’s best writers and performers to craft an ALL-NEW sketch comedy show from scratch IN ONE SINGLE…
shows.description: A sketch comedy show made in ONE day, featuring New York’s best comedy writers and performers! Once a month, we cram together New York’s best writers and performers to craft an ALL-NEW sketch comedy show from scratch IN ONE SINGLE DAY! We start the day at 9am with NOTHING, but a show is going up by the end of the night whether we’re ready or not! Sketch Cram is all the comedy you can cram into a single show, featuring writers and performers from some of your favorite shows, bringing you 100% NEW CONTENT EVERY MONTH! So grab a ticket, and cram your butt into a seat! It’s Sketch Cram time, baby! SKETCH CRAM IS PRODUCED, DIRECTED AND WRITTEN BY: Georgie Aldaco Inside Amy Schumer, Miracle Workers [TBS], Koala Man [Hulu] Jared Bronen (Maude Night, New York Comedy Festival, The Trash King) Alex Guaglianone (Maude Night, Just For Laughs, Nicholl Fellowship Finalist, Austin Screenplay Finalist) Stacey Kulow (Maude Night, Austin Sketch Fest, Buffy the Gilmore Slayer Podcast) Hunter Nelson (The Onion, The Truth Fiction Podcast) Rachel Taenzler (Harold Night, PAGE Awards Finalist, TikTok home cook @racheltaenzler) THIS MONTH’S GUESTS… TBA — In-person tickets are $10 in advance and $15 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre: 242 East 14th Street, New York, NY 10003
shows.cast: Georgie Aldaco, Jared Bronen, Stacey Kulow, Hunter Nelson, Rachel Taenzler, Alex Guaglianone

shows.description: An all-new sketch comedy show written, rehearsed, and performed in a single day. 14 hours, 20 people, 1 all-new sketch comedy show written, rehearsed and performed in a single day. It’s SKETCH CRAM! Every month UCB’s top writers meet on a Saturday morning and begin writing the show from scratch. UCB’s best performers arrive that afternoon and start rehearsing. The show goes up that night no matter what! SKETCH CRAM is all the comedy you can cram into a single show in a single day. Featuring 100% new content every month! shows.title: LSI Open Stage
shows.excerpt: A weekly show where anyone can sign up with or without a group to perform improv on the LSI stage! Sign ups start at 5:30pm, show starts right at 6:00pm. If you want to perform at LSI, this is a great place to start! Show up, make some new
shows.description: A weekly show where anyone can sign up with or without a group to perform improv on the LSI stage! Sign ups start at 5:30pm, show starts right at 6:00pm. If you want to perform at LSI, this is a great place to start! Show up, make some new friends, and get some reps! LSI Open Stage has a max of 10 teams plus the mashup teams in order to provide everyone with enough stage time for their set. First come, first serve, doors open at 5:30pm. Free agents (performers who arrive without a team) are always welcome and encouraged to join the mashup teams! Sign ups / Doors Open 5:30 PM Show 6:00 PM - 7:30 PM Cost Free to watch!

shows.title: The Lady Jam
shows.excerpt: A jam-meets-dance-party for women and non-binary improvisors of all levels <3 Lady Jam is a longstanding UCB tradition — a FREE, inclusive, and welcoming improv jam for UCB students, performers, and fans who identify as women or non-binary! All you…
shows.description: A jam-meets-dance-party for women and non-binary improvisors of all levels <3 Lady Jam is a longstanding UCB tradition — a FREE, inclusive, and welcoming improv jam for UCB students, performers, and fans who identify as women or non-binary! All you have to do is put your name in a bucket, dance with us between sets (or tolerate our dancing), then get on stage with your new improv BFFs. Totally free, and no reservations needed! Just drop your name in the bucket and BAM — you’re performing, baby! Not ready to jam yet? Come hang! We welcome you any way you want to show up Hosts: Casey McCormick & Co! — Lineup is subject to change. Ages 17+ Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre: 242 East 14th Street, New York, NY 10003
shows.cast: Casey McCormick, Bridgette Rizkalla, Lida Darmian, Erin Michele Davis

shows.title: The Trial: An Improvised Court Experience
shows.excerpt: The Trial: An Improvised Court Experience Finally, an improv show that will make you want to go to jury duty! “The Trial” improvises a tense courtroom trial right before your eyes -- from dramatic opening statements to thrilling verdict. The first…
shows.description: The Trial: An Improvised Court Experience Finally, an improv show that will make you want to go to jury duty! “The Trial” improvises a tense courtroom trial right before your eyes — from dramatic opening statements to thrilling verdict. The first half of the show is a “Spokane” form in the courtroom; we flash back-and-forth in time from the courtroom to the events pertinent to the trial, all the while “seeing” testimony, witnesses, and evidence along the way. The second half of the show is a Monoscene taking place during deliberations as a jury decides the fate of the accused. Can you handle the truth??? Cast: Lauren Arnett, Ryan Barker, Sydney Bossuk, Zachary Clark, Lida Darmian, Jon Dimakopoulos, Ben Hirsch, John Kennedy, Sophia Kinne, Ryan Leach, Sebastian Martinez, Mary McDonnell, Vince Moran, Tom Powers, Mandy Ranero, Tyler Stuart, Kristen Tucker, and Jeff Wucher —- In-person tickets are $10 in advance and $15 on the day of the show Livestream tickets are $10. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre: 242 East 14th Street, New York, NY 10003

shows.title: Big Grande Live!
shows.excerpt: Big Grande hops onto the UCB stage for a live improv show that will leave you laughing (hopefully), and them sweating (definitely). Big Grande has been bringing their brand of rapid, honest, and wild live shows to sold out crowds…
shows.description: Big Grande hops onto the UCB stage for a live improv show that will leave you laughing (hopefully), and them sweating (definitely). Big Grande has been bringing their brand of rapid, honest, and wild live shows to sold out crowds around the country, hell, the continent, for over a decade. Join them for a show that leaves you laughing (hopefully) and them sweating (definitely). Big Grande is Dan Lippert, Jon Mackey, Ryan Rosenberg, and Drew Tarver . Their podcast, The Teachers Lounge, gained a fervent following on The Earwolf Network before they began selling it directly to fans. You can find it, along with their four episode live improvised comedy special, sketches, animated content, merch, and more at biggrandewebsite.com. Individually, you’ve seen them on The Other Two, Brooklyn 99, Paranormal Activity: Next of Kin, Superstore, Comedy Bang Bang, Son of Zorn, Bless the Harts, Playing House, and of course, Last Call with Carson Daly – as well as behind the camera on Lights Out with David Spade and Netflix: After Party. — Tickets are $15 in advance and $20 on the day of the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre 5919 Franklin Avenue, Los Angeles, CA
shows.cast: Dan Lippert, Jon Mackey, Ryan Rosenberg, Drew Tarver

shows.title: Living Room Living Room
shows.excerpt: LA’s funniest take on real life. Living Room Living Room is the premiere long-form improv show held at the World’s Greatest Improv School, where the city’s best comedians turn real stories into hilarious, totally unscripted scenes. Each week featu...
shows.description: LA’s funniest take on real life. Living Room Living Room is the premiere long-form improv show held at the World’s Greatest Improv School, where the city’s best comedians turn real stories into hilarious, totally unscripted scenes. Each week features a rotating cast of WGIS’s top performers—plus surprise guests from TV, film, and the national improv scene. Main Cast: Will Hines ( Broad City, Comedy Bang Bang, Brooklyn 99 ) Sarah Claspell ( Brooklyn 99, Jimmy Kimmel Live, Drunk History ) Jim Woods ( The Office, How I Met Your Mother, Reno 911 ) Beth Appel ( Sex Lives of College Girls, Never Have I Ever ) Dave Theune ( St. Denis Medical, Frasier ) Jamie Gaul ( General Hospital, Grey’s Anatomy, Medium ) Surprise guests every week. Past guests include: Colton Dunn ( Superstore, Key & Peele ) Zeke Nicholson ( Dropout TV, The Good Place, A.P. Bio ) Connor Ratliff ( Mean Girls, The George Lucas Talk Show ) + more!! Cast for Sunday May 3 Beth Appel Hazel Brady Russel Carter Sarah Claspell Rachel Clayton May Darmon Will Hines Mike McLendon Dave Theune Jim Woods

shows.title: Harold Night
shows.excerpt: Each week, the talented teams of iO come together to create characters, discover alternate realities, and play hilarious bits all inspired by one word from you, the audience! Using the Harold, an improvised story-telling format, iO's elite house t...
shows.description: Each week, the talented teams of iO come together to create characters, discover alternate realities, and play hilarious bits all inspired by one word from you, the audience! Using the Harold, an improvised story-telling format, iO's elite house teams will showcase the wonderful, strange, and thrilling art of improv, making you second-guess if what you're seeing is truly made up on-the-spot. Two teams will perform their individual sets and then end the show with The Dream, performing a near accurate depiction of an audience member's dreams! Featuring rotating performances from: Baby Grand BL!MP Morning Glory Chariot Mischief Feast The Wretched Fever Dream

shows.title: Deep Schwa
shows.excerpt: Chicago's longest-running Harold team returns to iO to bring their unique blend of chaos and creativity to iO's signature form The Harold melding games, songs, and scenes for singular, edge-of-your-seat improv comedy. Formed in 1996 Deep Schwa h...
shows.description: Chicago's longest-running Harold team returns to iO to bring their unique blend of chaos and creativity to iO's signature form The Harold melding games, songs, and scenes for singular, edge-of-your-seat improv comedy. Formed in 1996 Deep Schwa has over 50 members, has done over 1,000 shows, performed in theaters all over Chicago and beyond. Made up of a cast of Chicago's most seasoned and eclectic players and teachers it's a show perfect for the improv initiate and those just looking to chase away the Sunday scaries. Every Sunday, 29 years and counting. "Top-tier!" - AV Club "Legitimate." - Guy on Yelp "The most chaotic 'pro' team." - Redditor Cast: Jill Fenstermaker Liz Kirkwood Steve Nelson Eddie Piña Megan Redfearn Cassidy Russell Andy Stegmeyer Craig Uhlir Anthony LeBlanc IG: @deepschwa

shows.title: ASSSSCAT LA
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by true stories from a surprise celebrity guest. ASSSSCAT has played to critical acclaim and sold-out audiences across the country. What Is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians taking the stage with a surprise celebrity guest. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our “monologist “ shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestions. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world. Previous celebrity guests include: Will Ferrell, Mark Hamill, Tina Fey, Charles Barkley, Don Cheadle, Elizabeth Banks, Aubrey Plaza, Kumail Nanjiani, Amy Poehler, Robin Williams and more. Why See ASSSSCAT? ASSSSCAT is one of the best improv comedy shows in Los Angeles. Each show is a one-of-a-kind live comedy experience. Whether you’re a longtime fan of UCB or searching for live comedy in LA for the first time, or looking for new exciting date ideas in LA, ASSSSCAT offers a chance to see the best comedians in LA at the top of their game, and don’t forget the surprise celebrity guest at every show! And don’t worry, if you can’t see the show live, we also offer a LIVESTREAM option for all performances! Critics and audiences agree: “Unbelievably funny.” – LA Times • “Best of LA: Best Improv.” – Los Angeles Magazine • “Best of LA: Best Improv Show.” – LA Weekly Readers Poll • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” – Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” – Vice Magazine • “Critics’ Pick” – Time Out Los Angeles About the Venue The Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is one of the most well-known comedy venues in Los Angeles

shows.title: CLASS: Annoyance Summer Intensive Part 2: August 17 - 21
shows.excerpt: Annoyance 2026 Summer Intensives 5 day course - 6 hours per day PART 1: The Annoyance Training Center teaches students how to develop and maintain a strong individual voice in their improvisation. These intensives will address the initiatio
shows.description: Annoyance 2026 Summer Intensives 5 day course - 6 hours per day PART 1: The Annoyance Training Center teaches students how to develop and maintain a strong individual voice in their improvisation. These intensives will address the initiation of a scene; developing and maintaining strong characters; learning to hold on to your initial choices while at the same time, expanding on (heightening) the choices you have made; and learning to become deft at creating and weaving unexpected, character-based choices into your work. Annoyance classes challenge the conventional wisdom of the rules of improvisation, examining what’s behind them and how they came to be in the first place. Simply put, we make you the best improviser YOU can be. All of our intensive teachers are ensemble members who have learned and performed with The Annoyance, and thus have first hand experience with the way we approach improvisation. PART 2: Took the Intensive Part 1 and want more? Want to go further with your exploration of our philosophy? This is for you! With this intensive sequel, we go deeper into the teachings of The Annoyance, tackling things like context, group scene work, ensemble and much more. Prerequisite for Part 2: Students must have previously completed an Annoyance Part 1 Intensive or have completed AP5 within The Annoyance Training Center SCHEDULE: Classes: Mon - Fri 10am-5pm with a 1 hour break for lunch (1-2pm) Optional Workshops: Mon - Thu 5-7pm Optional Showcase: Fri 6pm Registration is Non-Refundable: Please be sure about your schedule before you register for class. Here’s why…. Your enrollment HOLDS A SPACE in a class that we are no longer able to offer someone else. Class payments are NON-REFUNDABLE, NON-TRANSFERABLE, and can be applied only to the current term’s class for which you have signed up. This applies if you get cast in a show, get a new job, or other situation, or have other changes to your schedule. So please be sure about your schedule before you register.

shows.title: The Incubator: Freak Trap + Dance Club Remix
shows.excerpt: Looking for the best live improv comedy in Los Angeles? The Incubator at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is a must-see monthly show featuring the next generation of performers alongside some of UCB’s most exciting veteran teams—all on one stage.…
shows.description: Looking for the best live improv comedy in Los Angeles? The Incubator at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is a must-see monthly show featuring the next generation of performers alongside some of UCB’s most exciting veteran teams—all on one stage. This unique double-bill improv show brings together two distinct voices in long-form improv: a rising Lloyd team and a graduated Harold team. This cycle, catch Dance Club Remix as they workshop an entirely new show over a 12-week run. It’s a rare opportunity to see top-tier improvisers experiment, refine, and build something brand new in real time. The Incubator delivers an unforgettable night of live comedy, featuring both emerging talent and established UCB performers. —— Featuring: Freak Trap & Dance Club Remix — Dance Club Remix Jonathan Braylock, David Danipour, James Jelin, D.J. Mausner, Artoun Nazareth, Allyson Phillips, Alexis Rhiannon, Ruha Taslimi Complete List of Lloyd Teams: Freak Trap Hanna Barlow, Prerika Chawla, Nicolette DeMarco, Jon Durnell, Charlie Fay, Nate Lawler, Talia Lefkowitz, Yaki Margulies Jinx Abby Blanchard, Sam Bodenstein, Catt Crawford, Andrew Farmer, Celia Gurney, Balint Hancz, Dorshae Middleton, Jasmine Wattar PTO Alfred Aquino II, Koschka Bahr, Justin Carty, Olivia Connolly, Sean Coyle, Molly Doan, Joe Kady, Justin Page — All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre 5919 Franklin Avenue, Los Angeles, CA

shows.title: The Armando Diaz Experience
shows.excerpt: It's the best comedy show in the city. Created in 1995 by iO alum Armando Diaz, Armando is a historic improvisational form where actors improvise a series of interconnected scenes based on the true stories told from a new guest monologist. Featuri...
shows.description: It's the best comedy show in the city. Created in 1995 by iO alum Armando Diaz, Armando is a historic improvisational form where actors improvise a series of interconnected scenes based on the true stories told from a new guest monologist. Featuring new players, surprise celebrity guests, and more each week, come watch the longest running comedy show in Chicago at its home: iO Theater! Still don't know what an Armando is? Learn more here . Doors Open: 6:30pm Show Begins: 7:00 PM Follow us on social media for monologist announcements @armando_show_io

shows.title: Magic Mondays
shows.excerpt: Experience an unforgettable night of wonder at Magic Mondays!! Starring award-winning magician John Sturk, this monthly showcase features Chicago's top conjurors performing mind-blowing illusions and spellbinding tricks. Join us for an evening of ...
shows.description: Experience an unforgettable night of wonder at Magic Mondays!! Starring award-winning magician John Sturk, this monthly showcase features Chicago's top conjurors performing mind-blowing illusions and spellbinding tricks. Join us for an evening of magic, mystery, and mesmerizing entertainment—perfect for magic lovers and those looking for a night out with a twist! Don't miss your chance to witness the impossible. John Sturk is an award-winning comedy magician from Chicago. He has been seen on ABC, NBC, WGN, Fox, and The Travel Channel. He’s also graced the stages of The Second City, iO Chicago, The Annoyance Theater, Malarkey Theater, and countless living rooms and backyards throughout the midwest. In 2023, he served as National President of The Society of American Magicians, the oldest magic association in the world. In addition to magic, John is also one of Chicago’s most accomplished music directors, having been seen behind the keyboards of Chicago’s comedy institutions. He also is an official artist for Hammond Organs USA.

shows.title: Ya'll Mic
shows.excerpt: Looking for a Stand-up Comedy Open Mic that’s a supportive room and always a good time? Look no further than the Ya'll Mic. Whether you’re a seasoned comic, an improvisor who’s always wanted to try standup, or you just decided that today’s
shows.description: Looking for a Stand-up Comedy Open Mic that’s a supportive room and always a good time? Look no further than the Ya'll Mic. Whether you’re a seasoned comic, an improvisor who’s always wanted to try standup, or you just decided that today’s the day for your first open mic (kudos) – The Ya'll Mic is a great venue to workshop your bits. The show is every Tuesday from 5:30pm – 7:30pm. Signup is online and the signup sheet is posted on Facebook & IG on Mondays. The list is emailed out a few hours before the show. Comics get 4 minutes of stage time (and a lifetime of memories.) While all are welcome, the room prioritizes BIPOC, LGBTQ+, and Femme comics. Come laugh with us!

shows.description: All Out! is UCB’s newest LGBTQ+forward stand-up open mic for queer-identifying comics and allies! All Out! is UCB’s brand new LGBTQ+ focussed monthly stand-up open mic here to cultivate a safe, supportive space for queer-identifying comics (and allies!) to take risks, build community and have fun! Come through every 3rd Tuesday to see some of L.A.’s funniest comics-on-the-rise as they try out new material, fine-tune their tight five and let those pride flags fly. Comic sign-ups are in person on the day of lottery style, so arrive 5-10 minutes early to throw your name in the bucket for a 5 minute set (10 slots total). We encourage everyone to stay for the entire show to celebrate and support each other, so as an added incentive one name will be drawn (from all comics remaining by show’s end) to get a juicy 10 minute set in next month’s show! Hosted by Koschka Bahr — Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Annex 1925 N Bronson Ave Los Angeles, CA 90068
shows.cast: Koschka Bahr

shows.title: Experimental Mic
shows.excerpt: An open mic where comedians can push boundaries, try bold new ideas, and embrace the unpredictable. The comedy laboratory where anything can happen! Every Tuesday at the UCB Annex, this isn’t your average open mic. It’s a playground for comedians…
shows.description: An open mic where comedians can push boundaries, try bold new ideas, and embrace the unpredictable. The comedy laboratory where anything can happen! Every Tuesday at the UCB Annex, this isn’t your average open mic. It’s a playground for comedians to push boundaries, try bold new ideas, and embrace the unpredictable. From themed sets and tag-team comedy to audience challenges and heckle-friendly rounds, it brings a fresh lineup of inventive formats designed to keep performers and audiences on their toes. Whether you’re a seasoned comic testing new material or a first-timer stepping into the spotlight, Experimental Mic is the perfect space to get weird, wild, and wonderfully hilarious. Come see comedians experiment, fail gloriously, and maybe create something brilliant. It’s raw, unfiltered, and absolutely hilarious. You don’t want to miss it. Each comic gets 5 minutes. 15 performance spots available. Come put your name in the bucket at 7pm to see if you’re chosen. Hosted by Deric Brown — This show is free! Just walk in. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Annex 1925 N Bronson Avenue, Los Angeles, CA
shows.cast: Deric Brown

shows.title: Show & Tell for Grown-Ups
shows.venue: iO Theater - Second Floor: The Weed Cabaret
venues: iO Theater - Second Floor: The Weed Cabaret
shows.excerpt: Give a nerd a microphone. Set a timer. Learn something cool! Show & Tell for Grown-Ups invites enthusiasts and experts to sign up for their slot to tell us why something is cool. We host the show live onstage and have Q&A with the audience! After...
shows.description: Give a nerd a microphone. Set a timer. Learn something cool! Show & Tell for Grown-Ups invites enthusiasts and experts to sign up for their slot to tell us why something is cool. We host the show live onstage and have Q&A with the audience! After two years of meeting cool nerds all over Chicago, we're here at iO for our Monthly Showcase of Chicago's Coolest Nerds every 3rd Wednesday of the month! We're an introvert friendly show! No one is forced to participate, but if you're interested, we do have audience participation parts. The topics and presenters are different every show. What stays constant is that it's a night of having fun, learning something, and making friends. We can't wait for you to join us! Check us out on Instagram @tellmewhyitscool_show for topic previews, show recaps, and more.

shows.title: The FREE WEDNESDAY SHOW feat Dumb John and Birdlady
shows.excerpt: ***This is a free show, but it is highly recommended to reserve your ticket here to guarantee entry.***** Regarded as one of Chicago's funniest and most promising improv groups of the last decade, Dumb John is proud to take the iO Stage with Bird...
shows.description: ***This is a free show, but it is highly recommended to reserve your ticket here to guarantee entry.***** Regarded as one of Chicago's funniest and most promising improv groups of the last decade, Dumb John is proud to take the iO Stage with Birdlady in a new weekly long form improv show. Both teams apply their high energy strain of improvisation to a bizarre cultural harvest of small town Americana influence and ephemera, using a single audience suggestion to inspire a piece of unhinged long form improv that propels diesel-soaked characters through fever dream karaoke scenes and down neon aisles of roadside antique marts; exploring the depravity and brilliance found at the heart of every moment. Take flight with two back to back original iO ensembles, Birdlady and Dumb John! Every Wednesday night at 7:30 (FREE), watch as they migrate toward their ultimate destination: hilarious long-form improvisation! It’ll be a HOOT! They’re so funny this show should be Ill-EAGLE! People can’t stop RAVEN about this show! DOORS: 7:00pm SHOW: 7:30pm Birdlady is: Ali Khan Alonso Ramirez Daryn Robinson Devin Henderson Erin Washington Justin Parlette Lauren Frost Ryan Nolan Dumb John is: Mike Geraghty Steve Plock Linda Orr Traycie Mcbee Follow our teams on Instagram at @birdlady.io & @dumbjohn

shows.title: Danger Room
shows.excerpt: Inspired by the iconic training simulator from the X-Men universe, Danger Room is a fast-paced, high-energy improv show where students and seasoned pros are thrown into unpredictable, hilarious challenges created by comedy veterans Bob Dassie and ...
shows.description: Inspired by the iconic training simulator from the X-Men universe, Danger Room is a fast-paced, high-energy improv show where students and seasoned pros are thrown into unpredictable, hilarious challenges created by comedy veterans Bob Dassie and Craig Cackowski. The stakes are imaginary. The laughs are real. Welcome to the Danger Room.

shows.title: Green Room - An Improv Jam
shows.excerpt: A free community networking event designed to give local improvisers from all over the city a weekly opportunity to perform. We provide the stage, you provide the fun! Bring your own team (BYOT) and sign up for a set! Don't have a team? No probl...
shows.description: A free community networking event designed to give local improvisers from all over the city a weekly opportunity to perform. We provide the stage, you provide the fun! Bring your own team (BYOT) and sign up for a set! Don't have a team? No problem, single players are welcome and will form their own group--a great chance to meet new people and expand your improv comedy network. Signups: 8:30PM Show: 9PM

shows.title: The Orbit
shows.excerpt: The Orbit is Chicago’s only improv show performed in the round. This 45-minute avant-garde experience takes the audience on a full-circle journey, showcasing a bold new form designed for 360-degree play. Rooted in classic iO techniques yet pushing...
shows.description: The Orbit is Chicago’s only improv show performed in the round. This 45-minute avant-garde experience takes the audience on a full-circle journey, showcasing a bold new form designed for 360-degree play. Rooted in classic iO techniques yet pushing toward the future, The Orbit offers a fresh perspective—inviting audiences to see improv from entirely new angles." Cast: Zach Reynolds Annie Scott Ella Nagle Louie Cordon Jessica Benson Mike Jimerson Erin Washington Directed by: Liz Allen Stage Managed by: Dan Wilcop

shows.description: Get a chance to perform with a rotating cast of your favorite UCB teachers, or just sit back and enjoy the lesson. Night School is in session, but we swear it’ll be fun this time. Come watch a rotating cast of UCB teachers perform improv. If you’re feeling like you want extra credit, drop your name in the bucket for a chance to perform with teachers during the show! Anyone who is a current or former UCB student (improv, sketch, character, etc. all welcome!) is welcome to drop your name in the bucket. Hosts: Caroline Cotter, Marshall Givens, Sylvie Wang — This show is Free! Everybody get in here. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Annex 1925 N Bronson Ave Los Angeles, CA 90068

shows.title: Jury Duty
shows.excerpt: You've been summoned...to laugh. Jury Duty is a fully improvised courtroom comedy where the only thing on trial is sanity itself. Each night, the cast creates a brand new legal disaster based on audience suggestion, questionable logic, and
shows.description: You've been summoned...to laugh. Jury Duty is a fully improvised courtroom comedy where the only thing on trial is sanity itself. Each night, the cast creates a brand new legal disaster based on audience suggestion, questionable logic, and total chaos. Watch as the foreperson loses their mind, evidence makes things worse, and deliberations go off the rails. No script, no rules, no justice. Just comedy The trial is fake, the laughs are real

shows.excerpt: Join iO house team Fizz for Chicago's most carbonated improv show. Wednesdays at 10 p.m., Fizz cracks open a high-octane, full-sugar set of one-night-only scenes, characters and stories with a special guest opener. Plus: Each week one resident Fi...
shows.description: Join iO house team Fizz for Chicago's most carbonated improv show. Wednesdays at 10 p.m., Fizz cracks open a high-octane, full-sugar set of one-night-only scenes, characters and stories with a special guest opener. Plus: Each week one resident Fizzicist must complete their assigned task or be sentenced to a sip of the foul-flavored FIZZ CUP. Will they Fizz or Flop? Come find out! Cast: Bailey Salicos Hadley Singer Janelle Soulliere Kara Kinsey Lily Kerr-Jung Marino Korellis Max Reichek Traer Schon Veronica Rooney

shows.title: NUNS/SLUTS/CUNTS – A World Without Men
shows.excerpt: This is an Improv Show without men, the way it was intended and we can't wait to hear your tiny little sad dicks giggling in the audience. STOP!!!! Look at this quote, it's infuriating! "Men apply for a job…
shows.description: This is an Improv Show without men, the way it was intended and we can’t wait to hear your tiny little sad dicks giggling in the audience. STOP!!!! Look at this quote, it’s infuriating! “Men apply for a job when they meet only 60% of the qualifications, but women apply only if they meet 100% of them.” -From the Harvard Business Review The revolution starts now. Watch as a rotating cast of NYC’s best improvisers destroy the stage with their wit, wisdom and undeniable talent. Help us make this show so big, we HAVE to make t-shirts on Cafe-press. Featuring: Shannon O’Neill and more TBA! —- In-person tickets are $15 plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre: 242 East 14th Street, New York, NY 10003

shows.title: Mystery Movie Club
shows.excerpt: Mystery Movie Club presents free screenings of curated, exciting movies from the personal collections of local movie lovers! But here's the catch - the title of the film will not be announced until you are in the room. Follow the breadcrumbs, tr...
shows.description: Mystery Movie Club presents free screenings of curated, exciting movies from the personal collections of local movie lovers! But here's the catch - the title of the film will not be announced until you are in the room. Follow the breadcrumbs, trust your gut, expand your horizons! Come enjoy the weaving narratives, the wide array of emotions, and the joy of community. Stay afterwards for a quick, low stakes, interactive chat about the film. Drinks, food, and snacks available at the bar. There is nothing like watching a movie on the big screen! That's the power of cinema, baby!

shows.title: Thursday Night Improv Hosted by Creamboy
shows.excerpt: If you’re looking for a date night, girls’ night out, or a mandatory work outing (that your staff will actually like) — Look no further! Fast, funny, and frothy, Thursday Night Improv is entirely improvised and features a different guest opener f...
shows.description: If you’re looking for a date night, girls’ night out, or a mandatory work outing (that your staff will actually like) — Look no further! Fast, funny, and frothy, Thursday Night Improv is entirely improvised and features a different guest opener for veteran iO house team Creamboy every week. Every show is completely different, so you can keep coming back for more! Will you be the lucky audience member to receive the coveted title of Cream of the Week? Creamboy is made up of seasoned Chicago improvisers who play and teach all over the city (and country! And WORLD?!) which means this show is perfect for improv nerds, millennials who love Tina Fey, and even your cousin visiting from Kansas. Comedy so good you'll lick your lips and pat your belly. Mmmm so creamy! Get a taste of Creamboy on Instagram @ creamboy.io

shows.title: Improv: The Play
shows.excerpt: With the help of some of Chicago’s best actors, Improv: The Play is a new, hybrid version of long form improv happening only at the iO Theater. Each night, professional actors prepare a scene from a play. Their scene partners, however, are never ...
shows.description: With the help of some of Chicago’s best actors, Improv: The Play is a new, hybrid version of long form improv happening only at the iO Theater. Each night, professional actors prepare a scene from a play. Their scene partners, however, are never given a script, and must improvise their way through the scene. The result is a totally original, never before seen piece of theater. It’s drama, it’s comedy, it’s everything that’s magical about theater and improvisation. Come watch this brand-new show at iO and see something you won’t see anywhere else in the city. Featuring: Alex Beard Heather Mari Elijah Sloan Lexi Putter Lucas Pollitzer Marino Korellis Montrez Hawkins Nikk Tetreault Ryan Bowman Shawna Seals Directed by: James Dugan Produced by: Cory Hardin

shows.title: Josephs Tonight
shows.excerpt: Josephs Tonight is an improvised late-night talk show where the catch is that there are two hosts. Joe is a grumpy elder millennial comedian who “really needs this”. Joey is a Gen Z free spirit who just wants to have a good time. Audiences will le...
shows.description: Josephs Tonight is an improvised late-night talk show where the catch is that there are two hosts. Joe is a grumpy elder millennial comedian who “really needs this”. Joey is a Gen Z free spirit who just wants to have a good time. Audiences will leave saying, "Oh, this is why there’s normally just the one host." Come for the variety, stay for the drama. Cast: Joey Costello as Joey the Co-Host Joe Yoon as Joe the Co-Host Sean Michaels as Sean the Stage Manager Stay tuned for special guest announcements! Directed by Holly Kuldell

shows.title: Draft Night
shows.excerpt: Teams are drafted the first week, then perform for the rest of the month. Week 1: 3 Coaches host the show and draw their teams RANDOMLY from the chalice of audience submitted names. The newly drafted teams perform short scrimmage sets! Weeks 2-4:...
shows.description: Teams are drafted the first week, then perform for the rest of the month. Week 1: 3 Coaches host the show and draw their teams RANDOMLY from the chalice of audience submitted names. The newly drafted teams perform short scrimmage sets! Weeks 2-4: Teams perform weekly at Draft Night and get notes from their coach. Wash, Rinse, Repeat! *This is not a competition show* Rules: -You must be at Draft Night to enter the drawing -You must have completed at least two WGIS classes (not counting drop-ins) -People selected will pay $15 for their month of coach notes. Scholarships available upon request to shows@wgimprovschool.com All this same info and a bit more is listed here: https://wgimprovschool.com/draftnight

shows.description: Sketch Playlist is a weekly sketch show that will feature all-new sketches every single week… the ultimate sketch playlist. Come see these writers and performers at the legendary iO Theater on Thursdays at 9:30pm before Saturday Night Live casts them. To learn more and stay up to date, follow us on Instagram @sketchplaylist and @fulproof_productions . IDIOT WAGON : Ashlyn Quintus, Chloe Grogean, Daniel Frasco, Erin Ryan, Franny Rodriguez, Izzy Thomases, Keiter Liriano, Lexi Putter, Max Reichek, Mitch Shepperd, Tom Phelan, and Ty Sato (directed by Joseph Belangia and assistant directed by Max Reichek) . MIST CONNECTIONS : Andy Fialko, Carlos Alvidrez, Fran Bixby, Harper Leander, Holly Kuldell, James Alcock, Jonah Gordon, Jonas Benz, Madeline Farr, Marck Kiselevach, Markley Bortz, and Tara Heilwagen (co-directed by JJ Rodriguez & Morgan O’Dell and assistant directed by Jonah Gordon) . FREE FROLIC : Angelique Boyd, Brian DeHeer, Cannon Cook, Carson Shofner, Hope Valls, Joseph Belangia, Matt Spanier, Matthew Stiuso, Maya Arroyo, Meg Flood, Sasha Flores, and Syd Hanna (directed by Keiter Liriano) . PROPER GANDER : Brody Gibas, Caroline Storey, Cassi Seifert, Emilio Barajas, Emma Knott, Ethan Evans, Gregory Wagner, Hayley O’Toole, Nudia Hernandez, Rachel Wade, Taylor Meredith, and Willem Jewell (directed by Ronee Goldman) . RECESS : Ace Quirk, Aidhan Henri, Aodhan Bard, Daniel Seward, Hugo Hentoff, Liam Ryan, Lindsey Schultz, Megan Mikaelian, Morgan Leopold, Olivia Retkittke, Rocco Meo, and Shekinah Kurapaty (directed by Molly Olson) .

shows.title: Three Actors Living in a Cave
shows.excerpt: Come check out one of Chicago's best longform improv teams, Three Actors Living in a Cave (Ollie Hobson, Mike Brunlieb, and Kyle Bethea) on Thursdays at 9:30pm, 8/20 - 10/8! Joined each week by Lerin (Lauren Frost and Erin Washington) and a
shows.description: Come check out one of Chicago's best longform improv teams, Three Actors Living in a Cave (Ollie Hobson, Mike Brunlieb, and Kyle Bethea) on Thursdays at 9:30pm, 8/20 - 10/8! Joined each week by Lerin (Lauren Frost and Erin Washington) and a rotating guest team! About Three Actors Once upon a time three poor cooks rode upon a huge wooden boat to sail around the world, but it did crash into a coral reef and all 800 aboard were drowned or stung to death except for the three poor cooks. They clung to a floating wardrobe trunk and washed upon the shore of a strange island. There they wandered for seven days and were bitten again and again by poisonous snakes. On the eighth day, tortured by painful fevers, they found refuge in a damp cave where they ate moss and acted out warped little scenarios for one another until they passed away. Their corpses were well preserved by the cool wet cave air and you can visit the island and look at their dead bodies, faces frozen in jest to this very day. Doors Open 9:00 PM Show 9:30 PM - 10:45 PM Cost $6.49 ($5 Ticket + $1.49 Fees)

shows.title: Blueprint
shows.excerpt: Blueprint is the kind of improv that keeps audiences AND players on their toes. Each week, a different cast member designs a bold new improv format that their fellow performers will learn about at the same time as the crowd. Expect the unexpected ...
shows.description: Blueprint is the kind of improv that keeps audiences AND players on their toes. Each week, a different cast member designs a bold new improv format that their fellow performers will learn about at the same time as the crowd. Expect the unexpected as we build something completely original, live, right before your eyes. Past forms have included: Improvised Severance - Guided by two internal "staff members," three performers are physically out of the room, while three others perform as their innies, and every 5 minutes, the two swapped. Can they make sense of their outies? and versa? Understudies - In a longform narrative, each player on stage knows that they will eventually understudy another player in the show. The lights change and they have to embody a different player, and each time the lights change, they can select another player to embody. Overachiever - Three 2-person monoscenes happen on stage, utilizing the same physical space, but taking place in categorically different spaces. They must navigate space atop of and around one another while keeping connection to their partner. Improvised Heist - Ocean's Eleven, eat your heart out! Our players hit the major plot points of a heist and improvise their way through - initial idea, building the team, planning the heist, executing, and the aftermath Blueprint is joined each week by a lab cast opening for the show with their own unique, original form. Directed by James Dugan Cast: James Dugan Avery Ford Molly Jones Allen Lucas Janelle Soulliere Ryan Bowman

The legendary improv group The Stepfathers has survived 2 decades performing in NYC. shows.title: TGIF with Duchovny & Olestra
shows.excerpt: Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But we do know it's improv every Friday @ 7pm! Buy Tickets
shows.description: DOORS: 6:30 PM SHOW: 7:00 PM Eris Deep Space (downstairs) "It's Friday night and the mood is right. Gonna have some fun, show you how it's done, TGIF". BCC is bringing back ABC's TGIF programming block Fridays at 7pm ET / 6 pm CT with Duchovny and Olestra. Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But it will be funny and it will be on Friday and we will thank god for both. Duchovny is a group of elite New York maniacs comprised of veteran improvisers, actors, and comedians who you've probably seen in TV, movies, and even the most coveted work of all, digital-only commercials that air before Youtube videos. Duchovny is fast paced, high energy and filled to the brim with chaos. Olestra is a squad of dangerous Chicago criminals who make out and beat the hell out of each other on stage here in New York. They evaded arrest by racking up credits in the entertainment industry; The Tonight Show, The Second City, UCB Betty, The Improvised Shakespeare Company, to name a few. Duchovny is: Amanda Breen @amanda_breen James Dwyer @jamesbdwyer Lou Gonzalez @angrylou Patrick Keene @pad00d2.0 Yoni Lotan @yonilotan Tami Sagher @tamisagher Akmal Tajihan @akmaltajihan Sarah Grace Welbourn @sgwelbs Duchovny @duchovnyimprov Olestra is: Dan Bazaldua @dannbazz Devin Bockrath @durvinbuttrath Nick Mestad @nick_mestad Micah Sterenberg @micah_humble_blessed Andy Junk @therealandyjunk Fine Print: Must be 21+ to attend. No outside alcohol is allowed in the space. There are 35 seats - first come, first serve - and then standing room up to capacity. All ticket sales are final - no refunds. If you must miss your show, email us at info@brooklyncc.com with at least 24 hours notice and we can transfer your tickets to any upcoming show at the BCC. Answers to most other questions can be found here . If show is sold out, limited tickets will be available at the door. Lineup subject to change. Buy tickets $5 OFF TIX BEFORE DAY OF SHOW

shows.title: ComedySportz
shows.excerpt: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whet...
shows.description: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whether you're bringing your family, your co-workers, or a date - you are welcome, and you will laugh. ComedySportz is two teams of all-star improv comedians going head to head in comedy games, scenes and songs. YOU will vote on which team you liked the best and the teams will score points based on your applause. One of our world-famous referees will guide you through the whole show and may even ask for your help on stage. Every show ends in our incredible 6 THINGS game that is known throughout the world as 'the hardest game in all of improv'. It's fast. It's hilarious. It's appropriate for all ages. It's ComedySportz.

shows.title: Devil's Daughter
shows.excerpt: The hottest show in town, Devil’s Daughter, features a cast of seasoned comedians who have performed together in Chicago and around the country for over a decade. This award-winning team has their own unique spin on a classic improv form, The Har...
shows.description: The hottest show in town, Devil’s Daughter , features a cast of seasoned comedians who have performed together in Chicago and around the country for over a decade. This award-winning team has their own unique spin on a classic improv form, The Harold , and is known for their solo scenes, artistic style, and dastardly sense of humor. Find them Friday nights performing alongside their favorite opening team - Hellmash ! Duration: 1.5 hrs Devil's Daughter Cast: Lisa Burton Gretchen Eng Max Ganet Adonis Holmes Garrett Kelly TJ King Harrison Lott Scott Piebenga Brad Pike May Regan Annie Sullivan Mary Tilden Follow us on social media: Instagram: @devilsdaughterimprov Facebook: DevilsDaughterImprov Twitter: @devilsdaugh

shows.title: Improvised Shakespeare Chicago
shows.venue: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
venues: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
shows.excerpt: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William ...
shows.description: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William Shakespeare. Inspired by one audience suggestion (a title for a play that has yet to be written) the dazzling players create a brand-new Shakespearean masterpiece right before your eyes. Nothing has been planned out, rehearsed, or written. The dialogue is said for the first time, the characters are created as you watch, and if ever you're wondering where the story is going...so are they! You've never seen the Bard like this before! “There’s really nothing quite like it in the city of Chicago. Smart, sophisticated, downright hilarious.” -TimeOut Chicago “…the show channels Monty Python as often as the Bard, and frequently with sly-witted results.” -The Chicago Tribune “Consistently Hilarious” -The Chicago Reader “Staggeringly Brilliant” -TimeOut Chicago “Consistently funny…'Tis v'ry, v'ry good.” -The Chicago Tribune “Indisputably great improv, fueled by smart plot development, stage chemistry and recognizable characters.” -Centerstage Chicago “In short, outstanding.” -TimeOut Chicago Find out more at improvisedshakespeare.com _________________________ Additional option to include Improvised Shakespeare's featured cocktail, Hamlet , with your ticket. It includes Nolets Dry Gin, St-Germaine, Campari, orange juice, and garnished with an orange wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre: 242 East 14th Street, New York, NY 10003

shows.title: FRIDAY FIX! Winslow & Queen George
shows.excerpt: UCB's weekly improv double header! A night of improv comedy featuring two of LA's top teams performing back-to-back. Get your FIX every FRIDAY. Featuring: Winslow understands our loved ones - they plague our lives with never-ending texts, chain emails, and…
shows.description: UCB’s weekly improv double header! A night of improv comedy featuring two of LA’s top teams performing back-to-back. Get your FIX every FRIDAY. Featuring: Winslow understands our loved ones – they plague our lives with never-ending texts, chain emails, and accidental butt dials. We can’t stop this daily nightmare, but we can do improv based on it! You give us your weird family messages, and we’ll spin it into a cozy improv sweater of absolute chaos. “One of UCBTLA’s most fun house teams.” – Splitsider Cast: Mano Agapion, Echo Kellum, Justin Michael, Gilli Nissim, Mary Sasson & Queen George performs a fast-paced improv show based on just a one-word suggestion from the audience. Queen George members acting/writing credits include, Grand Crew, Brooklyn Nine-Nine, Veep, Modern Family, Good Trouble, Shameless, Perfect Harmony, and many more! Cast: Carl Tart, Hillary Anne Matthews, Gregory Wallace, Payam Banifaz, Dhruv Uday Singh, Julia Meltzer, Ed Roe, Greg Gallant, Jen D’Angelo — Tickets are $15 in advance and $20 on the day of the show. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. shows.title: The Friday Night Sh*w
shows.description: Obnoxious strangers, overbearing bosses and unrequited high school crushes are about to get a piece of your mind… The Friday Night Sh*w invites audience members to offer their repressed rants, cursing-outs and sultry confessions to fuel a fast-paced brawl of hilarity, performed by a fistful of of NYC’s best improvisers and Magnet faculty. Before the show, audience members may anonymously submit written confessions which the improvisers will use onstage. Now, doesn't it feel good to get that off your chest? Comprised of some of Chicago’s most seasoned improvisers that firmly believe that fun happens when you let your inner goose loose. So if you’re ready for a gaggle of giggles, join us for one of our upcoming shows! Honk! is for adults so use discretion when considering bringing the goslings.

shows.title: Improvised Survivor: Abridged
shows.excerpt: Improvised Survivor brings Chicago’s most talented improvisers as they fight for the title of Sole Improvised Survivor. In this high-paced show, these castaways will compete for immunities granted by the audience and then vote each other out until...
shows.description: Improvised Survivor brings Chicago’s most talented improvisers as they fight for the title of Sole Improvised Survivor. In this high-paced show, these castaways will compete for immunities granted by the audience and then vote each other out until one remains. The audience will also potentially get an opportunity to be a part of the drama by obtaining the audience idol. Each show will have a new cast, a new winner, and a new theme. Who will be the next winner of Improvised Survivor? Only you can help decide. April 18th: Improvised SurvHIGHvor: All-Stars The best of Improvised Survivor compete against the best of Improvised Survivor: Abridged, but this time … everyone is HIGH! May 15th: Improvised Survivor: Study Hall The next generation of improvisers compete for the title of Sole Improvised Survivor. June 26th: Improvised Survivor: Drag Race Edition Improvisers have to lip-sync for their lives for the title of Sole Improvised Survivor.

shows.title: Collage
shows.description: Part art project, part improv performance, Collage is a unique, audience-powered experience that will never happen the same way twice. Before the show, audience members will help create a collaborative collage in the lobby using provided materials. This one-of-a-kind artwork will then inspire the evening's comedy. Three dynamic improv duos will each perform their own set, drawing from the images, words, and themes created by the audience. Then, to close the night, all six performers will come together for a fast-paced montage that blends the ideas and discoveries from the entire show. Come join us for the fun. Whether you're bringing your family, your co-workers, or a date - you are welcome, and you will laugh. ComedySportz is two teams of all-star improv comedians going head to head in comedy games, scenes and songs. YOU will vote on which team you liked the best and the teams will score points based on your applause. One of our world-famous referees will guide you through the whole show and may even ask for your help on stage. Every show ends in our incredible 6 THINGS game that is known throughout the world as 'the hardest game in all of improv'. It's fast. It's hilarious. It's appropriate for all ages. It's ComedySportz.

shows.title: Improvised Jane Austen
shows.excerpt: "...countless laughs...whimsical homage to the illustrious author." -- Chicago Reader Improvised Jane Austen continues its entirely improvised tales of love and laughter this summer. Audiences will enjoy an evening with wit and heart in equal me...
shows.description: "...countless laughs...whimsical homage to the illustrious author." -- Chicago Reader Improvised Jane Austen continues its entirely improvised tales of love and laughter this summer. Audiences will enjoy an evening with wit and heart in equal measure with an improvised rom-com for everyone, whether you love Austen or just like to laugh! Improvised Jane Austen currently performs Saturday nights at 6:00 pm at iO Theater and tickets are $20. "...[They] took it, owned it and created some really funny and touching moments....an evening of silliness and indulgence....make running amok look like delicious fun." -- PerformInk Chicago Join Improvised Jane Austen for the signature romantic comedy and social satire of the beloved author, improvised by Chicago's top comedic talent. Celebrate all things love, friendship, and Austen this Summer. “...Improvised Jane Austen is one of the strongest improv troupes in the city. They have the ability to use Austen’s 19th century wit and sarcasm and make it recognizable for a 21st-century audience." --Scapi Magazine Improvised Jane Austen is a comedic ensemble that creates unscripted performances using Jane Austen's tropes, themes, and language to create a satirical romantic comedy set in Regency-era England. Playing in Austen’s world, Improvised Jane Austen’s stories delight 21st century audiences with a modern sense and sensibility. The current cast of 20+ performers rotate weekly, creating a new ensemble for every show. Come for the humor, stay for the heart! Throughout the show’s run, Improvised Jane Austen has been Chicago Reader Recommended , named a PerformInk Critics’ Pick , voted Best sketch/improv troupe 2019 in the Reader’s Best of Chicago , and was featured on WTTW playlist , in Time Out , the Chicago Tribune and on a their list of what to do on Valentine’s Day , on WGN’s Daytime Chicago in 2024 and 2026 and on CBS News Chicago . Learn more: https://improvisedjaneausten.com/

shows.title: The Armando Diaz Experience
shows.description: The legendary show is reborn! Created in 1995 at the iO Theater in Chicago, The Armando Diaz Experience IS the longest running improv show EVER. A guest monologist takes a suggestion from the audience and shares true stories from their life. These stories are then brought to life by a rotating cast of improv all-stars, which take audiences on a high minded, exhilarating comedic joy ride that will leave mouths tired of smiling. And occasionally, just occasionally, the man with his name on the show will drop by for some fun. "The “Armando,” performed every Saturday, always begins with a monologue, and at a recent show it was about a connection made on the internet that led a decade later to a real-life relationship. The team of improvisers built patient scenes off this moving story, which made daring shifts in perspective, from the real world to secret worlds, inside and outside of bodies. There was a playfulness to the creativity, bold choices that verged on reckless that wouldn’t make the transition to a script." NYTimes Magnet Theater 254 West 29th St. New York NY 10001 Tickets The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Kate Jordan Sat Aug 22nd, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Rob Penty Sat Jul 18th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Phil Sugar Sat Jul 25th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Tessa Flannery Sat Aug 1st, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Carson Olshanksky Sat Aug 8th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Suerynn Lee Sat Aug 15th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Monologist TBA Sat Aug 29th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket Performers Justin Anderson Rick Andrews Christopher Bell Hannah Chase Kevin Cragg Shacottha Fields Elana Fishbein Megan Gray Eleanor Lewis Christine Magee Dennis Pacheco Xavier Padin Jamie R

shows.title: Improvised Shakespeare Chicago
