venues: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
shows.excerpt: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William ...
shows.description: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William Shakespeare. Inspired by one audience suggestion (a title for a play that has yet to be written) the dazzling players create a brand-new Shakespearean masterpiece right before your eyes. Nothing has been planned out, rehearsed, or written. The dialogue is said for the first time, the characters are created as you watch, and if ever you're wondering where the story is going...so are they! You've never seen the Bard like this before! “There’s really nothing quite like it in the city of Chicago. Smart, sophisticated, downright hilarious.” -TimeOut Chicago “…the show channels Monty Python as often as the Bard, and frequently with sly-witted results.” -The Chicago Tribune “Consistently Hilarious” -The Chicago Reader “Staggeringly Brilliant” -TimeOut Chicago “Consistently funny…'Tis v'ry, v'ry good.” -The Chicago Tribune “Indisputably great improv, fueled by smart plot development, stage chemistry and recognizable characters.” -Centerstage Chicago “In short, outstanding.” -TimeOut Chicago Find out more at improvisedshakespeare.com _________________________ Additional option to include Improvised Shakespeare's featured cocktail, Hamlet , with your ticket. It includes Nolets Dry Gin, St-Germaine, Campari, orange juice, and garnished with an orange wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

This show brings together two teams of our very best improvisers, each delivering a high energy, hilarious set in classic iO forms like the Living Room, Weirdass, Shotgun, and more. Between sets, the show drops into The Dream, a surreal, mind bending journey through one day based on an interview with an audience member. Fast, fearless, and funny, this is iO improvisation at its highest level.

shows.title: SAHD (Stay-At-Home Dad)
shows.excerpt: A brutally honest comedy about keeping tiny humans alive when you are dying inside. Created and performed by playwright, comedian, and viral creator Brandon Ogborn, SAHD (Stay-At-Home Dad) is a brutally honest one-man show about what happens when someone who…
shows.description: A brutally honest comedy about keeping tiny humans alive when you are dying inside. Created and performed by playwright, comedian, and viral creator Brandon Ogborn , SAHD (Stay-At-Home Dad) is a brutally honest one-man show about what happens when someone who grew up homeschooled in a religious cult tries to become a normal stay-at-home dad. From navigating the daily chaos of raising small children to processing his father’s thirteen-year obsession with creating a Rush Limbaugh board game, carbon monoxide poisoning, and cosmic fire truck visits, Ogborn weaves together stories that are equal parts ridiculous and truly heartbreaking. Through deeply personal storytelling, he discovers that the people who drive us crazy are often the same ones who somehow keep us sane. Created and performed by Brandon Ogborn Directed by Karole Foreman — All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. shows.title: ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre: 242 East 14th Street, New York, NY 10003

shows.title: ASSSSCAT LA
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by true stories from a surprise celebrity guest. ASSSSCAT has played to critical acclaim and sold-out audiences across the country. What Is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians taking the stage with a surprise celebrity guest. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our “monologist “ shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestions. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world. Previous celebrity guests include: Will Ferrell, Mark Hamill, Tina Fey, Charles Barkley, Don Cheadle, Elizabeth Banks, Aubrey Plaza, Kumail Nanjiani, Amy Poehler, Robin Williams and more. Why See ASSSSCAT? ASSSSCAT is one of the best improv comedy shows in Los Angeles. Each show is a one-of-a-kind live comedy experience. Whether you’re a longtime fan of UCB or searching for live comedy in LA for the first time, or looking for new exciting date ideas in LA, ASSSSCAT offers a chance to see the best comedians in LA at the top of their game, and don’t forget the surprise celebrity guest at every show! And don’t worry, if you can’t see the show live, we also offer a LIVESTREAM option for all performances! Critics and audiences agree: “Unbelievably funny.” – LA Times • “Best of LA: Best Improv.” – Los Angeles Magazine • “Best of LA: Best Improv Show.” – LA Weekly Readers Poll • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” – Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” – Vice Magazine • “Critics’ Pick” – Time Out Los Angeles About the Venue The Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is one of the most well-known comedy venues in Los Angeles

shows.description: The Miss Annoyance Pageant celebrates women from all walks of life. Our pageant is founded on the commitment to uphold standards of fairness and integrity. Communities thrive once an appearance-based ranking system is introduced. The Annoyance Theatre needs to crown the most beautiful, most intelligent, and most gorgeous girl. This beauty pageant is recognized by the United States National Pageantry Association as “a sham” with a “net-negative effect on society” that “poses certain national security concerns.” If you value beauty, knowledge, and subjective judgement- you will find it here at the 2026 Miss Annoyance Pageant.

shows.title: Spank: Trust Me, I’m from Essex
shows.excerpt: See a brand new sketch or solo show birthed right before your eyes that is auditioning for a run at the UCB theater. It's a show where we let sketch teams and solo performers try some shit out! Some will…
shows.description: See a brand new sketch or solo show birthed right before your eyes that is auditioning for a run at the UCB theater. It’s a show where we let sketch teams and solo performers try some shit out! Some will be good, some will be bad but it will all be weird and new and that’s what makes it fun! It’s experimental sketch at its finest! Come on, you know you need a spanking. This Monday, we have… Trust Me, I’m from Essex: You can take the girl out of Essex, but can you take Essex out of the girl? A new, hard-hitting yet hopeful solo musical about following your dreams – no matter how unlikely they may seem. When Lindsay Lucas-Bartlett was growing up in Southend-on-Sea, sharing a home with her abusive bipolar father and drug addict brother, her dreams of escaping the stereotypical Essex girl’s fate consisted of (a) marrying Prince William, and (b) running away to the magical city of Los Angeles. But Prince William started losing his hair and besides, what’s the point of swapping one dysfunctional family for another? Which leaves the other option… In this autobiographical solo musical, directed by Lindsay Perry , with witty, hummable live songs composed by E. Aaron Wilson , lyrics by Lucas-Bartlett; Trust Me, I’m from Essex confronts brutal social issues, such as bipolar disorder, domestic abuse, drug addiction, bullying, undiagnosed dyslexia and date rape, head-on, but in an unflinching, yet wryly humorous, style that will have audiences cheering Lindsay on, as she fights to find a better life and negotiate the curveballs that fate throws her way – innit? Written & performed by Lindsay Lucas-Bartlett Directed by Lindsay Perry Music by Aaron Wilson — All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. shows.title: Mike & Kellen Self-Destruct
shows.excerpt: We burnt it all down. Come hear how we plan to blow it back up. If you've ever wanted to hear the words, "so the Swifties were battling the Nazis," come to this show. As Kanye West said, "it's good…
shows.description: We burnt it all down. Come hear how we plan to blow it back up. If you’ve ever wanted to hear the words, “so the Swifties were battling the Nazis,” come to this show. As Kanye West said, “it’s good deal.” When Kanye shared Mike Glazer ‘s joke in 2025, Glazer thought his life was about to change. And it did, in the worst way imaginable… until the Swifties saved his life. Glazer wishes the following weren’t true, but he has a powerpoint full of receipts to prove it: he was a strip club sponsored roller hockey goalie, nearly became an opium kingpin, shared his phone number with the world in a stupid prank gone wrong, and somehow became the CIA on Instagram. Kellen Schneider , known for his role in AppleTV’s Platonic and featuring on the road for SNL ‘s Michael Longfellow, is equally as chaotic as Mike but slightly more socialized. Kellen brings a shotgun approach to comedy that partners well with Mike’s laser-focused snipes. Mike and Kellen both burnt it all down. Come hear how they plan to blow it back up. — Livestream tickets are $10. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one hour before the show. Link will remain accessible for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre 5919 Franklin Avenue, Los Angeles, CA

shows.description: LA’s funniest take on real life. Living Room Living Room is the premiere long-form improv show held at the World’s Greatest Improv School, where the city’s best comedians turn real stories into hilarious, totally unscripted scenes. Each week features a rotating cast of WGIS’s top performers—plus surprise guests from TV, film, and the national improv scene. Main Cast: Will Hines ( Broad City, Comedy Bang Bang, Brooklyn 99 ) Sarah Claspell ( Brooklyn 99, Jimmy Kimmel Live, Drunk History ) Jim Woods ( The Office, How I Met Your Mother, Reno 911 ) Beth Appel ( Sex Lives of College Girls, Never Have I Ever ) Dave Theune ( St. Denis Medical, Frasier ) Jamie Gaul ( General Hospital, Grey’s Anatomy, Medium ) Surprise guests every week. Past guests include: Colton Dunn ( Superstore, Key & Peele ) Zeke Nicholson ( Dropout TV, The Good Place, A.P. Bio ) Connor Ratliff ( Mean Girls, The George Lucas Talk Show ) + more!! Cast for Sunday May 3 Beth Appel Hazel Brady Russel Carter Sarah Claspell Rachel Clayton May Darmon Will Hines Mike McLendon Dave Theune Jim Woods

shows.description: Each week, the talented teams of iO come together to create characters, discover alternate realities, and play hilarious bits all inspired by one word from you, the audience! Using the Harold, an improvised story-telling format, iO's elite house teams will showcase the wonderful, strange, and thrilling art of improv, making you second-guess if what you're seeing is truly made up on-the-spot. Two teams will perform their individual sets and then end the show with The Dream, performing a near accurate depiction of an audience member's dreams! Featuring rotating performances from: Baby Grand BL!MP Morning Glory Chariot Mischief Feast The Wretched Fever Dream

shows.title: Deep Schwa
shows.excerpt: Chicago's longest-running Harold team returns to iO to bring their unique blend of chaos and creativity to iO's signature form The Harold melding games, songs, and scenes for singular, edge-of-your-seat improv comedy. Formed in 1996 Deep Schwa h...
shows.description: Chicago's longest-running Harold team returns to iO to bring their unique blend of chaos and creativity to iO's signature form The Harold melding games, songs, and scenes for singular, edge-of-your-seat improv comedy. Formed in 1996 Deep Schwa has over 50 members, has done over 1,000 shows, performed in theaters all over Chicago and beyond. Made up of a cast of Chicago's most seasoned and eclectic players and teachers it's a show perfect for the improv initiate and those just looking to chase away the Sunday scaries. Every Sunday, 29 years and counting. "Top-tier!" - AV Club "Legitimate." - Guy on Yelp "The most chaotic 'pro' team." - Redditor Cast: Jill Fenstermaker Liz Kirkwood Steve Nelson Eddie Piña Megan Redfearn Cassidy Russell Andy Stegmeyer Craig Uhlir Anthony LeBlanc IG: @deepschwa

shows.title: ASSSSCAT LA
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by true stories from a surprise celebrity guest. ASSSSCAT has played to critical acclaim and sold-out audiences across the country. What Is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians taking the stage with a surprise celebrity guest. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our “monologist “ shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestions. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world. Previous celebrity guests include: Will Ferrell, Mark Hamill, Tina Fey, Charles Barkley, Don Cheadle, Elizabeth Banks, Aubrey Plaza, Kumail Nanjiani, Amy Poehler, Robin Williams and more. Why See ASSSSCAT? ASSSSCAT is one of the best improv comedy shows in Los Angeles. Each show is a one-of-a-kind live comedy experience. Whether you’re a longtime fan of UCB or searching for live comedy in LA for the first time, or looking for new exciting date ideas in LA, ASSSSCAT offers a chance to see the best comedians in LA at the top of their game, and don’t forget the surprise celebrity guest at every show! And don’t worry, if you can’t see the show live, we also offer a LIVESTREAM option for all performances! Critics and audiences agree: “Unbelievably funny.” – LA Times • “Best of LA: Best Improv.” – Los Angeles Magazine • “Best of LA: Best Improv Show.” – LA Weekly Readers Poll • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” – Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” – Vice Magazine • “Critics’ Pick” – Time Out Los Angeles About the Venue The Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is one of the most well-known comedy venues in Los Angeles

shows.title: Gravid Water
shows.excerpt: Gravid Water is a theater/improv mash-up featuring the biggest names in comedy, theater, TV, and film. Gravid Water is a theatrical-comedy experiment where actors are given real scenes from real plays that they prepare as they would for a regular…
shows.description: Gravid Water is a theater/improv mash-up featuring the biggest names in comedy, theater, TV, and film. Gravid Water is a theatrical-comedy experiment where actors are given real scenes from real plays that they prepare as they would for a regular play. They are paired with improvisers who have no prior knowledge of the scenes—seeing and reacting to them for the first time on stage. The always surprising results are hilarious, heartbreaking, and everything in between. Gravid Water has played to sold-out houses in New York and Los Angeles for over fifteen years, as well as the Kennedy Center and theaters across the country. Starring the biggest names in comedy, Broadway, television, and movies, Gravid Water is honored to bring this wild experiment back home to the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. L INEUP: TBA Created and directed by Stephen Ruddy —- In-person tickets are $10 in advance and $15 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. shows.title: Ya'll Mic
shows.excerpt: Looking for a Stand-up Comedy Open Mic that’s a supportive room and always a good time? Look no further than the Ya'll Mic. Whether you’re a seasoned comic, an improvisor who’s always wanted to try standup, or you just decided that today’s
shows.description: Looking for a Stand-up Comedy Open Mic that’s a supportive room and always a good time? Look no further than the Ya'll Mic. Whether you’re a seasoned comic, an improvisor who’s always wanted to try standup, or you just decided that today’s the day for your first open mic (kudos) – The Ya'll Mic is a great venue to workshop your bits. The show is every Tuesday from 5:30pm – 7:30pm. Signup is online and the signup sheet is posted on Facebook & IG on Mondays. The list is emailed out a few hours before the show. Comics get 4 minutes of stage time (and a lifetime of memories.) While all are welcome, the room prioritizes BIPOC, LGBTQ+, and Femme comics. Come laugh with us!

shows.title: CLIP SHOW: A Stand-Up Open Mic
shows.excerpt: A low-stakes open mic where comedians have the options of filming their sets and getting constructive feedback from the crowd. Come through to the UCB Annex every 4th Tuesday of the month to get some stage time in a supportive…
shows.description: A low-stakes open mic where comedians have the options of filming their sets and getting constructive feedback from the crowd. Come through to the UCB Annex every 4th Tuesday of the month to get some stage time in a supportive room, practice your routine, and get some clips to feed the ever-hungry Content Machine! This is a fun, low-stakes mic for experienced performers as well as Improv students who have been flirting with the idea of stand-up. You will have the option of doing a regular 5 minutes or to reserve some of your time for positive, constructive feedback. We’ll get as many comics up as we can so we can all create some of that sweet, sweet content for Our Lord And Savior, The Algorithm. Womxn, trans, non-binary, and LGBTQIA+ strongly encouraged. Let’s make a space that feels safe and comfortable for everyone. Hosted by Abbey Perez — This event is FREE! Just walk in. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Annex 1925 N Bronson Ave Los Angeles, CA 90068

shows.title: You Are Not Alone: An Uplifting Show About Depression
shows.description: You Are Not Alone unites improvisers and artists that battle depression and mental illness in their day-to-day lives. Improvisers create scenes inspired by essays written about personal experiences and show that sometimes laughter really is the best medicine. Enjoying their 10+ year run at the Magnet Theater, YANA hopes to spread awareness and correct misconceptions about depression, all while providing an entertaining, fun, and safe space. Join the YANA community at https://www.facebook.com/YANAComedy Magnet Theater 254 West 29th St. New York NY 10001 Tickets You Are Not Alone: An Uplifting Show About Depression Tue Aug 25th, 2026 8:00pm - $10 Buy Ticket Performers Jeffrey Copeland Annemarie Cullen Shaun Farrugia Aaron Gold Michael McLarnon Kay Mollica Carly Moss Candice Opperman Adam Payne Rob Penty Ro Rovito Michael Serpe

shows.title: Experimental Mic
shows.excerpt: An open mic where comedians can push boundaries, try bold new ideas, and embrace the unpredictable. The comedy laboratory where anything can happen! Every Tuesday at the UCB Annex, this isn’t your average open mic. It’s a playground for comedians…
shows.description: An open mic where comedians can push boundaries, try bold new ideas, and embrace the unpredictable. The comedy laboratory where anything can happen! Every Tuesday at the UCB Annex, this isn’t your average open mic. It’s a playground for comedians to push boundaries, try bold new ideas, and embrace the unpredictable. From themed sets and tag-team comedy to audience challenges and heckle-friendly rounds, it brings a fresh lineup of inventive formats designed to keep performers and audiences on their toes. Whether you’re a seasoned comic testing new material or a first-timer stepping into the spotlight, Experimental Mic is the perfect space to get weird, wild, and wonderfully hilarious. Come see comedians experiment, fail gloriously, and maybe create something brilliant. It’s raw, unfiltered, and absolutely hilarious. You don’t want to miss it. Each comic gets 5 minutes. 15 performance spots available. Come put your name in the bucket at 7pm to see if you’re chosen. Hosted by Deric Brown — This show is free! Just walk in. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Annex 1925 N Bronson Avenue, Los Angeles, CA

shows.description: A weekly improv show hosted by Blue.0 and featuring a rotating cast of indie teams formed right here at The iO Theater! Each Wednesday at 6pm, a new improv team will open the show, followed by Blue.0 performing their original form, The Wagon. Each show will also include an opportunity for a few audience members to play with Blue.0 and our featured opening team! Eligible teams include those borne of New Team Smell, iO Grad Shows, house teams, lab casts, Harolds After Dark, and Kickstart teams! Are you part of a team that was formed at iO? Well, we want to hitch The Wagon™ to YOU! Follow us @blue.0improv on Instagram and Apply Today ! Cast: Willis Brei Gabi Fedoroff Linnaea Groh Harrison Hernandez Shekinah Kurapaty Christian Okoth Chris Osantowski Prim Stonebraker Georgie Svrcek Lucy Zarns

shows.title: The FREE WEDNESDAY SHOW feat Dumb John and Birdlady
shows.excerpt: ***This is a free show, but it is highly recommended to reserve your ticket here to guarantee entry.***** Regarded as one of Chicago's funniest and most promising improv groups of the last decade, Dumb John is proud to take the iO Stage with Bird...
shows.description: ***This is a free show, but it is highly recommended to reserve your ticket here to guarantee entry.***** Regarded as one of Chicago's funniest and most promising improv groups of the last decade, Dumb John is proud to take the iO Stage with Birdlady in a new weekly long form improv show. Both teams apply their high energy strain of improvisation to a bizarre cultural harvest of small town Americana influence and ephemera, using a single audience suggestion to inspire a piece of unhinged long form improv that propels diesel-soaked characters through fever dream karaoke scenes and down neon aisles of roadside antique marts; exploring the depravity and brilliance found at the heart of every moment. Take flight with two back to back original iO ensembles, Birdlady and Dumb John! Every Wednesday night at 7:30 (FREE), watch as they migrate toward their ultimate destination: hilarious long-form improvisation! It’ll be a HOOT! They’re so funny this show should be Ill-EAGLE! People can’t stop RAVEN about this show! DOORS: 7:00pm SHOW: 7:30pm Birdlady is: Ali Khan Alonso Ramirez Daryn Robinson Devin Henderson Erin Washington Justin Parlette Lauren Frost Ryan Nolan Dumb John is: Mike Geraghty Steve Plock Linda Orr Traycie Mcbee Follow our teams on Instagram at @birdlady.io & @dumbjohn

shows.title: Underdog Improv
shows.excerpt: Underdog Improv is a two person improv team, but here’s the twist: they’re siblings. Declan and Colleen Grogan use narrative style improv to take the audience on a journey that is sure to make you belly laugh. Catch the duo at iO for a guarant...
shows.description: Underdog Improv is a two person improv team, but here’s the twist: they’re siblings. Declan and Colleen Grogan use narrative style improv to take the audience on a journey that is sure to make you belly laugh. Catch the duo at iO for a guaranteed night of good times and improv so good, it might just save the world. Underdog Improv: two-prov to save the world.

shows.title: The Orbit
shows.excerpt: The Orbit is Chicago’s only improv show performed in the round. This 45-minute avant-garde experience takes the audience on a full-circle journey, showcasing a bold new form designed for 360-degree play. Rooted in classic iO techniques yet pushing...
shows.description: The Orbit is Chicago’s only improv show performed in the round. This 45-minute avant-garde experience takes the audience on a full-circle journey, showcasing a bold new form designed for 360-degree play. Rooted in classic iO techniques yet pushing toward the future, The Orbit offers a fresh perspective—inviting audiences to see improv from entirely new angles." Cast: Zach Reynolds Annie Scott Ella Nagle Louie Cordon Jessica Benson Mike Jimerson Erin Washington Directed by: Liz Allen Stage Managed by: Dan Wilcop

shows.title: Jury Duty
shows.excerpt: You've been summoned...to laugh. Jury Duty is a fully improvised courtroom comedy where the only thing on trial is sanity itself. Each night, the cast creates a brand new legal disaster based on audience suggestion, questionable logic, and
shows.description: You've been summoned...to laugh. Jury Duty is a fully improvised courtroom comedy where the only thing on trial is sanity itself. Each night, the cast creates a brand new legal disaster based on audience suggestion, questionable logic, and total chaos. Watch as the foreperson loses their mind, evidence makes things worse, and deliberations go off the rails. No script, no rules, no justice. Just comedy The trial is fake, the laughs are real

shows.description: Join iO house team Fizz for Chicago's most carbonated improv show. Wednesdays at 10 p.m., Fizz cracks open a high-octane, full-sugar set of one-night-only scenes, characters and stories with a special guest opener. Plus: Each week one resident Fizzicist must complete their assigned task or be sentenced to a sip of the foul-flavored FIZZ CUP. Will they Fizz or Flop? Come find out! shows.title: Not In My Backyard!
shows.excerpt: Comedians, journalists, and politicians debate all the local issues causing drama in your neighborhood’s Facebook group. From bike lanes and outdoor dining to dog poop and rats, our panel of comedians and experts gets to the bottom of how…
shows.description: Comedians, journalists, and politicians debate all the local issues causing drama in your neighborhood’s Facebook group. From bike lanes and outdoor dining to dog poop and rats, our panel of comedians and experts gets to the bottom of how this insane and beautiful city works. We’ll also quiz the audience on their own New York knowledge. Hosted by New York City’s most informed voters, Cody Lindquist (Colbert, Broad City, PTA Executive Board) and Charlie Todd (Improv Everywhere, Pixar In Real Life, Community Board). Not In My Backyard! has featured performers from The Daily Show and Saturday Night Live, journalists from The New York Times, NY1, and MSNOW, as well as Borough Presidents, NYC Council Members, State Senators, and State Assembly Members. shows.title: Thursday Night Improv Hosted by Creamboy
shows.excerpt: If you’re looking for a date night, girls’ night out, or a mandatory work outing (that your staff will actually like) — Look no further! Fast, funny, and frothy, Thursday Night Improv is entirely improvised and features a different guest opener f...
shows.description: If you’re looking for a date night, girls’ night out, or a mandatory work outing (that your staff will actually like) — Look no further! Fast, funny, and frothy, Thursday Night Improv is entirely improvised and features a different guest opener for veteran iO house team Creamboy every week. Every show is completely different, so you can keep coming back for more! Will you be the lucky audience member to receive the coveted title of Cream of the Week? Creamboy is made up of seasoned Chicago improvisers who play and teach all over the city (and country! And WORLD?!) which means this show is perfect for improv nerds, millennials who love Tina Fey, and even your cousin visiting from Kansas. Comedy so good you'll lick your lips and pat your belly. Mmmm so creamy! Get a taste of Creamboy on Instagram @ creamboy.io

shows.title: Improv: The Play
shows.excerpt: With the help of some of Chicago’s best actors, Improv: The Play is a new, hybrid version of long form improv happening only at the iO Theater. Each night, professional actors prepare a scene from a play. Their scene partners, however, are never ...
shows.description: With the help of some of Chicago’s best actors, Improv: The Play is a new, hybrid version of long form improv happening only at the iO Theater. Each night, professional actors prepare a scene from a play. Their scene partners, however, are never given a script, and must improvise their way through the scene. The result is a totally original, never before seen piece of theater. It’s drama, it’s comedy, it’s everything that’s magical about theater and improvisation. Come watch this brand-new show at iO and see something you won’t see anywhere else in the city. Featuring: Alex Beard Heather Mari Elijah Sloan Lexi Putter Lucas Pollitzer Marino Korellis Montrez Hawkins Nikk Tetreault Ryan Bowman Shawna Seals Directed by: James Dugan Produced by: Cory Hardin

shows.title: CONNOR RATLIFF presents THE ACTING CLASS
shows.excerpt: A one-person improv show disguised as an acting class, from the creator of the Dead Eyes podcast. Professional actor (Widow's Bay, Bob's Burgers, “King Henry” in a recent State Farm ad) and award-winning podcaster (Dead Eyes) CONNOR RATLIFF is a…
shows.description: A one-person improv show disguised as an acting class, from the creator of the Dead Eyes podcast. Professional actor (Widow’s Bay, Bob’s Burgers, “King Henry” in a recent State Farm ad) and award-winning podcaster (Dead Eyes) CONNOR RATLIFF is a classically trained performer who graduated “with honours” from the prestigious Liverpool Institute For Performing Arts over a quarter of a century ago, making his professional debut on the stage of the Royal Court Theatre in London’s West End. During that same year, he also performed at Buckingham Palace for Queen Elizabeth II. In the decades that followed, he has accumulated numerous credits as a star of stage, screen and stream, appearing in multiple Netflix Original Films as well as content on CBS, NBC, FOX, TBS, Nickelodeon, TruTV, Home Box Office, Amazon Prime, Apple TV and the now-defunct comedy platforms, Go90 and Seeso. But none of that matters now. What matters now is CONNOR RATLIFF presents THE ACTING CLASS, an unending series of workshop performances where he will, before your very eyes, demonstrate what acting truly IS. Each performance will be slightly interactive and completely improvised, with occasional opportunities for “students” to participate (from the safety of their position in the audience.) [Sometimes, there will be a guest, and occasionally they will not be announced in advance. Previous “announced” guests include Jack Quaid, Zach Cherry, Patrick Wilson, James III, Jeff Hiller and Griffin Newman; “surprise” guests have included Meg Ryan and Rachel Zegler.] Defiantly self-indulgent and beyond pointless, THE ACTING CLASS is your opportunity to witness the kind of greatness – only slightly appreciated by The Industry – that has kept Connor Ratliff steadily employed for nearly half of the past 10+ years. Praise for Connor Ratliff: “Connor Ratliff is a brilliant and funny comedic performer and actor.” THE NEW YORKER “An Improv Star.” VANITY FAIR “An Improv Ace.” MEN’S JOURNAL “Funny.” THE FINANCIAL TIMES
shows.cast: Connor Ratliff

Come see these writers and performers at the legendary iO Theater on Thursdays at 9:30pm before Saturday Night Live casts them. To learn more and stay up to date, follow us on Instagram @sketchplaylist and @fulproof_productions . IDIOT WAGON : Ashlyn Quintus, Chloe Grogean, Daniel Frasco, Erin Ryan, Franny Rodriguez, Izzy Thomases, Keiter Liriano, Lexi Putter, Max Reichek, Mitch Shepperd, Tom Phelan, and Ty Sato (directed by Joseph Belangia and assistant directed by Max Reichek) . MIST CONNECTIONS : Andy Fialko, Carlos Alvidrez, Fran Bixby, Harper Leander, Holly Kuldell, James Alcock, Jonah Gordon, Jonas Benz, Madeline Farr, Marck Kiselevach, Markley Bortz, and Tara Heilwagen (co-directed by JJ Rodriguez & Morgan O’Dell and assistant directed by Jonah Gordon) . PROPER GANDER : Brody Gibas, Caroline Storey, Cassi Seifert, Emilio Barajas, Emma Knott, Ethan Evans, Gregory Wagner, Hayley O’Toole, Nudia Hernandez, Rachel Wade, Taylor Meredith, and Willem Jewell (directed by Ronee Goldman) . shows.title: Three Actors Living in a Cave
shows.excerpt: Come check out one of Chicago's best longform improv teams, Three Actors Living in a Cave (Ollie Hobson, Mike Brunlieb, and Kyle Bethea) on Thursdays at 9:30pm, 8/20 - 10/8! Joined each week by Lerin (Lauren Frost and Erin Washington) and a
shows.description: Come check out one of Chicago's best longform improv teams, Three Actors Living in a Cave (Ollie Hobson, Mike Brunlieb, and Kyle Bethea) on Thursdays at 9:30pm, 8/20 - 10/8! Joined each week by Lerin (Lauren Frost and Erin Washington) and a rotating guest team! About Three Actors Once upon a time three poor cooks rode upon a huge wooden boat to sail around the world, but it did crash into a coral reef and all 800 aboard were drowned or stung to death except for the three poor cooks. They clung to a floating wardrobe trunk and washed upon the shore of a strange island. There they wandered for seven days and were bitten again and again by poisonous snakes. On the eighth day, tortured by painful fevers, they found refuge in a damp cave where they ate moss and acted out warped little scenarios for one another until they passed away. Their corpses were well preserved by the cool wet cave air and you can visit the island and look at their dead bodies, faces frozen in jest to this very day. Doors Open 9:00 PM Show 9:30 PM - 10:45 PM Cost $6.49 ($5 Ticket + $1.49 Fees)

shows.title: Blueprint
shows.excerpt: Blueprint is the kind of improv that keeps audiences AND players on their toes. Each week, a different cast member designs a bold new improv format that their fellow performers will learn about at the same time as the crowd. Expect the unexpected ...
shows.description: Blueprint is the kind of improv that keeps audiences AND players on their toes. Each week, a different cast member designs a bold new improv format that their fellow performers will learn about at the same time as the crowd. Expect the unexpected as we build something completely original, live, right before your eyes. Past forms have included: Improvised Severance - Guided by two internal "staff members," three performers are physically out of the room, while three others perform as their innies, and every 5 minutes, the two swapped. Can they make sense of their outies? and versa? Understudies - In a longform narrative, each player on stage knows that they will eventually understudy another player in the show. The lights change and they have to embody a different player, and each time the lights change, they can select another player to embody. Overachiever - Three 2-person monoscenes happen on stage, utilizing the same physical space, but taking place in categorically different spaces. They must navigate space atop of and around one another while keeping connection to their partner. Improvised Heist - Ocean's Eleven, eat your heart out! Our players hit the major plot points of a heist and improvise their way through - initial idea, building the team, planning the heist, executing, and the aftermath Blueprint is joined each week by a lab cast opening for the show with their own unique, original form. Directed by James Dugan Cast: James Dugan Avery Ford Molly Jones Allen Lucas Janelle Soulliere Ryan Bowman

shows.title: Magnet Musical Mixer
shows.description: Calling all fans of musical improv - and all you curious first-timers! Come on down to the Magnet Theater Hotel & Casino every THIRD THURSDAY of the month for a neon-blazing night of mixing, mingling, and making up scenes into sensational songs, BABY! Hosted by the one, the only, the FABULOUS Las Vegas Lounge Legend Trudy Carmichael, the Musical Magnet Mixer is a sparkling, ultra-supportive musical improv jam featuring a different Musical Megawatt team every month - plus live accompaniment from the absolutely irresistible Musical Mixer Orchestra. No prior improv or singing experience whatsoever required! Whether you’re ready to jump in and roll the dice, or lounge like royalty on the sidelines sipping a metaphorical martini, participation is always optional… enthusiasm, however, is strongly encouraged! Magnet Theater 254 West 29th St. New York NY 10001 Tickets Magnet Musical Mixer Thu Aug 27th, 2026 10:30pm - $5 Buy Ticket Magnet Musical Mixer Thu Jul 16th, 2026 10:30pm - $5 Buy Ticket Performers Robin Rothman Frank Spitznagel

shows.title: Blue Velvet Lounge
shows.excerpt: Step into the one glamorous but now lovingly frayed Blue Velvet Lounge, where the only thing not improvised are the jazz standards crooned by lounge singer Seth Lowry. As Seth’s velvet voice fades, the ensemble sweeps in, spinning spontaneo
shows.description: Step into the one glamorous but now lovingly frayed Blue Velvet Lounge, where the only thing not improvised are the jazz standards crooned by lounge singer Seth Lowry. As Seth’s velvet voice fades, the ensemble sweeps in, spinning spontaneous scenes inspired directly by the songs just performed. One moment, you’re eavesdropping on the eccentric regulars tucked into the lounge’s candlelit corners; the next, you’re whisked far beyond the club to follow the unexpected lives of the characters you just met—bartenders with secret ambitions, mysterious strangers with tangled pasts, and dreamers who stepped into the Blue Velvet for reasons they can’t quite explain. Playful, surprising, and steeped in a retro-cool vibe, this show blends live music and improvised storytelling into a one-of-a-kind night where every note inspires a new twist—and every visit to the Blue Velvet reveals something you’ve never seen before.

shows.title: TGIF with Duchovny & Olestra
shows.excerpt: Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But we do know it's improv every Friday @ 7pm! Buy Tickets
shows.description: DOORS: 6:30 PM SHOW: 7:00 PM Eris Deep Space (downstairs) "It's Friday night and the mood is right. Gonna have some fun, show you how it's done, TGIF". BCC is bringing back ABC's TGIF programming block Fridays at 7pm ET / 6 pm CT with Duchovny and Olestra. Does it stand for "Thank God It's Friday" or "Thank God It's Funny"... we'll never know. But it will be funny and it will be on Friday and we will thank god for both. Duchovny is a group of elite New York maniacs comprised of veteran improvisers, actors, and comedians who you've probably seen in TV, movies, and even the most coveted work of all, digital-only commercials that air before Youtube videos. Duchovny is fast paced, high energy and filled to the brim with chaos. Olestra is a squad of dangerous Chicago criminals who make out and beat the hell out of each other on stage here in New York. They evaded arrest by racking up credits in the entertainment industry; The Tonight Show, The Second City, UCB Betty, The Improvised Shakespeare Company, to name a few. Duchovny is: Amanda Breen @amanda_breen James Dwyer @jamesbdwyer Lou Gonzalez @angrylou Patrick Keene @pad00d2.0 Yoni Lotan @yonilotan Tami Sagher @tamisagher Akmal Tajihan @akmaltajihan Sarah Grace Welbourn @sgwelbs Duchovny @duchovnyimprov Olestra is: Dan Bazaldua @dannbazz Devin Bockrath @durvinbuttrath Nick Mestad @nick_mestad Micah Sterenberg @micah_humble_blessed Andy Junk @therealandyjunk Fine Print: Must be 21+ to attend. No outside alcohol is allowed in the space. There are 35 seats - first come, first serve - and then standing room up to capacity. All ticket sales are final - no refunds. If you must miss your show, email us at info@brooklyncc.com with at least 24 hours notice and we can transfer your tickets to any upcoming show at the BCC. Answers to most other questions can be found here . If show is sold out, limited tickets will be available at the door. Lineup subject to change. Buy tickets $5 OFF TIX BEFORE DAY OF SHOW

shows.title: ComedySportz
shows.excerpt: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whet...
shows.description: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whether you're bringing your family, your co-workers, or a date - you are welcome, and you will laugh. ComedySportz is two teams of all-star improv comedians going head to head in comedy games, scenes and songs. YOU will vote on which team you liked the best and the teams will score points based on your applause. One of our world-famous referees will guide you through the whole show and may even ask for your help on stage. Every show ends in our incredible 6 THINGS game that is known throughout the world as 'the hardest game in all of improv'. It's fast. It's hilarious. It's appropriate for all ages. It's ComedySportz.

shows.title: The Last Word
shows.excerpt: The Last Word is the ONLY craft cocktail progression paired with a screenplay. Experience a high action comedy script complete with lights, sound, music, and other fun surprises throughout the night - including 4 cocktails crafted specifically fo...
shows.description: The Last Word is the ONLY craft cocktail progression paired with a screenplay. Experience a high action comedy script complete with lights, sound, music, and other fun surprises throughout the night - including 4 cocktails crafted specifically for each act of the show! STORY: Chartreuse is a real-life liqueur that sells millions of bottles every year, but only two people in the world know how to make it. When Mike finds one dying in the woods and is given the only known copy of the recipe, he has to decide if he can return it to the monastery that keeps it safe or die trying. DRINK PACKAGE: Select "GA + Drink Package" to have our 4 specialty cocktails brought to your table at key moments during the show. Server gratuity is included in the price. Not feeling a drink? No problem! The Last Word can be enjoyed entirely on its own. We believe the cocktails enhance the show, not make it. Select "General Admission" for a ticket without cocktails. Content Warning: Flashing lights, loud sounds, profanity, depictions of violence. Run Time: 2.5hrs including intermission The Last Friday of the month at the iO Theater thelastwordshow.com

shows.title: Improvised Shakespeare Chicago
shows.venue: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
venues: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
shows.excerpt: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William ...
shows.description: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William Shakespeare. Inspired by one audience suggestion (a title for a play that has yet to be written) the dazzling players create a brand-new Shakespearean masterpiece right before your eyes. Nothing has been planned out, rehearsed, or written. The dialogue is said for the first time, the characters are created as you watch, and if ever you're wondering where the story is going...so are they! You've never seen the Bard like this before! “There’s really nothing quite like it in the city of Chicago. Smart, sophisticated, downright hilarious.” -TimeOut Chicago “…the show channels Monty Python as often as the Bard, and frequently with sly-witted results.” -The Chicago Tribune “Consistently Hilarious” -The Chicago Reader “Staggeringly Brilliant” -TimeOut Chicago “Consistently funny…'Tis v'ry, v'ry good.” -The Chicago Tribune “Indisputably great improv, fueled by smart plot development, stage chemistry and recognizable characters.” -Centerstage Chicago “In short, outstanding.” -TimeOut Chicago Find out more at improvisedshakespeare.com _________________________ Additional option to include Improvised Shakespeare's featured cocktail, Hamlet , with your ticket. It includes Nolets Dry Gin, St-Germaine, Campari, orange juice, and garnished with an orange wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show plus fees. Welcome to CLOWN HAUL, hosted by the highly immersive elegant performance art clown troupe, FLWLS (pronounced flawless). A heavenly salon where you can experience the mystical world of clowning. shows.title: ComedySportz
shows.excerpt: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whet...
shows.description: Chicago's longest running short-form improv show (founded in 1987) and the only comedy show in Chicago EVERYONE is welcome at - from age 8 to 80, our inclusive 'everyone is welcome' approach to comedy makes us perfect for patrons of all ages. Whether you're bringing your family, your co-workers, or a date - you are welcome, and you will laugh. ComedySportz is two teams of all-star improv comedians going head to head in comedy games, scenes and songs. YOU will vote on which team you liked the best and the teams will score points based on your applause. One of our world-famous referees will guide you through the whole show and may even ask for your help on stage. Every show ends in our incredible 6 THINGS game that is known throughout the world as 'the hardest game in all of improv'. It's fast. It's hilarious. It's appropriate for all ages. It's ComedySportz.

shows.title: Improvised Jane Austen
shows.excerpt: "...countless laughs...whimsical homage to the illustrious author." -- Chicago Reader Improvised Jane Austen continues its entirely improvised tales of love and laughter this summer. Audiences will enjoy an evening with wit and heart in equal me...
shows.description: "...countless laughs...whimsical homage to the illustrious author." -- Chicago Reader Improvised Jane Austen continues its entirely improvised tales of love and laughter this summer. Audiences will enjoy an evening with wit and heart in equal measure with an improvised rom-com for everyone, whether you love Austen or just like to laugh! Improvised Jane Austen currently performs Saturday nights at 6:00 pm at iO Theater and tickets are $20. "...[They] took it, owned it and created some really funny and touching moments....an evening of silliness and indulgence....make running amok look like delicious fun." -- PerformInk Chicago Join Improvised Jane Austen for the signature romantic comedy and social satire of the beloved author, improvised by Chicago's top comedic talent. Celebrate all things love, friendship, and Austen this Summer. “...Improvised Jane Austen is one of the strongest improv troupes in the city. They have the ability to use Austen’s 19th century wit and sarcasm and make it recognizable for a 21st-century audience." --Scapi Magazine Improvised Jane Austen is a comedic ensemble that creates unscripted performances using Jane Austen's tropes, themes, and language to create a satirical romantic comedy set in Regency-era England. Playing in Austen’s world, Improvised Jane Austen’s stories delight 21st century audiences with a modern sense and sensibility. The current cast of 20+ performers rotate weekly, creating a new ensemble for every show. Come for the humor, stay for the heart! Throughout the show’s run, Improvised Jane Austen has been Chicago Reader Recommended , named a PerformInk Critics’ Pick , voted Best sketch/improv troupe 2019 in the Reader’s Best of Chicago , and was featured on WTTW playlist , in Time Out , the Chicago Tribune and on a their list of what to do on Valentine’s Day , on WGN’s Daytime Chicago in 2024 and 2026 and on CBS News Chicago . Learn more: https://improvisedjaneausten.com/

shows.title: Scott Green Lies to Your Kids
shows.excerpt: It’s the all-ages magic show that’s actually fun for all ages. This is not a sweet, gentle, clap-along children’s show. Magician Scott Green (Penn & Teller: Fool Us; Chicago Bulls team magician; WGN; ABC; Fox; ESPN) brings the heat: an unhinged, u...
shows.description: It’s the all-ages magic show that’s actually fun for all ages. This is not a sweet, gentle, clap-along children’s show. Magician Scott Green ( Penn & Teller: Fool Us ; Chicago Bulls team magician; WGN; ABC; Fox; ESPN) brings the heat: an unhinged, unpredictable performance packed with how-the-%*#&-did-he-do-that moments and side-splitting comedy. The laughter is infectious—as a stand-up, Scott is a regular at Zanies Comedy Club and has been featured at comedy festivals across North America (Laugh After Dark, Vermont Comedy Festival, Athens Comedy Festival, and more). Is this a show where kids bring their grownups, or a show where grownups bring their kids? The answer is yes.

shows.description: Two Emmy-nominated TV writers who just lost their actual jobs try to find something they might be good at. Michael Cruz Kayne and Asher Perlman were both writers for The Late Show with Stephen Colbert until that abruptly ended last month. In a panic, they are trying as many formats as possible to see what marketable skills they might maybe have so they can find work again. Come enjoy their interview/standup/crowdwork/ cartoon/musical/improv/sewing circle/etc. Featuring: Asher Perlman and Michael Cruz Kayne With Special Guests: TBA —- In-person tickets are $15 plus fees. shows.title: The Armando Diaz Experience
shows.description: The legendary show is reborn! Created in 1995 at the iO Theater in Chicago, The Armando Diaz Experience IS the longest running improv show EVER. A guest monologist takes a suggestion from the audience and shares true stories from their life. These stories are then brought to life by a rotating cast of improv all-stars, which take audiences on a high minded, exhilarating comedic joy ride that will leave mouths tired of smiling. And occasionally, just occasionally, the man with his name on the show will drop by for some fun. "The “Armando,” performed every Saturday, always begins with a monologue, and at a recent show it was about a connection made on the internet that led a decade later to a real-life relationship. The team of improvisers built patient scenes off this moving story, which made daring shifts in perspective, from the real world to secret worlds, inside and outside of bodies. There was a playfulness to the creativity, bold choices that verged on reckless that wouldn’t make the transition to a script." NYTimes Magnet Theater 254 West 29th St. New York NY 10001 Tickets The Armando Diaz Experience Monologist TBA Sat Aug 29th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Rob Penty Sat Jul 18th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Phil Sugar Sat Jul 25th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Tessa Flannery Sat Aug 1st, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Carson Olshanksky Sat Aug 8th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Suerynn Lee Sat Aug 15th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket The Armando Diaz Experience Featured Monologist: Kate Jordan Sat Aug 22nd, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket Performers Justin Anderson Rick Andrews Christopher Bell Hannah Chase Kevin Cragg Shacottha Fields Elana Fishbein Megan Gray Eleanor Lewis Christine Magee Dennis Pacheco Xavier Padin Jamie R

shows.title: Improvised Shakespeare Chicago
shows.venue: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
venues: iO Theater - First Floor: The Fremont Stage
shows.excerpt: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William ...
shows.description: The Improvised Shakespeare Company® proudly presents its critically-acclaimed, long-running hit show Improvised Shakespeare Chicago now in it’s 20th year! Join us for an evening of off-the-ruff comedy featuring the language and themes of William Shakespeare. Inspired by one audience suggestion (a title for a play that has yet to be written) the dazzling players create a brand-new Shakespearean masterpiece right before your eyes. Nothing has been planned out, rehearsed, or written. The dialogue is said for the first time, the characters are created as you watch, and if ever you're wondering where the story is going...so are they! You've never seen the Bard like this before! “There’s really nothing quite like it in the city of Chicago. Smart, sophisticated, downright hilarious.” -TimeOut Chicago “…the show channels Monty Python as often as the Bard, and frequently with sly-witted results.” -The Chicago Tribune “Consistently Hilarious” -The Chicago Reader “Staggeringly Brilliant” -TimeOut Chicago “Consistently funny…'Tis v'ry, v'ry good.” -The Chicago Tribune “Indisputably great improv, fueled by smart plot development, stage chemistry and recognizable characters.” -Centerstage Chicago “In short, outstanding.” -TimeOut Chicago Find out more at improvisedshakespeare.com _________________________ Additional option to include Improvised Shakespeare's featured cocktail, Hamlet , with your ticket. It includes Nolets Dry Gin, St-Germaine, Campari, orange juice, and garnished with an orange wedge. Best part? Gratuity is included. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.title: Best of iO Improv
shows.excerpt: Celebrate 45 years of improvisational excellence with the Best of iO Improv. This show brings together two teams of our very best improvisers, each delivering a high energy, hilarious set in classic iO forms like the Living Room, Weirdass, Shotgun...
shows.description: Celebrate 45 years of improvisational excellence with the Best of iO Improv. This show brings together two teams of our very best improvisers, each delivering a high energy, hilarious set in classic iO forms like the Living Room, Weirdass, Shotgun, and more. Between sets, the show drops into The Dream, a surreal, mind bending journey through one day based on an interview with an audience member. Fast, fearless, and funny, this is iO improvisation at its highest level.

shows.title: SAHD (Stay-At-Home Dad)
shows.excerpt: A brutally honest comedy about keeping tiny humans alive when you are dying inside. Created and performed by playwright, comedian, and viral creator Brandon Ogborn, SAHD (Stay-At-Home Dad) is a brutally honest one-man show about what happens when someone who…
shows.description: A brutally honest comedy about keeping tiny humans alive when you are dying inside. Created and performed by playwright, comedian, and viral creator Brandon Ogborn , SAHD (Stay-At-Home Dad) is a brutally honest one-man show about what happens when someone who grew up homeschooled in a religious cult tries to become a normal stay-at-home dad. From navigating the daily chaos of raising small children to processing his father’s thirteen-year obsession with creating a Rush Limbaugh board game, carbon monoxide poisoning, and cosmic fire truck visits, Ogborn weaves together stories that are equal parts ridiculous and truly heartbreaking. Through deeply personal storytelling, he discovers that the people who drive us crazy are often the same ones who somehow keep us sane. Created and performed by Brandon Ogborn Directed by Karole Foreman — All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Lineup is subject to change. Upright Citizens Brigade Annex 1925 N Bronson Ave Los Angeles, CA 90068

shows.title: ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are $20 in advance and $25 on the day of the show plus fees. Livestream tickets are $10 plus fees. Buyers will receive an email with the livestream link one-hour before the show. Livestream link will be available for 7 days after the show. All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre: 242 East 14th Street, New York, NY 10003

shows.title: ASSSSCAT LA
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by true stories from a surprise celebrity guest. ASSSSCAT has played to critical acclaim and sold-out audiences across the country. What Is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians taking the stage with a surprise celebrity guest. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our “monologist “ shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestions. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world. Previous celebrity guests include: Will Ferrell, Mark Hamill, Tina Fey, Charles Barkley, Don Cheadle, Elizabeth Banks, Aubrey Plaza, Kumail Nanjiani, Amy Poehler, Robin Williams and more. Why See ASSSSCAT? ASSSSCAT is one of the best improv comedy shows in Los Angeles. Each show is a one-of-a-kind live comedy experience. Whether you’re a longtime fan of UCB or searching for live comedy in LA for the first time, or looking for new exciting date ideas in LA, ASSSSCAT offers a chance to see the best comedians in LA at the top of their game, and don’t forget the surprise celebrity guest at every show! And don’t worry, if you can’t see the show live, we also offer a LIVESTREAM option for all performances! Critics and audiences agree: “Unbelievably funny.” – LA Times • “Best of LA: Best Improv.” – Los Angeles Magazine • “Best of LA: Best Improv Show.” – LA Weekly Readers Poll • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” – Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” – Vice Magazine • “Critics’ Pick” – Time Out Los Angeles About the Venue The Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is one of the most well-known comedy venues in Los Angeles

shows.title: Metal Boy Presents: Your Worst Idea
shows.description: Behind every great idea, there are 50 other terrible ones that came first. Your Worst Idea takes the garbage, shines it up, and gives it a second chance. Each show, we'll invite a guest to offer up a never-before-seen work of art (a poem from 7th grade! A terrible sketch! Pages from a diary!). Metal Boy will perform a live reading, then like a phoenix, spin comedy gold from its ashes. The cast of Your Worst Idea includes comedy vets from all over NYC—credits include: Search Party (HBO), Birdgirl and The Venture Bros. (Adult Swim), the Rude Tales of Magic podcast, Baby Wants Candy, Reductress, The Truth podcast, Story Pirates, Improv Everywhere, and UCB Comedy. They also once performed an improv show before a free screening of a Zack Galifiankis movie. Heather Seltzer will be playing Portia in the upcoming NYC Fringe show "Portia and Ellen," a tragic comedy that she wrote about marriage and cancel culture. A screenwriter represented by Zero Gravity Management, she was shortlisted for the 2025 5th Cannes Screenplay List and was a 2023 Big Break Screenwriting Contest Finalist. She is an alum of Broadway to Go, Magnet Theater's Lady Sketch Show and the all-female indie improv team Mama Like. Heather is the creator, director and a writer of “Dance Party Time,” an award-winning comedic web series for kids that stars neurodivergent young adults. Magnet Theater 254 West 29th St. New York NY 10001 Tickets Metal Boy Presents: Your Worst Idea Sat Aug 29th, 2026 9:00pm - $17 Buy Ticket Metal Boy Presents: Your Worst Idea Sat Jul 25th, 2026 9:00pm - $17 Buy Ticket

shows.title: D.A.R.E. Dropouts Presents: After School Special
shows.excerpt: The final bell just rang! You better get out of the classroom and get your ass to the iO Theater for After School Special brought to you by iO's first all-POC house team, D.A.R.E. Dropouts. This show brings you something new every week, featuring...
shows.description: The final bell just rang! You better get out of the classroom and get your ass to the iO Theater for After School Special brought to you by iO's first all-POC house team, D.A.R.E. Dropouts . This show brings you something new every week, featuring a variety of local acts by performers of color and an improv set from the Dropouts themselves. The coolest kids in school, no one does a Harold (iO's signature form) quite like D.A.R.E. Dropouts. We're bringing you comedy in color; you're gonna want to tune in. THE DROPOUTS: AJ Regalado Alexi Bolden Avery Ford Emefa Dzodzomenyo Grace Goze Jazmin Robinson Juliana Zepeta Kelton Neals Michael Elluru Montrez Hawkins Rudy Fajardo You can get the drop on D.A.R.E. Dropouts by following @daredropouts.io on Instagram! ______________________________ Additional option to include our featured cocktail, "The D.A.R.E. Special" with your ticket. It includes Tito's, club soda, grenadine, and pineapple juice. Best part? A portion of each sale supports scholarships for POC improvisers to take classes at iO. Gratuity is included with the listed price. Got a Drink Add-on? Follow these steps: Show your ticket to the host and mention the drink add-on. Grab your token and place it on your table. Enjoy your drink as a server will bring it by shortly. Note: Valid ID is required for all alcohol service. No ID, no drink, no refunds.

shows.description: A weekly show where anyone can sign up with or without a group to perform improv on the LSI stage! Sign ups start at 5:30pm, show starts right at 6:00pm. If you want to perform at LSI, this is a great place to start! Show up, make some new friends, and get some reps! LSI Open Stage has a max of 10 teams plus the mashup teams in order to provide everyone with enough stage time for their set. First come, first serve, doors open at 5:30pm. Free agents (performers who arrive without a team) are always welcome and encouraged to join the mashup teams! Sign ups / Doors Open 5:30 PM Show 6:00 PM - 7:30 PM Cost Free to watch!

shows.title: Live and Direct
shows.description: Directed premise. Spontaneous theater. In Live & Direct, a curated cast of seasoned performers transform everyday real-life moments into improvised theater. Each scene begins with one performer briefly sharing a mundane situation from their life, then casting their teammates into the world of the scene. What follows is honest, committed, character-driven comedy where ordinary moments lead to unexpected, hilariously human consequences. Magnet Theater 254 West 29th St. New York NY 10001 Tickets Live and Direct Sun Aug 30th, 2026 7:30pm - $17 Buy Ticket

shows.title: Living Room Living Room
shows.excerpt: LA’s funniest take on real life. Living Room Living Room is the premiere long-form improv show held at the World’s Greatest Improv School, where the city’s best comedians turn real stories into hilarious, totally unscripted scenes. Each week featu...
shows.description: LA’s funniest take on real life. Living Room Living Room is the premiere long-form improv show held at the World’s Greatest Improv School, where the city’s best comedians turn real stories into hilarious, totally unscripted scenes. Each week features a rotating cast of WGIS’s top performers—plus surprise guests from TV, film, and the national improv scene. Main Cast: Will Hines ( Broad City, Comedy Bang Bang, Brooklyn 99 ) Sarah Claspell ( Brooklyn 99, Jimmy Kimmel Live, Drunk History ) Jim Woods ( The Office, How I Met Your Mother, Reno 911 ) Beth Appel ( Sex Lives of College Girls, Never Have I Ever ) Dave Theune ( St. Denis Medical, Frasier ) Jamie Gaul ( General Hospital, Grey’s Anatomy, Medium ) Surprise guests every week. Past guests include: Colton Dunn ( Superstore, Key & Peele ) Zeke Nicholson ( Dropout TV, The Good Place, A.P. Bio ) Connor Ratliff ( Mean Girls, The George Lucas Talk Show ) + more!! Cast for Sunday May 3 Beth Appel Hazel Brady Russel Carter Sarah Claspell Rachel Clayton May Darmon Will Hines Mike McLendon Dave Theune Jim Woods

shows.title: Harold Night
shows.excerpt: Each week, the talented teams of iO come together to create characters, discover alternate realities, and play hilarious bits all inspired by one word from you, the audience! Using the Harold, an improvised story-telling format, iO's elite house t...
shows.description: Each week, the talented teams of iO come together to create characters, discover alternate realities, and play hilarious bits all inspired by one word from you, the audience! Using the Harold, an improvised story-telling format, iO's elite house teams will showcase the wonderful, strange, and thrilling art of improv, making you second-guess if what you're seeing is truly made up on-the-spot. Two teams will perform their individual sets and then end the show with The Dream, performing a near accurate depiction of an audience member's dreams! Featuring rotating performances from: Baby Grand BL!MP Morning Glory Chariot Mischief Feast The Wretched Fever Dream

shows.title: Deep Schwa
shows.excerpt: Chicago's longest-running Harold team returns to iO to bring their unique blend of chaos and creativity to iO's signature form The Harold melding games, songs, and scenes for singular, edge-of-your-seat improv comedy. Formed in 1996 Deep Schwa h...
shows.description: Chicago's longest-running Harold team returns to iO to bring their unique blend of chaos and creativity to iO's signature form The Harold melding games, songs, and scenes for singular, edge-of-your-seat improv comedy. Formed in 1996 Deep Schwa has over 50 members, has done over 1,000 shows, performed in theaters all over Chicago and beyond. Made up of a cast of Chicago's most seasoned and eclectic players and teachers it's a show perfect for the improv initiate and those just looking to chase away the Sunday scaries. Every Sunday, 29 years and counting. "Top-tier!" - AV Club "Legitimate." - Guy on Yelp "The most chaotic 'pro' team." - Redditor Cast: Jill Fenstermaker Liz Kirkwood Steve Nelson Eddie Piña Megan Redfearn Cassidy Russell Andy Stegmeyer Craig Uhlir Anthony LeBlanc IG: @deepschwa

shows.title: *FREE* ASSSSCAT NY
shows.excerpt: UCBNY presents a *FREE* ASSSSCAT! Tickets for this show are free, but you must make a reservation online and arrive prior to 8:25pm for a seat. Seating is first come first served so any arrival after 8:25pm is not guaranteed.…
shows.description: UCBNY presents a *FREE* ASSSSCAT! Tickets for this show are free, but you must make a reservation online and arrive prior to 8:25pm for a seat. Seating is first come first served so any arrival after 8:25pm is not guaranteed. Tickets will become available on Friday, August 28th, at 12pm ET. Come back to this page then! If you do not reserve a seat in advance, please still show up anyways and we’ll try to get you in if there are some no-shows! ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special guest monologist. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our monologist shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestion. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world! Previous NY monologists include: Mark Hamill, Alan Alda, Tina Fey, Keegan-Michael Key, Ellie Kemper, Kevin Bacon, Jessica Williams, Phoebe Robinson, Kathleen Turner, Paul Shaffer, Daniel Dae Kim, Conan O’Brien, and more! • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” -Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” -Vice Magazine — In-person tickets are FREE to reserve! Please note: this show will not be live streamed All sales are final. The show starts at the time listed. If you are not at the theater more than 5 minutes before the start of the show, we may release your tickets to the waitlist. Lineup is subject to change. Under 17 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian. Please use discretion, as all our shows can potentially use adult/sexual material, language, and images. Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre: 242 East 14th Street, New York, NY 10003

shows.title: ASSSSCAT LA
shows.excerpt: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by…
shows.description: ASSSSCAT—UCB’s signature improv juggernaut—is a live improv comedy show in Los Angeles at the Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre. An all-star comedy show featuring comedians you know from SNL, Dropout, and the world of Film & Television doing improv inspired by true stories from a surprise celebrity guest. ASSSSCAT has played to critical acclaim and sold-out audiences across the country. What Is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians taking the stage with a surprise celebrity guest. After getting a suggestion from the audience, our “monologist “ shares off-the-cuff thoughts, feelings, and true stories inspired by your suggestions. The improvisers then spin this monologue into a series of scenes that will show you why ASSSSCAT is one of the longest running improv shows in the world. Previous celebrity guests include: Will Ferrell, Mark Hamill, Tina Fey, Charles Barkley, Don Cheadle, Elizabeth Banks, Aubrey Plaza, Kumail Nanjiani, Amy Poehler, Robin Williams and more. Why See ASSSSCAT? ASSSSCAT is one of the best improv comedy shows in Los Angeles. Each show is a one-of-a-kind live comedy experience. Whether you’re a longtime fan of UCB or searching for live comedy in LA for the first time, or looking for new exciting date ideas in LA, ASSSSCAT offers a chance to see the best comedians in LA at the top of their game, and don’t forget the surprise celebrity guest at every show! And don’t worry, if you can’t see the show live, we also offer a LIVESTREAM option for all performances! Critics and audiences agree: “Unbelievably funny.” – LA Times • “Best of LA: Best Improv.” – Los Angeles Magazine • “Best of LA: Best Improv Show.” – LA Weekly Readers Poll • “The hardest we’ve laughed in a long, long time.” – Out Magazine • “Among improv people today, the gold standard is a group called ASSSSCAT.” – Vice Magazine • “Critics’ Pick” – Time Out Los Angeles About the Venue The Upright Citizens Brigade Theatre is one of the most well-known comedy venues in Los Angeles
